---
I know Val, and her commitment to helping others speaks for itself.
I watched her put her patients’ needs above her own when she was a physician — even if it meant long nights and late dinners.
I watched her take the train to D.C. several times a week to fight for health care for millions of Americans and help pass the Affordable Care Act.
And when she became chair of Pennsylvania’s third-largest county, I’ve watched as she’s done everything in her power to make folks’ lives easier — everything from raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour for county employees to passing paid parental leave for county employees.
**None of these things were easy, but Val doesn’t quit until the job’s done. It’s time we had more forward-thinking leaders like Val in the Senate, and we have one of our best shots to do it this election.**
**[Val’s team is hoping for a few more donations before the deadline in less than 48 hours. Will you pitch in now to help Val flip Pennsylvania blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41230319/327888383/-1510602922?refcode=AU_DVA_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220130_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDM4ZjY0Yi1kZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rhnLK5LQN0rfRgrmtIbC6XxtIUOX0n9ryOsAfHiEOv8=)**
I’m so proud of Val and I’m even more excited for her to make history as the first woman physician in the Senate. I hope you’ll join our team to make it happen.
Thanks,
_Jeff_

clean_body: | Hey Peter, I hope you’re having a great weekend. I’m Jeff, Val’s husband, and I wanted to reach out before tomorrow night’s big deadline. Val and I first met in Philly at an event supporting the arts. For our first date, we biked from the Art Museum to Valley Forge National Park (where we still hike to this day). It didn’t take long for me to see the passionate, determined, and hardworking person she is shining through. = It’s been a few years since our first date, but in that time, I’ve gotten a front row seat to watching Val accomplish incredible things for Pennsylvanians. We need more people like Val in the Senate — leaders who have the courage to fight for what’s right, no matter what. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = I know Val, and her commitment to helping others speaks for itself. I watched her put her patients’ needs above her own when she was a physician — even if it meant long nights and late dinners. I watched her take the train to D.C. several times a week to fight for health care for millions of Americans and help pass the Affordable Care Act. And when she became chair of Pennsylvania’s third-largest county, I’ve watched as she’s done everything in her power to make folks’ lives easier — everything from raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour for county employees to passing paid parental leave for county employees. None of these things were easy, but Val doesn’t quit until the job’s done. It’s time we had more forward-thinking leaders like Val in the Senate, and we have one of our best shots to do it this election. = I’m so proud of Val and I’m even more excited for her to make history as the first woman physician in the Senate. I hope you’ll join our team to make it happen. Thanks, Jeff = Val Arkoosh for U.S. Senate P.O. I just got off the phone with House Republican Chairwoman Elise Stefanik, and I couldn't believe what she told me about you.

As I hope you know, House Republicans just launched a $1 Million Challenge to mark the 1 year anniversary of Joe Biden’s presidency.

**[Let Joe know that America is sick and tired of his radical agenda by helping us raise $1 Million by January 31st.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e8ui-1vofr-4qqlpo9/ "Let Joe know that America is sick and tired of his radical agenda by helping usraise $1 Million by January 31st.")**

But the Chairwoman said you were on her list of top supporters who had failed to join the challenge yet.

Well, I hope I can persuade you to change your mind.

---

Because the stakes right now for America are too serious to be sitting on the sidelines. After just 1 year under Joe Biden, the border is open, the schools are closed, and the shelves are empty.

You and I both know 3 more years of one-party rule by Biden and the Democrats will be a complete disaster. That's why we must act now to take back the House and stand up to Biden. **[Chip in now!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e8ui-1voft-4qqlpo1/ "Chip in now!")**

Vice President Mike Pence

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e8ui-1vofw-4qqlpo4/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Never Again PAC
subject: 🎉The Supreme Court has rejected Trump's efforts🎉
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
On Wednesday the 19th, the Justices of the court officially rejected Donald Trump's requests to block the release of White House records from January 6 to the House select committee. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41230146/327888007/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMzhmNjRiLWRkODEtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1_R02ZMayNDzIVPjeCJ6IicrIDZgPieoOgP4UOrkOus=&emci=04ae7e74-f27e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=4a38f64b-dd81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=16335001) There's a lot to be rightfully angry at these days, team.

From Republicans blocking the passage of voting rights in the Senate to the Treason Caucus's constant effort to undermine our democracy, it is sometimes hard to see the silver linings of the world.

But two weeks ago, the Supreme Court delivered us a cause for celebration!

**On Wednesday the 19th, the Justices of the court officially rejected Donald Trump's requests to block the release of White House records from January 6 to the House select committee.**

**[In celebration of Trump's secrets coming to light, will you rush a donation of $10 to help us protect our democracy by voting out the lying Treason Caucus?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41230147/327888008/516199846?refcode=em22_220130_EOM3T_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220130_EOM3T_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMzhmNjRiLWRkODEtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1_R02ZMayNDzIVPjeCJ6IicrIDZgPieoOgP4UOrkOus=)**

This is a big win for the movement to protect our democracy and make sure that those involved in the insurrection on January 6 are held accountable for their actions.

For too long, Donald Trump and the Treason Caucus have considered themselves untouchable, but now, **we hope they will begin to understand that obstructing justice is unacceptable and that they are not above the law.**

We don't know exactly what those records contain, team, but we know they must have some pretty incriminating evidence – we're excited for the truth to be unveiled.

**But we can't let small victories keep us from the bigger picture.** This November, we have the opportunity to make a real change in our democracy by voting out the members of the Treason Caucus, and we're glad to have you by our side to reach our goal.

**[Today, will you chip in $5 or even $10 to help us build a war chest to vote out the Treason Caucus in the November elections?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41230148/327888009/516199846?refcode=em22_220130_EOM3T_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220130_EOM3T_fnd_gq_act___TNAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhMzhmNjRiLWRkODEtZWMxMS05NGY2LWM4OTY2NTBkNDQ0MiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1_R02ZMayNDzIVPjeCJ6IicrIDZgPieoOgP4UOrkOus=)**

Thank you,

Team Never Again
Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Madison Cawthorn, Louie Gohmert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: take a stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
Hello, Recently, Senator Maggie Hassan stood up to fight for voting rights on the Senate floor for one simple reason: it was the right thing to do. Here’s the thing about Maggie: she always does what’s right, no matter what political attacks may come. And the attacks are coming. Republicans have spent over $7 million so far to defeat Maggie. Friend, did you see my mom's message?
I'm so grateful for everything she's done for our family: moving to an entirely new country so that my siblings and I could have a better future, supporting our family as a businesswoman, and now, stepping in to help power this campaign for a stronger, more inclusive Arizona.
I'm grateful for you, too – for all you've done to take this campaign further than we ever dreamed. But the harder we work, the higher the stakes rise – and with the election year officially here, and our first major end-of-month deadline around the corner, we can't afford a single misstep.
That's why I'm reaching out to _you,_ friend – you're a top supporter, and we need you now more than ever. **Arizona's future is hanging in the balance – and if you decide to sit on the sidelines, Donald Trump and my extremist opponent, Kari Lake (R), will happily take over.

We need to raise another $6,419 by midnight tonight to keep our fundraising on track and win this race. So I need to ask: [Will you chip in whatever you can to close our fundraising gap, defeat GOP extremists and flip Arizona blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41230667/327889992/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk431-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDFhYjlmZS1kZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ua1vhnAbQEVlPGM7mbzJ_oxgd-IS4x7nrLOQnytzCQo=)**
Thanks – on behalf of the entire Lopez family.

Marco Lopez

Friend – **I am so excited to be reaching out to you on behalf of my son, Marco Lopez, who's running for governor of Arizona, especially during such an exciting time.**
Fifty years ago, Marco's dad and I made the decision to move our family from Mexico to Arizona. We came here for the promise of greater opportunity – for the promise of Arizona. But I never could have imagined where that promise would take Marco.
**From becoming the mayor of our hometown of Nogales, Arizona, to serving in the Obama administration, Marco has always been a champion for the people of this state. And today, he's following in my footsteps – running his own small business, creating jobs and opportunity in his community. **

As a mother, I couldn't be more proud of Marco – and as an Arizonan, I couldn't be more excited for the vision he has for our great state. From defending voting rights to fixing our broken education system to increasing access to affordable health care, Marco is dedicated to making Arizona a state that works for _all_ people.
**But it won't be easy. He's running against a Trump-backed Republican – and she cares more about pushing her extremist agenda than fixing the problems of our state. Simply put, she's the exact _opposite_ of my son.**

That's why I'm reaching out to you today. Even though Marco fights day after day to make Arizona's promise a reality for everyone, he has many more fights ahead of him - especially in the months leading up to this election. And while our family has plenty of love and support to go around, he's counting on grassroots folks like you to help power this campaign to victory.

**Last time he called, he mentioned he was falling a few thousand dollars short of his first MAJOR end-of-month goal****–**** a goal that determines the next steps for his entire campaign ****–**** and I don't want to let him down.** **So I wanted to reach out on his behalf and humbly ask:[Friend, will you please give $5 or more today so we can elect Marco as our next governor and build a state that works for all people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41230669/327889994/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk431-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDFhYjlmZS1kZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ua1vhnAbQEVlPGM7mbzJ_oxgd-IS4x7nrLOQnytzCQo=)**

**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41230675/327890000/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk431-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDFhYjlmZS1kZDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ua1vhnAbQEVlPGM7mbzJ_oxgd-IS4x7nrLOQnytzCQo=) Thank you so much.

subject: Future generations are counting on your response
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsN89vWH6N

My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the associate vice president of
national donor outreach at Hillsdale College. It's my
responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like you!) to
support Hillsdale.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osN89vWH6N

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

Can you do me a favor?

Please take time right now to review and
complete Hillsdale College's RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY
Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey.

My name is Bill Gray, and I'm the associate
vice president of national donor outreach at Hillsdale College.
It's my responsibility to invite like-minded conservatives (like
you!) to support Hillsdale.

I don't use the word "battle" lightly, but
with the stakes so high one must be blunt.

It's clear to me that we are in a fight for
the future of our nation-a fight against progressives who are
targeting our youngest citizens. These so-called "progressives"
seek to undermine traditional patriotism and ultimately transform
American government and society.

The New York Times' recent "1619 Project" is
the prime example of this effort to inject into the minds of our
youngest citizens a biased distortion of our nation's history.

If you haven't heard, the "1619 Project"
places the founding of America in 1619, when the first slave
arrived in Jamestown, rather than in 1776 when the Declaration of
Independence proclaimed that "all men are created equal" and
endowed by God with "unalienable rights." "Our democracy's
founding ideals," the "1619 Project" proclaims, "were false when
they were written."

Outrageous!

The New York Times' stated goal with the
"1619 Project" is to influence the curricula of K-12 schools
nationwide. They teach young people that slavery-not freedom-is
and always will be the central and defining idea of the American
experience, making our country irredeemable.

This project has garnered universal acclaim
from the news media. In fact, the lead essayist just won a
Pulitzer Prize! There are even talks about making the "1619
Project" into a feature film.

Given popular and widespread efforts like
these, we should not be surprised that there is a decreasing
sense of patriotism among younger Americans-and an increasing
tendency to embrace socialism and other liberty-destroying ideas.

Education has become a battleground, and
reviving a proper understanding of American history and
government, especially among younger citizens, must be our most
urgent priority.

Hillsdale College is at the forefront of this
effort.

We are actively engaging the Left on the
battlefield of education. And I need your help to make this
effort even more effective.

Hillsdale is America's most powerful advocate
for intelligent and informed patriotism-our best defense against
the loss of our liberty and insidious beliefs like socialism. We
do this on our Michigan campus, with an undergraduate and
graduate student body of over 1,500, and through education that
reaches and teaches millions of citizens each year on behalf of
liberty.

And in response to new efforts such as the
media-driven "1619 Project" that seek to turn the next generation
of citizens against the principles of the Declaration of
Independence and the U.S. Constitution, Hillsdale must expand
this critical work-especially in 2020.

As I said before, to fight and win this
battle, Hillsdale needs your help right away.

The FIRST step I need you to take right now
is to complete the RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY! Three-Point
National Battle Plan Survey. This national project seeks to make
it clear that people in your state and nationwide still revere
our founding principles of liberty, and refuse to let them be
corrupted by those who hold America in contempt.

As The New York Times' efforts make clear,
powerful forces vehemently oppose this view of America, and their
assault on our glorious history is taking place before our very
eyes.

Our ongoing response, rooted in genuine
learning, and proven to reach millions of citizens, must be
escalated as quickly as possible.

And if, upon completing your Battle Plan, you
feel a strong connection to Hillsdale's work, then I urge you to
please consider including a generous tax-deductible gift in
support of expanding these efforts on behalf of liberty.

Based on the costs of Hillsdale's multiple
educational programs-which I will outline for you shortly-it has
been determined that to fully implement this RECLAIM AMERICA'S
HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey for maximum
impact, Hillsdale College must raise at least $1,016,700 within
the next month.

And unlike most colleges and universities
that rely on federal funding and subsidies, EVERY PENNY of
funding for Hillsdale's educational outreach comes from the
voluntary support of intelligent patriots like you.

This is because Hillsdale College refuses
EVEN ONE PENNY of state or federal taxpayer funding-even
indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

That's so important, I need to say it
again-Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government
funding!

In this way, Hillsdale remains truly
independent, avoiding unconstitutional regulations that would
violate the College's educational mission.

Hillsdale has built national support from
hundreds of thousands of citizens. These intelligent patriots
know that liberty in America is in trouble thanks to progressive
control of our schools and institutions. And these citizens are
determined to preserve our liberty-as I believe you are.

These supporters give what they can, when
they can-gifts of $25 or $50 or more, sometimes much more
… because they understand that every dollar given goes to
reaching and teaching millions of people-including our nation's
youth-with genuine learning about liberty and the Constitution.

The gift you choose to give today will
determine whether Hillsdale can activate each component of the
RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan
Survey.

And this entire plan is tied to Hillsdale's
proven programs and publications that are educating millions of
Americans right now. Here are the key aspects of Hillsdale's plan
for your review and feedback:

BATTLE PLAN POINT #1: Identify the Critical
Concerns of Everyday Americans

I mentioned that our network of supporters
that is hundreds of thousands of patriots strong-such a broad
base of support gives us invaluable public-opinion data on what
Americans are MOST concerned about given the current state of our
nation. We are always eager to add new perspectives (like yours)
that can make our work the most relevant and timely possible.

Your participation today will allow Hillsdale
to strengthen our educational outreach efforts by targeting them
where they're needed most, on the areas of concern that matter
most to the American people.

You were selected to be part of this effort
based on your record of involvement in causes that strengthen
America, AND because of Hillsdale's confidence that you will
respond quickly and honestly, lending your voice to our efforts
to restore the Constitution.

I'm counting on and very much looking forward
to your survey response!

BATTLE PLAN POINT #2: Counter Progressive
Teaching in America's Schools

In this section we dig deep into Hillsdale's
proven educational outreach, and give you a sense of how we lead
important conversations surrounding America's history and
founding principles-AND ask what YOU think about these efforts.

And make no mistake-Hillsdale is uniquely
qualified to drive this effort.

Did you know that Hillsdale is one of only a
few American colleges and universities that requires each
student, regardless of major, to complete a one-semester course
on the Constitution?

This fact has earned the support of so many
Americans who did not attend the College, and who have never even
set foot on our campus-they understand that what we teach in our
classrooms radiates all over America. Is this important to you?

In 2012, Hillsdale began offering online
courses free of charge, because we see it as an effective way
promote intelligent patriotism and civic virtue. We market the
courses on social media and online to reach large audiences,
especially younger Americans. The response has been
tremendous-over 2.3 million citizens have taken one or more of
our online courses.

Do you think this is an effective means of
reaching and teaching millions of Americans on behalf of liberty?

We even have an online course that directly
counters The New York Times' "1619 Project." This free course is
called "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope" and presents an
unbiased and complete account of America's past.

To me this is a great example of why these
free courses are needed: They safeguard the country, through
education, against the damage to liberty inflicted by the Left.

And what do you think about sending a free
monthly digest of liberty, to millions of people?

This newsletter is called Imprimis, and it
features speeches delivered at Hillsdale events by prominent
scholars, journalists, and policymakers, focused on political,
economic, historic, and cultural topics from a constitutional
viewpoint. Imprimis is America's most widely-circulated
publication in support of liberty, reaching more households and
businesses than either the Wall Street Journal or the "fake news"
New York Times.

Issues covering topics such as "Rediscovering
the Wisdom of American History" and "Shall We Defend our Common
History?" set Imprimis apart. The publication is as a powerful
counterbalance to the biased media outlets that pursue narrow,
ideologically driven distortions of history. (If you're not yet
an Imprimis subscriber, we'll be happy to sign you up as soon as
we hear from you.)

BATTLE PLAN POINT #3: Restore Excellence to
K-12 Schools

In this section we explore how Hillsdale
College is reshaping American K-12 education, especially through
our Barney Charter School Initiative, which helps launch and
guide classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, teaching
thousands of K-12 students.

These schools all have a strong civics
curriculum. The curriculum provides young Americans with a solid
grounding in our nation's history, our limited constitutional
government, and economics. In doing so, Hillsdale provides
communities with a practical model of how schools can best serve
students and the country.

Sustained by our supporters, Hillsdale's
Barney Charter School Initiative has assisted in the founding of
more than 20 classical K-12 charter schools in 11 states, with
approximately 12,000 students enrolled. And more of these K-12
schools are opening each year.

Do you support this effort to set a new
standard for K-12 education and give young Americans a proper
education?

Hillsdale also launched a new initiative to
send pocket Constitutions to thousands of elementary and junior
high schools. We ship them with a promise to send as many pocket
Constitutions as their schools need.

The response has been astounding. We've now
sent out more than 500,000 pocket Constitutions across the
country, and we receive more requests every week. Does this
effort to restore the Constitution to K-12 schools sound like a
good idea to you?

As you select your answers, I believe you
will find that Hillsdale's educational outreach is a powerful way
to confront and ultimately overcome the progressive forces that
seek to instill in young people the ruinous idea that America
stands for slavery, not freedom.

I know you love this country, and I hope you
will partner with Hillsdale in defending America through
education-education aimed at citizens of all ages nationwide.

The first step is getting your thoughts on
our RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY Three-Point National Battle Plan
Survey.

With your response you will represent your
state as part of a major sampling of citizen opinion that can
help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views and
concerns of mainstream Americans-views that we can make available
to policymakers and opinion leaders when we discuss the Left's
agenda, and use to strengthen our educational outreach efforts.

What Hillsdale needs now is YOU-your
thoughtful input on the work we're doing, and your generous
support to expand our work. So please complete the Battle Plan
Survey today.

When you give to Hillsdale and share your
opinions, you will join a dedicated and growing team of
intelligent patriots, who always step up when the time comes to
defend America against the progressives' attack on American
history and liberty.

Thank you for your commitment to liberty in
America.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Assoc. Vice President of National Donor
Outreach
Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

P.S. We are in a battle for the future of
America, because the Left is determined to transform our country
… by fundamentally changing how history is taught to young
people. Education is the battlefield, and Hillsdale College
urgently needs you standing with us to support and sustain our
efforts. With your help, we can continue to reach and teach
millions of citizens of all ages, especially the youngest
Americans, with the principles of liberty underlying the
Constitution.

Please complete RECLAIM AMERICA'S HISTORY!
Three-Point National Battle Plan Survey to shape Hillsdale
College's defense of America against the progressive assault on
history. Your response is needed within five days so we can
finalize plans to expand our educational outreach on behalf of
liberty.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Derek, This month, Kevin McCarthy raised nearly $10 million in just a few hours at the Trump Hotel in D.C. This influx of donations came from over 50 corporate PACs and billionaires with plans to take over the House and own a piece of Kevin McCarthy. **The right-wing business establishment is fully invested in making Kevin McCarthy the next Speaker of the House. That must never happen. And the money they are spending is dangerous for our Democratic Majority.** At the same time, Republicans are laying the groundwork to remove Adam from his committees in retaliation for holding Donald Trump to account for his serial abuses of power — if they take back the House. Derek, there has never been a question of who Adam fights for — **_it will always be you._** And it will always be our democracy. That’s why your support is truly so important. Your $3, $10, and $15 donations help Adam fight back against right-wing misinformation, and that support will be absolutely crucial to keeping our House Majority. clean_body: | Derek, This month, Kevin McCarthy raised nearly $10 million in just a few hours at the Trump Hotel in D.C. This influx of donations came from over 50 corporate PACs and billionaires with plans to take over the House and own a piece of Kevin McCarthy. The right-wing business establishment is fully invested in making Kevin McCarthy the next Speaker of the House. That must never happen. And the money they are spending is dangerous for our Democratic Majority. At the same time, Republicans are laying the groundwork to remove Adam from his committees in retaliation for holding Donald Trump to account for his serial abuses of power — if they take back the House. Derek, there has never been a question of who Adam fights for — it will always be you. And it will always be our democracy. That’s why your support is truly so important. Your $3, $10, and $15 donations help Adam fight back against right-wing misinformation, and that support will be absolutely crucial to keeping our House Majority. So we need to kickstart our grassroots momentum before midnight tomorrow. Kevin McCarthy must not become the next Speaker of the House. With our first end-of-month deadline 24 hours away, can you pitch in $10 right now to fuel Adam’s work protecting and expanding our House Majority? To learn more, please visit | Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress Liz Mathis for Congress PO Box 2370 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States If you'd only like to receive our most important email updates, you may to request fewer emails from Liz's campaign. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

[We are powering forward like never before. As the midterms approach, meeting our end of the month fundraising goals is so important. Are you able to help?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41234032/327903305/-1390744932?amount=25&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220130_1_4&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZlNWJmOS1lNDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3cHzLZaPJaAngB8b7CR0wV-JI63gf-YCuXDDCYvDHs=)

Check out Mark’s email below, thanks!

**_–Begin forwarded message–_**
_A lot_ happened in Washington this past month. When voting rights were at stake, we had to bear witness as our elected officials prioritized partisanship and political gain over their constituents. Barriers to the voting booth are not ancient history. The 24th Amendment, ratified in 1964, abolished the use of the poll tax as a precondition for voting in federal elections. Two years later in 1966, state level polling taxes were banned.

It’s obvious, America deserves more Senators who are interested in listening to their constituents and fighting for the people. This is why I am running for U.S. Senate.

[I won’t stand by as state governments across the country restrict access to the ballot, but I can’t win this race alone! I’m counting on your help to build up this campaign and bring progress to Washington. Please, will you chip in $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41234033/327903306/-1390744932?amount=25&refcode=MH_EM_FR_1MO_220130_1_4&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTZlNWJmOS1lNDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3cHzLZaPJaAngB8b7CR0wV-JI63gf-YCuXDDCYvDHs=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

**_Jerry Moran is one of the so-called “leaders” who (time and time again) chooses re-election over Kansans – and frankly, we’re tired of seeing it._** I will not be a puppet to a president who incited a riot at the nation’s capitol. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

name: PragerU
subject: Biased fact-checker strikes PragerU
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-6iTkjxaP5piqgUppMOGQ)[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._nkMMDqNiNFDwQ)Dear Fellow Conservative, Big Tech's campaign to silence PragerU never sleeps. Recently, video hosting company JW Player refused to renew our contract to host videos-on PragerU's own website! Later, we found out who was responsible for JW Player dropping PragerU as a client...online "fact-checker" NewsGuard. NewsGuard calls itself "The Internet Trust Tool." It supposedly rates news websites for credibility and transparency. Even though PragerU is an educational nonprofit-not a news website-NewsGuard rated us anyway! [Give Today to Help STOP Fact-Checkers from Censoring PragerU!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)[**Donate to help PragerU fight Big Tech censorship!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cof6al2IQ7FDu7Q)**PragerU's scorecard (57 points out of 100) warning viewers to "proceed with caution":**[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Corporations, social media companies-even libraries-handsomely pay these third-party online nannies to label anything the left disagrees with as "fake news." Hiding behind fact-checkers, they then deplatform or censor organizations like PragerU...taking zero responsibility for censorship! Upon learning of our abysmal rating that led to JW Player dropping PragerU as a client, PragerU CEO Marissa Streit contacted NewsGuard. ** _"I am writing today to bring your attention to an urgent matter that I assume is a mistake by NewsGuard. Sadly, this mistake is damaging PragerU's reputation and costing our nonprofit millions of dollars."_****-Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO** Marissa spoke with NewsGuard executive Eric Effron. He assured her that NewsGuard is unbiased and protects Americans from disinformation. Curiously, Eric didn't seem to know much about PragerU (even though NewsGuard had already given us a bad rating). Over the next month, NewsGuard asked PragerU questions under the guise of improving our score. NewsGuard inquired about everything from why we don't publish our donors' names (which we would NEVER do) to our perspectives on COVID-19 and Planned Parenthood. Regardless of the facts and sources PragerU provided, our score wasn't changed. They never intended to be fair. Clearly, NewsGuard simply thinks our values and ideas shouldn't exist online. ** _"The chain of emails we've exchanged with you and your team has exposed your organization for what it is-an online media bully run by wealthy left-wing activists pushing their agenda."_****-Marissa Streit, PragerU CEO** This reality is...fact-checkers like NewsGuard are the political elite's tool for censorship. Funded by giant corporations protecting their power and bottom lines, these self-appointed "Arbiters of Truth" are determining what is true and what is false. **Is this the America you want to live in?**[**Donate to help PragerU fight Big Tech censorship!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._GJ8x6uIlA)**PragerU is exposing NewsGuard and other fact-checkers for what they are...authoritarian oligarchs who monetized censorship to keep YOU from learning the facts and thinking for YOURSELF.** PragerU needs your support to educate millions of young people about what's really at stake-Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. At the same time, PragerU must diversify our platforms and develop alternative technologies to ensure Big Tech tyrants can't silence patriotic voices. This is a time consuming and expensive endeavor! We need our loyal supporters to stand by us and give generously. We cannot do this alone. [Please give today to keep our videos reaching and changing millions of young minds!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._-CdRnDEgHE6ZPTA) Your PragerU Team[**Donate now**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-w)| |
---
Copyright © 2021 PragerU
All rights reserved.
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDMwLTUzNTdiZmQyOWQwNTRmMjBhMWJkMGU5MzQ5NmNmYzVkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/wy3zVPJzhj6nv_qXOKG0KQ) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Pfaff for Congress
subject: sadly:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail

You see, we’re running out of time to hit our January fundraising goal (the deadline is midnight TOMORROW), and Kate is getting worried. = Let us explain just why this goal is critically important: Democrats know we’re up for a tough election fight in this year’s midterms. That’s just how it goes when there’s a Democrat in the White House. Up and down the ballot, across the country, we’re going into this November at a disadvantage. And here in North Carolina, Republican legislative leaders are gerrymandering their way into holding legislative power for the next decade — they’ve drawn district lines to make it impossible for Democrats to win. Roy is committed to doing the work to elect Democrats in our state, and that work is ONLY possible if we have the resources to act. name: OH Map Alert via OhioDems.org
subject: Let's talk about the maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Need proof that Ohio Republicans are trying to gerrymander their way into winning?

**FIRST:** The Ohio Supreme Court struck down the first round of maps drawn by the Republican-led redistricting commission -- maps that would have given Republicans a **62-37 advantage in the House and a 23-10 advantage in the Senate.** So the Ohio Supreme Court ordered the redistricting commission to redraw the maps to be indicative of how Ohioans vote.

**THEN:** The redistricting commission met to redraw the maps -- but the replacement maps aren't any better. These maps give Republicans a **57-42 advantage in the House and a 20-13 advantage in the Senate.**

**BUT:** It only gets worse under these new maps. In the newly drawn maps, 12/42 Democratic-leaning House seats and 4/13 Democratic-leaning Senate seats give Democrats **advantages of 3% or less.** Only one Republican-leaning Senate district has an advantage of 3%, and no Republican-leaning House districts do.

**We can't make it any more clear:** Ohio Republicans don't care about giving everyday Ohioans a voice; they care about winning and pushing an agenda that hurts the middle class. We can't let these new maps pass -- and we'll take it back to court if we have to.

[**That makes tomorrow's end-of-month fundraising deadline even more important. Will you help us close our fundraising gap with a donation of $5 or more right now? Every dollar helps us fight for fair maps in Ohio.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41234596/327906517/344735739?refcode=em22_220130_eom4_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220130_eom4_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNhZDlhZC1lNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zsr1sjElUmepgU1rn6NzleZSXkfvXbY_tr-ka94HoSg=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[Chip in $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41234597/327906519/344735739?refcode=em22_220130_eom4_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220130_eom4_fndd_gq_act___odp_ettx&utm_medium=email&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWNhZDlhZC1lNTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zsr1sjElUmepgU1rn6NzleZSXkfvXbY_tr-ka94HoSg=)**

clean_body: | Need proof that Ohio Republicans are trying to gerrymander their way into winning? FIRST: The Ohio Supreme Court struck down the first round of maps drawn by the Republican-led redistricting commission -- maps that would have given Republicans a 62-37 advantage in the House and a 23-10 advantage in the Senate. So the Ohio Supreme Court ordered the redistricting commission to redraw the maps to be indicative of how Ohioans vote. THEN: The redistricting commission met to redraw the maps -- but the replacement maps aren't any better. These maps give Republicans a 57-42 advantage in the House and a 20-13 advantage in the Senate. BUT: It only gets worse under these new maps. In the newly drawn maps, 12/42 Democratic-leaning House seats and 4/13 Democratic-leaning Senate seats give Democrats advantages of 3% or less. Only one Republican-leaning Senate district has an advantage of 3%, and no Republican-leaning House districts do. We can't make it any more clear: Ohio Republicans don't care about giving everyday Ohioans a voice; they care about winning and pushing an agenda that hurts the middle class. We can't let these new maps pass -- and we'll take it back to court if we have to. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = \-- Team ODP The Ohio Democratic Party is working year-round to elect Democrats who will fight for working families all over the Buckeye State. name: Nina Turner
subject: A long email about our campaign:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
When we ask ourselves what this campaign is about, the answer is very simple.
#

Hello Somebody!
When we ask ourselves what this campaign is about, the answer is very simple.
We want a health care system that is not commodified, and where folks don’t die because they’ve got to ration out their insulin. That’s it and that’s all.
We need to have some truth and reconciliation about the ravages of racism in the United States of America. That’s it and that’s all.
We want clean water, clean air, and clean food. We must take care of Mother Earth right now. That’s it and that’s all.
We need our young people to be able to go to college without graduating with crippling amounts of student debt. That's it and that's all.
We want to finally have a justice system that doesn’t gun down Black folks in their homes. We are going to clean up this criminal injustice system. That's it and that's all.
We must understand that there are disparities within the disparities: if you are Black, if you are brown, if you are Indigenous, and if you are poor, this system is rigged — it is rotten to the core. And we’re going to unrig it. That’s it and that’s all.
We are being tested right now for whether or not we’ve got enough courage, enough hope, and enough commitment to do what is necessary in this moment.
I’m running to improve the quality of life for working people in Cleveland and across the country. It’s not enough to simply acknowledge their struggles – _it’s time we also do something about it._
**Every donation made today will help us win this race and build a Congress that works for everyday people. Can I count on you to chip in?**
**[Please make a contribution to our campaign today. Each and every donation, no matter how large or small, is an important statement of support for our 100% people-powered campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41234715/327907133/1798563261?refcode2=5f220252-e681-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220130-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjIyMDI1Mi1lNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DV37nNsl1GtIoBuPjD0BVP3ygrGiEaaN5UOTesfwrac=)**
We’ve got the energy, we’ve got the heart, and most importantly — we’ve got you. Now let’s go do this thing!
With these hands,
Nina Turner
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41234716/327907134/1798563261?refcode2=5f220252-e681-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220130-1-t1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjIyMDI1Mi1lNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DV37nNsl1GtIoBuPjD0BVP3ygrGiEaaN5UOTesfwrac=)**

* * *
Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
---
Nina Turner for Us
PO Box 91956
Cleveland, OH 44101
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but if you need to, [click here](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/282be333-e081-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/5f220252-e681-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjIyMDI1Mi1lNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DV37nNsl1GtIoBuPjD0BVP3ygrGiEaaN5UOTesfwrac=&id=113311558) to unsubscribe.

subject: Really?! 🙄
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter — Earlier this week, Governor DeSantis said that he refuses to legalize weed in Florida because he doesn’t like the “stench.” **Seems like Dictator Karen thinks he can ban anything that personally offends him — and he has the nerve to whine about cancel culture. 🙄** Luckily, we won’t have to put up with it much longer. We’ve got a candidate in this race who won’t let something as petty as a smell offend her and keep her from legalizing marijuana, ending unfair drug sentencing, and bringing something new to Florida. [**And today, you can help her do it by chipping in $10 before our January fundraising deadline. name: Patrick Clark, Keystone Progress
subject: Help us help voters today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Dear Friend,

Again and again, legislators in PA are trying to strip us of our voting rights. It's like they just can't stop themselves!

So, we have to stop them.

Just this week, Gov. Wolf had to veto a proposed gerrymandered congressional map. Since our lawmakers can't fairly draw district lines themselves, it's now up to the courts to do it — a perfect example of why we need to vote in progressive lawmakers AND judges.

We're out there in the fight to elevate ALL of our voices at the polls and to make sure every ballot is counted. We're working overtime to empower, organize, and mobilize Pennsylvanians.

As you know though, we're up against a lot and need your help today. We're also up against a critical deadline.

TOMORROW is the last day for us to fundraise this month, and we haven't met our goal. Please help us with a donation today.

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=013022&amount=10]

DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=013022&amount=50]
Whatever you can afford... [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/keystone-progress-now?refcode=013022]

Thank you for standing with us and for standing up for democracy.

Patrick Clark
Keystone Progress

body:
The stakes have never been higher.

| Peter,

I hate to bother you on a Sunday, so I’ll keep this quick: [_**can you chip in just $1 today to support my re-election campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41235654/327911703/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220130-ND-EM&amount=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTgyNmUyZi1lODgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPzwCK13bEuin9Roh0RuFB10Iw24u6M4hf4DvoVKNtQ=)

The stakes have never been higher. If Democrats lose control of the House in 2022, we lose all the progress we’ve made on crucial issues like jobs, infrastructure, and healthcare. What’s more, Pennsylvania will soon be implementing new congressional district maps based on the latest census, and I won’t sugarcoat it: we could be in real trouble.

I depend on grassroots donors like you, Peter, to keep me in office fighting for the families and workers of the greater Lehigh Valley and the entire nation.

If Democrats lose control of the House in 2022, we lose all the progress we’ve made on crucial issues like jobs, infrastructure, and healthcare. What’s more, Pennsylvania will soon be implementing new congressional district maps based on the latest census, and I won’t sugarcoat it: we could be in real trouble. I depend on grassroots donors like you, Peter, to keep me in office fighting for the families and workers of the greater Lehigh Valley and the entire nation. name: Eric Lynn
subject: My opponent’s shameful allies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Lynn for Congress
body:
Another one of the worst Members of Congress is supporting her https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-janeom2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-janeom2]Dear friends,
While Trump’s influence has affected all Republicans in Washington, there’s a collection of Members of Congress who are truly the worst of the worst.
Marjorie Taylor Green, Matt Gaetz, Lauren Boebert, and (my opponent’s newest endorser) Madison Cawthorn. That’s not a complete list, but you get the idea.
Madison Cawthorn was one of the biggest supporters of the January 6th Insurrection. Now, he’s helping Anna Paulina Luna in her campaign to flip our Congressional District.
We cannot let them win and represent our community. We cannot allow these extremists to strengthen their influence in Congress, and if Anna Paulina Luna wins, she’ll be just another member of their ultra-right-wing club. Given that she raised $500,000 during the last quarter, her campaign is a serious threat to our future.
Will you contribute today towards our January end-of-month goal to stop her and support our efforts? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-janeom2]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-janeom2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-janeom2]Anna Paulina Luna has aligned herself with the far-right politicians that use bigotry, racism, fear mongering, and violence as their core political ideology. She even claimed the 2020 election was rigged [https://www.cnn.com/2021/10/28/politics/gop-candidates-young-guns-big-lie/index.html] .
With your help, we won’t just defend FL-13 for Democrats, we’ll also fight back against the worst Members of Congress and bring sanity back to Washington.
Thank you,
Eric Lynn

It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

name: V. Demings [personal]
subject: why I'm running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools
| | |
---
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare.
So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate.
Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger.
So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win.
So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups.

It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida.
My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41236345/327915084/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDJlZWI5MC1lYTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=adP8fyuMTSVky3nmAjOvhDkFXJei770b_ULDiKpmYsE=)**
All the best,

Val Demings
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41236346/327915085/1804727444?refcode=jtk2276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDJlZWI5MC1lYTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=adP8fyuMTSVky3nmAjOvhDkFXJei770b_ULDiKpmYsE=) **Val Demings here:** I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement _and_ keep Florida red _permanently_. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? **[Click here to donate now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41236347/327915086/1804727444?refcode=jtk2276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDJlZWI5MC1lYTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=adP8fyuMTSVky3nmAjOvhDkFXJei770b_ULDiKpmYsE=)** If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, **[please click here to visit my campaign store.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41236348/327915087/-460395862?refcode=jtk2276-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDJlZWI5MC1lYTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=adP8fyuMTSVky3nmAjOvhDkFXJei770b_ULDiKpmYsE=&emci=89c3f536-8e7e-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=3d2eeb90-ea81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=20244100)** Thank you for your continued support. clean_body: Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools | | | I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, friend. It may not sound like much – but I've been working long hours in Congress to pass President Biden's agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I'm sitting with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I'm reflecting on this historic campaign – and I've decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes and worked at McDonald's. But my mom saw something special in me. She'd tell me I was destined for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: "Never tire, Val." I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader who understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country's need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother's voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I'm 2 points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control – and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It's critical that we win in Florida – and this race is tight right now, friend. I'm proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it's going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP's millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: I hate to ask this, but if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you donate $5 today? Here's the best link to contribute: = All the best, Val Demings | | = Val Demings here: I can’t thank you enough for fighting alongside me to flip Florida blue. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you’re reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. While other candidates are counting on wealthy donors and fancy fundraisers, we’re building this campaign with people power. I’m so grateful for everyone who has pitched in to help us meet our end of month goal. **That’s why I’m taking the time to personally call some of our grassroots donors** and thank them for their support before tomorrow’s big deadline. name: Team Bass
subject: Long way to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Team —

We have good news and bad news. Our campaign set a goal of raising $25,000 before Monday's end-of-month deadline. The good news is we've seen a surge in online fundraising in the past few days. Take a look:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41237006/327918754/-772923769?ms=em22_220130_eom4_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&refcode=em22_220130_eom4_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&source=em22_220130_eom4_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220130_eom4_fndd_gq_act___TB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=iPEbqxVV0n4S6evBTqRm9L08PhAlsBSqwpwHIyD%2Bu9IsIqjRfVuV4HiAVapwYhuGC8PSRSdLnv%2FH4eYw5LMk6Nx3B9thZQ9QSOk3W5F%2FTpISmPh1oKNg72urE%2BhJs4gc%2BcnIWOsIqYq%2BO%2F8f7ToLsA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmQwNzUwZi1lZTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MEoLFK9PWUy3xXca9Wal1AE-qPDmJKkb93c0KVCogy0=&emci=dd687e4f-907f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=8bd0750f-ee81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=2429742)
---
But here's the bad news: even though we've seen an uptick in fundraising, we still have a long way to go to prepare for an expensive race.

Right now, Karen is the only candidate with a homelessness policy that addresses the full spectrum of unique challenges facing our city. It's important Angelenos know Karen has the plans and the experience to make L.A. a city that works for everyone.

**[We can't let our foot off the gas on this campaign when the future of our city is on the line. Will you chip in to help us close the gap and hit our $25,000 goal? name: James Carville
subject: BIG Supreme Court news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by SMP, www
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41237262/327919524/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2QwNzUwZi1lZTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ein32xqNkZi5UPeGGHZfPtfwPkzq8Y9m7-pxpySO1Q=)
Hey there — James Carville here. I’m reaching out today on behalf of my friends at Defend the Senate. They are hard at work defending our vulnerable incumbent Senators up for re-election this year and trying to flip a few Republican held seats in order to expand our majority. And their mission just got a LOT more important. Let me explain. **This month, Supreme Court Justice Breyer announced that he was retiring from the Court, creating a liberal vacancy on the conservative bench.** Since Mitch McConnell nuked the filibuster to ram through Trump’s Supreme Court nominees, that means we only need 50 Democratic Senators to vote together to confirm President Biden’s nominee. So we have an opportunity we cannot waste to confirm a justice to the Supreme Court who will be a champion for voting rights, reproductive rights, health care access, and so much more. But here’s the thing, it’s not just enough to confirm this justice. We must also remain focused on our mission to defend and expand our Senate majority. clean_body: | = Hey there — James Carville here. I’m reaching out today on behalf of my friends at Defend the Senate. They are hard at work defending our vulnerable incumbent Senators up for re-election this year and trying to flip a few Republican held seats in order to expand our majority. And their mission just got a LOT more important. Let me explain. This month, Supreme Court Justice Breyer announced that he was retiring from the Court, creating a liberal vacancy on the conservative bench. Since Mitch McConnell nuked the filibuster to ram through Trump’s Supreme Court nominees, that means we only need 50 Democratic Senators to vote together to confirm President Biden’s nominee. So we have an opportunity we cannot waste to confirm a justice to the Supreme Court who will be a champion for voting rights, reproductive rights, health care access, and so much more. But here’s the thing, it’s not just enough to confirm this justice. We must also remain focused on our mission to defend and expand our Senate majority. If we lose our slim 50 seat majority in the Senate Mitch McConnell will block us from confirming any more judges. So that’s why I’m reaching out today. I know it’s a lot to ask, but if you have anything you can spare I know my friends at Defend the Senate would appreciate any help you can give before the deadline. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you in advance for pitching in, especially right now. James Carville Paid for by SMP, www.SenateMajority.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. SMP 700 13th St NW Suite 800 Washington, DC 20005 United States

body:

---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zppuie8o7o72lfo4rjvgr7ou5psg6o8lp6g09t3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clhm0oj0slh2bs)

body:
Democrats across Delaware are looking toward LBR for leadership.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41238569/327925562/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220130eom4_eom_tlbr_actives_4_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjJjNGVkNS1mMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lAVGJykcdnCg1V9Q4mL74MGnZZ1d_QFMtilMe2FITPQ=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41238570/327925563/-1781085314?refcode=EM_FR_220130eom4_eom_tlbr_actives_4_ng_na_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjJjNGVkNS1mMTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lAVGJykcdnCg1V9Q4mL74MGnZZ1d_QFMtilMe2FITPQ=) Democrats across Delaware are relying on LBR to get out the vote in the close state house districts.

This year, LBR is on top of the ticket in Delaware, so the buck stops with us when it comes to turning out voters.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41238745/327926212/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTQ2MjU2MS1mMjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8sdg8S6s6iXQKfSmUMVO_qZfABLjjF8f3IM1I4YYg1w=)

Peter – I understand that Democrats are tired. We’ve been fighting for democracy and our progressive principles for so long.

We endured President Trump’s long campaign of lies and racism, a painful Election Day, 4 years of his presidency, and even a violent insurrection attempt on our Capitol.

When I first won this seat for Congress in 2012, I never imagined the state of our country and democracy would fall so far.

But my whole life I have been committed to public service and progressive policy – from working as a teacher to being elected to a school board and now as a Congressman.

_And I’m not going to stop now._

**What about you, Peter?**

[**If you’re with me in the fight for our nation during this crucial midterm year, will you consider chipping in just $3 to help me fight for progress? name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I will tell you why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Do you have a minute?
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41238858/327926631/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk545-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODg3OTFmMS1mMjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYPHHOvQLGPgc68FbFB-DvZoO8QsAfjDGhUD5fovu-w=)
Hi Peter, it's Abby. Do you have a minute? I'm emailing you to talk about why my race to defeat Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is so critical. You see, if we flip Iowa blue, Democrats will be virtually _guaranteed_ to maintain Senate control – and right now, Sen. Grassley has never been more vulnerable: **He's facing record-high disapproval ratings.**
**[The Senate is split 50-50, so winning in Iowa could be the one race that keeps the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's hands. That's why I'm reaching out to you ahead of my first end-of-month fundraising deadline. We have the momentum, but we need grassroots resources to win: Can you donate $5 right now to defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41238859/327926632/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk545-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODg3OTFmMS1mMjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BYPHHOvQLGPgc68FbFB-DvZoO8QsAfjDGhUD5fovu-w=)**
Sen. Grassley hasn't seen warning signs like this before, and the GOP knows it too. That's why the Senate Republican campaign arm has already attacked me, and it's why Trump held a massive MAGA rally in Des Moines to endorse Sen. Grassley. I'm more than ready to take on Grassley, McConnell, Trump and the rest of the GOP establishment – _bullies don't scare me. _

**But Republicans across the nation will be spending MILLIONS to take back the Senate and stop Democratic challengers like me. So, I'm going to need grassroots supporters like you to get this campaign across the finish line – $10, $20, $50 at a time.**

Team, In a rare bipartisan move, both Republicans and Democrats are coming together and making a big statement: **no member of Congress should be able to own or trade individual stocks.** As lawmakers, members of Congress have access to behind-the-scenes information weeks and months before it hits newsstands, giving them ample time to sell off or buy up in their own interests. We saw this happen right before our own eyes at the dawn of the pandemic. **They’re using Congressional knowledge to make themselves richer and line their wallet.** Even though there may be legislation on the books to prevent this, recent investigations have shown that these laws have been broken _hundreds of times_ , by members of **BOTH** parties.**Everyone is turning a blind eye to what’s happening.** In classic fashion, party leadership is standing in the way of a simple fix to prevent our Representatives from using insider knowledge to make themselves richer. [**If you believe that members of Congress have no right to turn a quick buck off their jobs, add your name and become a citizen co-sponsor on our latest petition here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41238891/327926831/-485486364?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY5ZTRhNS1mMzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WBWtJYZ5JzfiBmCcnIY2dBbpVhehRQ-bpBAt4T6jXek=&emci=973cccb4-4880-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=aff9e4a5-f381-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=10203249) **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41238892/327926832/-485486364?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY5ZTRhNS1mMzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WBWtJYZ5JzfiBmCcnIY2dBbpVhehRQ-bpBAt4T6jXek=&emci=973cccb4-4880-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=aff9e4a5-f381-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=10203249)** **Our representatives, nor their staff or their families, should be trading in their duty to the country for cold hard cash. **It’s a clear conflict of interest, and it’s eroding our trust in the people we elect to lead. Career politicians are getting rich off the same industries they are supposed to regulate. Portfolios are getting fatter while families can’t put food on the table. Enough is enough. It’s time to go beyond draining the swamp...it’s time to make sure politicians aren’t able to fill their wallets again. [**Sign up, become a citizen co-sponsor, and call on House leadership to allow a vote on stopping representatives from trading stocks.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41238893/327926833/-485486364?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY5ZTRhNS1mMzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WBWtJYZ5JzfiBmCcnIY2dBbpVhehRQ-bpBAt4T6jXek=&emci=973cccb4-4880-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=aff9e4a5-f381-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=10203249) **[SIGN ON HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41238894/327926834/-485486364?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZmY5ZTRhNS1mMzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WBWtJYZ5JzfiBmCcnIY2dBbpVhehRQ-bpBAt4T6jXek=&emci=973cccb4-4880-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=aff9e4a5-f381-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=10203249)** Thank you, Team Eugene

clean_body: Join the bipartisan movement today. | | Team, In a rare bipartisan move, both Republicans and Democrats are coming together and making a big statement: no member of Congress should be able to own or trade individual stocks. As lawmakers, members of Congress have access to behind-the-scenes information weeks and months before it hits newsstands, giving them ample time to sell off or buy up in their own interests. We saw this happen right before our own eyes at the dawn of the pandemic. They’re using Congressional knowledge to make themselves richer and line their wallet. Even though there may be legislation on the books to prevent this, recent investigations have shown that these laws have been broken hundreds of times , by members of BOTH parties.Everyone is turning a blind eye to what’s happening. In classic fashion, party leadership is standing in the way of a simple fix to prevent our Representatives from using insider knowledge to make themselves richer. Our representatives, nor their staff or their families, should be trading in their duty to the country for cold hard cash. It’s a clear conflict of interest, and it’s eroding our trust in the people we elect to lead. Career politicians are getting rich off the same industries they are supposed to regulate. Portfolios are getting fatter while families can’t put food on the table. Enough is enough. It’s time to go beyond draining the swamp...it’s time to make sure politicians aren’t able to fill their wallets again. Thank you, Team Eugene ** | | Eugene DePasquale is a fighter with a reputation for being tough but fair. He gets results and will work with anyone, regardless of party, to deliver for the people of Pennsylvania. As Auditor General, he helped protect children from abuse, demanded thousands of untested rape kits be processed, exposed abuse in nursing homes, and saved taxpayers millions by shining a light on government waste, fraud, and abuse. He’s dedicated to reforming Washington and focusing on issues most important to Pennsylvanians—not the special interests. = ** PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 Follow Eugene on social media for campaign updates: DePasquale for PA 10 P.O. body:

Monday, January 31st is the LAST DAY to register to vote or update your voter registration information ahead of the March 1st primary. Click the link below to confirm your voter registration information!
Check your voter registration [https://www.texasdemocrats.org/are-you-registered-to-vote/]Early voting for the March 1st primary is only two weeks away!
