name: Nan Whaley
subject: Will you join me in this fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
For too long, corrupt politicians in Columbus have prioritized their special interest allies over their constituents. It’s time we start investing in our communities first.

Team,
At an event a few weeks ago in Findlay, Ohio, I heard one big concern: Ohio is a great place to live, but people keep leaving.
People just aren’t seeing enough good-paying jobs and opportunities for mobility to stick around. Meanwhile, costs are going up and our state leaders seem to have forgotten about us.
For too long, corrupt politicians in Columbus have prioritized their special interest allies over their constituents. It’s time we start investing in our communities first.
**[I’m ready to invest in Ohio’s future, so I’m asking you to invest in me: Become a Founding 2022 Donor with your donation of any amount before our reporting deadline tomorrow.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41239169/327927943/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220130_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWMyYjcwNC1mNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiD0-H7xzUqFvR9u_wMFujMsdG8DF27InkiMhTNbdn8=)**
I fell in love with Ohio when I first moved here for college, and it’s felt like home ever since. Back then, Ohio was where people moved to find opportunities. Now, people worry about losing out if they stay here. That needs to change.
I’m in this race because I want to make sure that no Ohioan feels forgotten. I’m fighting for better paying jobs. I’m fighting for access to child care. I’m fighting to make sure there are new opportunities in the town next door, not across the country. I’m fighting for people like you, and the millions of others who need our help.
**[Will you join me in this fight? Together, we can once again make Ohio a land of opportunity, but a stronger Ohio is only possible with supporters like you on my team. Pitch in $5 before tomorrow’s deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41239170/327927944/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220130_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWMyYjcwNC1mNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiD0-H7xzUqFvR9u_wMFujMsdG8DF27InkiMhTNbdn8=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41239171/327927945/399792850?refcode=nw_em_220130_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWMyYjcwNC1mNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiD0-H7xzUqFvR9u_wMFujMsdG8DF27InkiMhTNbdn8=)****

name: Claire Devine
subject: I am talking with Doug tomorrow about our January deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doug White for Congress
body:
Hi Friends,
I work for Doug White because I think he is the best candidate to represent Central Washington in Congress. For too long, the things that can make a real impact for working families have been neglected. As a 4th generation farmer who grew up in Yakima, Doug knows what families need and will fight every day for real solutions.
But one of the keys to winning this race is building early support to show we will have the resources to tell Doug’s story to voters later this year. On this front, we can’t afford to fall behind.
Tomorrow at midnight is our first monthly deadline of the election year, which makes it especially important. I am meeting with Doug on Monday morning to go over the numbers, and I want to give him some good news. Right now we are $5,000 short of our online fundraising goal for January and I was hoping you could help us get closer to our goal.
Whatever you can give will be a big boost. If you can chip in $5, $50, or $500, it will mean a lot in helping us get closer to our monthly goal and make sure we have what is needed to win this race. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dougwhiteem?refcode=1-30-2022]
Thank you for your consideration. With your help, Doug can do it.
Claire Devine

Paid for by Doug White for Congress

Doug White for Congress
PO Box 9674
Yakima, WA 98909
United States

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Just 2 days left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
It’s time! We are quickly approaching the end of the first month of the year. **Because we did so well in the holidays, we have to work extra hard to catch up now and reach our fundraising goal for this month.** It’s extremely important that we reach every finance goal we set from here to our primary, because our political, field, and communications programs are designed with those resources in mind. **If we don’t reach our goals, we’ll be forced to cut corners on our ground game, and we don’t want that to happen. **
Here’s a little snapshot of what our month has looked like:
**As you can see, we got off to a slow start. We need to make up for that lost time, and quickly.** That’s where you come in. You may open and read our emails, but haven’t donated yet. If you’ve been waiting for a time when your donation will be impactful, this is it. **Our grassroots supporters always come through for us, and I have faith that this time will be no different. **
**[Will you invest in my campaign today and be one of the donors who helps us reach our goal? Every single dollar helps so any amount you can donate will get us that much closer to winning this race!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41239209/327928716/195484132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I4Njc3MS1mNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aq0CNj_6_71Tx-M0q61OVQZceVAYXuCIIBvBXqLV9tk=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41239216/327928725/952264009?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I4Njc3MS1mNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aq0CNj_6_71Tx-M0q61OVQZceVAYXuCIIBvBXqLV9tk=)**
**I’m counting on donations from supporters like you who know how important our race is.** There are only so many campaigns with a decent shot at flipping a red seat blue, and ours is one. We have the chance to replace millionaire, Trump-backed Jay Obernolte with a progressive Democrat. **We need to maintain our majority in the House and fight for an unabashedly progressive agenda at the same time. **
**[Will you donate today and make sure we stay on a strong footing at the beginning of this Election Year in just a few days? Your contribution could be the one that gets us over the edge and helps us reach our fundraising goal. And remember, any amount helps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41239224/327928732/195484132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxY2I4Njc3MS1mNjgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aq0CNj_6_71Tx-M0q61OVQZceVAYXuCIIBvBXqLV9tk=)**
In solidarity,
**Derek Marshall**
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
* * *

body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]

“You send a lot of emails”

You’re right about that, friend – but I want to tell you why we take the time to write to you so often.

Now that we have district lines set, all eyes will be on a handful of competitive districts around the country, and ours is certainly one of them.

Our goal is to increase the number of donors, the number of contributions, and the amount raised, all before our first deadline of the year on Monday the 31st.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_012822_EOM_B&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_012822_EOM_B&amount=25]

Nearly 4,000 contributions have been made to our grassroots campaign, and while we’re working hard to increase that number, I want to tell you why I’m already incredibly proud of it.

You see, Republicans are going to do their best to convince you that our support is fizzling out. But, I have the receipts.

Thousands of contributions made by real, everyday Arizonans is all the proof we need that Arizona is ready to stand with us, and defend this district.

Can I count on you to join them before our first crucial deadline of the year? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_012822_EOM_B&amount=25]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_012822_EOM_B&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/engelaz?refcode=X_012822_EOM_B&amount=25]

Thank you,

Kirsten

body:
We need [5] supporters in 34223 to help us turn this around: | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRT80gjo6rqwa5wpcOhAhEhhSZKfRyq4Wgd_n0qNGL78b5GiOrv6cdwwz7GnPaDhi4IdHqVuc7Mh4SLApbUZaWx7E3vKKSVOgxyZyx6_aLHhafm82SxusRvLtlSaXsA_cJmyX3BptSubVOTM8nriKO0x8x4hsPlkrrTQFs8VAx09qQ_iVGnuu9ROC5NchZLQJ2_TXBAwHZay-aD48dylQh9FzD4ebZDl8ejdhMY6qBvamBQlC5lcBa7ZLTYQC5yiDUw/3j5/Zh4ZsS1vS6qQECG-VX0yEQ/h0/zmY-clyKZSCbkscxlFabYnyA2EmXCpbDsBNjhU5ug18) Peter, we have some good news and bad news. **First, here’s the good news:** Our campaign to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress has gained a ton of traction. Voters are now realizing it’s too risky to re-elect Henry Cuellar at a time when he’s being investigated by the FBI. _They are hungry for a representative who is transparent and honest._ **Now, here’s the bad news:** Despite all the attention that our campaign has received, we’re still $6,776 short of hitting our $18,000 end-of-January goal and Cuellar’s corporate donors are spending _millions_ to re-elect him. [**_But we have a chance to turn this around. If just [5] supporters in 34223 chips in anything to this email, we can grow our movement even further to unseat far-right Democrat Henry Cuellar. So if you’re ready to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress, will you chip in $5 now?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCatNpowWCkxklbqoVO9vGlIIW5RPvGTljGTpFNbMv8fA8HcCOpZ4gU3f7Qz0b-bGZTuHknkg2R9D8BJFpCdBvBBdhSuZDlMuq1DUN8kjHLoHtPlgHSnbueDiarQM5yXOHJFSm2Glhn6zBAeu7HdDrtuN5cBLnPQMK7rw72aEbNw7GKTyepE0uYSUM_hMrLU-up_AaT95mT7YDu4Ca8s2ciy74wO6QWgUETXSCpUGJoLwiIaP5j_f6LxibnbMKr3IXNekWVpNinolnmVOyPpdzzXVG-tRdR3yai5AWghRpjdAweGTb-5p29TT_12LQjzeTeOPivSU91nyjQvsrknJuKw/3j5/Zh4ZsS1vS6qQECG-VX0yEQ/h1/Fut0-kHw7PgzMucuAhxKCDmtchh3hjStI1R3N4A-uIg) [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCatNpowWCkxklbqoVO9vGlIIW5RPvGTljGTpFNbMv8fAnCC2A9wEoji-Pbz6rxNdtGbooiqcGsrG_xjBN5rkAthbJtpUQgjDK6loX1TfPavU9Yr35szINWGjKMLRNFN2OWIcGzpC61LqhZCyhjXDWpVWzQnvkbOCG3LMyVCz7VqJFVdn0b2PBHAIWaKFdyw9PL4PG_2FT5-ZbG3ERTY8D7nUnYrAAWZjrzFhvXsXx7AFvbyGInlkNlOObAG4pRk6zOSZIo6G5oesZC--63IZAYMlzQNt6IF0NLCleDlnedQ7YiYRqbndu7dKtlCfHI7ELaLfWiPThMVgVeV5z_NhW2A/3j5/Zh4ZsS1vS6qQECG-VX0yEQ/h2/mtIYpb_pewvmrg1Gbjbf-WFAgx3wP1ULr7IYQARyruw)Although we don’t know much beyond what was reported in the news, it’s safe to bet that voters in Texas’ 28th District will think twice about casting a ballot for Cuellar after hearing about the investigation. Just recently, Henry Cuellar put out a statement saying that despite his involvement in an ongoing FBI investigation, he “intends to win” this election. But the fact of the matter is, Peter, that he can’t hide his record:
* Cuellar has received campaign money from the for-profit detention centers that rip our families apart, and thousands of dollars from the NRA.

* He consistently votes with Republicans — as a matter of fact, he’s voted more than 70% of the time with Donald Trump under his presidency.

* He’s a staunch anti-choice Democrat who voted against codifying Roe v. Wade into federal law.

This goes to show that South Texans — and our country as a whole — deserve far better than what Henry Cuellar is offering. And we have a real chance to replace him with a true Progressive like Jessica Cisneros who will fight for all Americans and their best interests. **Not corporations or special interest groups.** [**_But for her to win, she needs a strong base of grassroots supporters by her side to help steer her campaign towards victory. clean_body: We need [5] supporters in 34223 to help us turn this around: | | | Peter, we have some good news and bad news. First, here’s the good news: Our campaign to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress has gained a ton of traction. Voters are now realizing it’s too risky to re-elect Henry Cuellar at a time when he’s being investigated by the FBI. They are hungry for a representative who is transparent and honest. Now, here’s the bad news: Despite all the attention that our campaign has received, we’re still $6,776 short of hitting our $18,000 end-of-January goal and Cuellar’s corporate donors are spending millions to re-elect him. [But we have a chance to turn this around. If just [5] supporters in 34223 chips in anything to this email, we can grow our movement even further to unseat far-right Democrat Henry Cuellar. But the fact of the matter is, Peter, that he can’t hide his record: Cuellar has received campaign money from the for-profit detention centers that rip our families apart, and thousands of dollars from the NRA. name: Ron Johnson
subject: 🚨DECISION MADE🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3e9xl--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)
|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative,
Since I have been in office, I have become the #1 target of the Left, the liberal biased media, and Big Tech giants like Facebook, Twitter, and YouTube.

I have been smeared again and again by media companies like _The New York Times_ , _Washington Post_ , and the _Milwaukee Journal Sentinel_ where they distort my comments, twist them through a liberal prism, and omit most of what I actually say.

I have been silenced, censored, and suspended by the social media oligarchs because I tell the truth, and oftentimes, it is the truth the liberal mainstream media does not want to hear. It counters their narrative, and they refuse to allow it. So they silence free speech.

Yet, despite all of this unconstitutional collusion between these far-Left parties working for political gain at the expense of the American people, I will not give up. They will not deter me. And that is why today, I am officially announcing my re-election campaign for the Wisconsin Senate seat.

I am running for a third term for the simple reason that I believe I am the best person for the job. I believe that I am the best candidate to address the national debt, work to lower inflation, secure the border, and fight for America First policies. I believe I am the best candidate to put an end to the Biden administration's constant record of misinformation and their continued lack of transparency with Congress, the press, and you, Fellow Conservative. I believe I am the best candidate for Wisconsin because I tell the truth and speak for the minority, even when the majority is doing everything they can to silence me.

Now that I have announced, the Left will seize every opportunity to destroy me politically. They will continue to write manipulative hit pieces and orchestrate smear campaigns across all mediums. They will attack and distort my record of success, my record of searching for the truth, and my record of fighting for the people of Wisconsin in any way they can.

And that's why I need your help.

**[Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.

Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e9xl-1votu-4qqlpo3/ "Any help you can provide will make an enormous difference and will be greatly appreciated. $5, $10, $25, or even $35 will help me respond to these hit pieces and smear campaigns. It will take all of us working together to defeat the Left and their dishonest tactics.Can I count on you to chip in? We need to start working right now.")**

Ron Johnson
---
| | | [FIGHT FOR FREEDOM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e9xl-1votv-4qqlpo4/ "Fight for Freedom")
---

P.S. As the Left's number one target, they want to silence my voice. Liberal media conglomerates, talk shows, and newspapers will be pushing their viewers and readers to support liberal candidates that will work to tear down our institutions and impose their agenda by spreading their false and manipulative message. I really need your help.

---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e9xl-1votw-4qqlpo5/ "RonJohnsonFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Ron Johnson:_

Thank you for standing strong with me, Fellow Conservative. While the media tries to smear me, I am not afraid of standing up for the truth. I appreciate you joining me in the battle for Wisconsin against the Radical Democrats.

Recently, CNN ranked my seat #3 most likely to flip. Reports are also saying that even the THREAT of losing my seat could derail plans to take back the Senate. The thought of losing WI is terrifying -- it’s just one more step towards destroying Trump’s Legacy.

So I need you to step up and stand strong with me. **[Please click here to donate now](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3e9xl-1votx-4qqlpo6/ "Please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for being a patriot,

Ron Johnson

name: American Defense News
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1kv4sqt5tampf453vg6ueg0nnl6nub69cm3flj8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clhmaor6c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tpke1rj0thieqpb5cj36hqbasllmdqj8dpjmioe9cj6muoe8oj6mhhm5cth68oefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3aoljcgrr4tb664pb6ob7m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zedfp25qso1g627cdjv91eu80f9umochfdog0n0g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clhmaor6c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zern0gdielcuhcqvagdogcm1b8kb11h319hs82u8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clhmaor6c9h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu8ba70hn5br8970evind8gbfoi6vte4je50k8e0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clhmaor6c9h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | Derek, **FIRST** : My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R) just announced that he's raised nearly **$10 MILLION to defeat me** and retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell.

**THEN** : A new poll just came out that**shows me one point down** – in the race experts say could decide Senate control.

**NOW** : Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice and more – is on the line in this race. But if we fail to fight back now, we could risk handing this seat and our critical Senate majority right back to Mitch McConnell.

**That's why we set a goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP spending, pull ahead, and win this race. But time is running out, and we're still falling short.**

clean_body: I had to reach out. | | | = | | Derek, FIRST : My potential opponent, Herschel Walker (R) just announced that he's raised nearly $10 MILLION to defeat me and retake the Senate for Mitch McConnell. THEN : A new poll just came out thatshows me one point down – in the race experts say could decide Senate control. NOW : Our entire Democratic agenda – from voting rights to climate justice and more – is on the line in this race. But if we fail to fight back now, we could risk handing this seat and our critical Senate majority right back to Mitch McConnell. That's why we set a goal to raise $50,000 by midnight tonight to fight back against GOP spending, pull ahead, and win this race. But time is running out, and we're still falling short. = = | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Derek. Our movement for change wouldn't be possible without your support. – Rev. Raphael Warnock Common Good Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails from Common Good Virginia, click. Paid for by Common Good Virginia

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Please don’t put Mitch McConnell back in charge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We cannot let Mitch McConnell take back the Senate in 2022.
#
Peter:
We cannot let Mitch McConnell take back the Senate in 2022.
Do you remember his refusal to consider President Obama’s last Supreme Court nominee? Imagine the conversation we’d be having about Justice Breyer’s retirement announcement this week if Mitch McConnell was in charge of the process.
Or consider that the American Rescue Plan provided relief for over 36 million families in 2021 – but that every single Republican senator voted against it.
**[We cannot lose the Senate majority. Mitch McConnell has a plan for what he’ll do in 2023 if he takes back the Senate: Nothing. Nothing to help families, nothing to grow our economy, nothing to meet the needs of the American people — because if he can make sure nothing gets done, it would make President Biden look bad. McConnell’s plan is all politics, all obstruction, all the time. Sound familiar? Yep, because it’s the same play he ran against President Obama, including refusing to consider his Supreme Court nominee in 2016. We can’t let it happen again, but we’re going to have to fight, because our Democratic majority hangs by a thread. [_**Midnight tomorrow is our first monthly grassroots fundraising deadline of 2022 — our first chance to size things up and see how ready we are for this election year. >
Now, I get it: Even with Democratic control, everything hasn’t exactly been sunshine and rainbows. Even though we’ve taken big strides with the American Rescue Plan, and the Infrastructure Act, it’s bone-deep frustrating that we haven’t been able to protect voting rights or get climate action and child care over the finish line already.
But the answer isn’t to give up.
There’s one way to make it easier to get more done: expand our Democratic majorities.
And there’s one way to guarantee that NOTHING else gets done: hang back and watch Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy grab the reins.
A Democratic Congress — with stronger majorities, and more members who understand what working families need — means we have a chance to keep up the fight. A chance to level the playing field for families. A chance to protect our democracy.
**So here’s my plan. I’m going to spend the rest of 2022 fighting to get as much done as possible with the Congress we have now, and working to elect more Warren Democrats so we can expand our majorities and get more on the table.**
**But our success is going to come down to grassroots organizing and grassroots fundraising.**
[_**So before tomorrow's midnight deadline, I have to ask: If it makes sense for you right now, can you make a donation to help support our campaign and grow our movement?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41240679/327934559/-237140144?refcode=EMZ3F_EOM_E_20220130_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNGFlOWY5Mi1mYTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sZWXpI-rqUT4v-j4jpeaHURpEU9fXRJrRPPc2oMne68=&emci=7e9a598b-fa81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=c4ae9f92-fa81-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908)
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

clean_body: Mitch McConnell has a plan for what he’ll do in 2023 if he takes back the Senate: Nothing. | | | Mitch McConnell has a plan for what he’ll do in 2023 if he takes back the Senate: Nothing. Nothing to help families, nothing to grow our economy, nothing to meet the needs of the American people — because if he can make sure nothing gets done, it would make President Biden look bad. McConnell’s plan is all politics, all obstruction, all the time. Sound familiar? Yep, because it’s the same play he ran against President Obama, including refusing to consider his Supreme Court nominee in 2016. We can’t let it happen again, but we’re going to have to fight, because our Democratic majority hangs by a thread. | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | | | | | Now, I get it: Even with Democratic control, everything hasn’t exactly been sunshine and rainbows. Even though we’ve taken big strides with the American Rescue Plan, and the Infrastructure Act, it’s bone-deep frustrating that we haven’t been able to protect voting rights or get climate action and child care over the finish line already. But the answer isn’t to give up. There’s one way to make it easier to get more done: expand our Democratic majorities. And there’s one way to guarantee that NOTHING else gets done: hang back and watch Mitch McConnell and Kevin McCarthy grab the reins. A Democratic Congress — with stronger majorities, and more members who understand what working families need — means we have a chance to keep up the fight. A chance to level the playing field for families. A chance to protect our democracy. So here’s my plan. I’m going to spend the rest of 2022 fighting to get as much done as possible with the Congress we have now, and working to elect more Warren Democrats so we can expand our majorities and get more on the table. But our success is going to come down to grassroots organizing and grassroots fundraising. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:

Friends — In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to contribute to my re-election campaign before midnight tonight. Please give me a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important. Here’s the truth: We’re less than one year out from Election day. And our January deadline is nearly here. But this goal is important for a few more reasons. First, a National Republican Super PAC is running ads to defeat me in this race, and we need the resources to withstand the attack. Now, the reason we’re facing so many attacks is because CNN ranks this seat as one of the most likely to flip in 2022. And our official race ranking just changed from Lean Democratic to Pure Toss Up. But our secret weapon against the corporate special interests is you. Because if we have the resources we need, we’re going to win. It would be the honor of a lifetime to serve Arizona for a full term, but I can’t do that alone. So here’s where I ask: [**Can you please split a contribution to Seth Moulton and our campaign before the January fundraising deadline comes to an end? name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Your support is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41240808/327935243/-1281091919?refcode=e20220130_mwh-facts-gif&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjRiMjI0Yy1mYzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPYBH-AP4mxUZkoEoCFOHk20mbt6z2v-IIDjlYVvASc=) Hi there, In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to my reelection campaign, but first, let me explain why your support is so critical:
* More money has been spent attacking my campaign than any other Senate Democrat's this cycle
* If I lose here in New Hampshire, Democrats have no chance of holding the Senate
* Experts are calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats up for reelection
* We can't win without your support

**It's no secret that I'm Mitch McConnell's top target.** In 2016, I won by 1,017 votes, and polls are showing that this year could be even closer. If we're going to win and protect our Senate majority, **we need all hands on deck.** **[That's why I'm reaching out to my top supporters to ask: Will you chip in $5, or whatever you can, before our January fundraising deadline to keep this seat and our Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41240809/327935244/-1281091919?refcode=e20220130_mwh-facts&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjRiMjI0Yy1mYzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPYBH-AP4mxUZkoEoCFOHk20mbt6z2v-IIDjlYVvASc=)** | | [Chip in](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41240810/327935245/-1281091919?refcode=e20220130_mwh-facts&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjRiMjI0Yy1mYzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPYBH-AP4mxUZkoEoCFOHk20mbt6z2v-IIDjlYVvASc=)
---
**McConnell and his dark money allies have spent over $7 million attacking me, but our resources to fight back are limited.** This will be one of the most closely watched races of the year, and if our support wavers, it could tip the scales in the GOP's favor.
I know we can win this race, but it will take an army of grassroots support from people like you, friend. **[So please, if you can, chip in $5 today to help reach our January goal and keep this seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41240811/327935246/-1281091919?refcode=e20220130_mwh-facts&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjRiMjI0Yy1mYzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WPYBH-AP4mxUZkoEoCFOHk20mbt6z2v-IIDjlYVvASc=)**
Thank you for your continued support.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Team Benson
subject: Here’s what went down in January
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Friend,
In Michigan, it is becoming increasingly clear that there are two competing factions trying to run elections in our state: those who believe in democracy and the results of the 2020 election, and conspiracy theorists who want to mislead voters with election lies.
Here’s what happened in January on the election fraud front:

* A multi-state conspiracy designed to take away the will of the voters by defrauding the electoral college to hand the 2020 election to former President Trump.

* Michigan Republican Party Co-chair Meshawn Maddock was caught on tape saying the Trump campaign ordered her to fight to “unseat electors” before the 2020 election certification.
* We learned there is a coordinated plan by national election conspiracy theorists to take over election administration in states across the country, a plot that includes targeting Jocelyn.

* Published a powerful January 6th op-ed in the Detroit Free Press remembering the tragedy of the attack on our nation’s Capitol and reminding Michiganders that the fight for democracy is ongoing.

* Wrote a letter to the committee investigating the January 6th insurrection that provided evidence of extremists in Michigan attempting to undermine democracy and the will of voters in the 2020 election.

* Pledged to use federal grant money to protect election workers in the face of threats during upcoming elections.

Friend, over the coming months we will see increasingly elevated attacks on our democracy. But as Secretary of State, Jocelyn will continue to protect our elections and preserve our democracy.

over the coming months we will see increasingly elevated attacks on our democracy. But as Secretary of State, Jocelyn will continue to protect our elections and preserve our democracy. Donate to the campaign today, so she can continue to protect our state for years to come.

Donate >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=013022]

- Team Benson

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: this moment is different
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Van Hollen for Senate
body:
| |
---
Friends, Some folks want us to believe that the political debates and battles we are having today are no different than the jockeying that has always been part of our political discourse. [But that’s not true. This moment is different — and much more dangerous. name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: as we look back on 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Tt922Mnfewlq7FPQ7-qwV4yMTXzuJYiAIy8fFPpuW4c=/yvyYrzb_C3BZrSGvy2ZTb4p9gAGfgUfwix3DfKN4oys=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220130-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

One of the best parts of my job is reporting on the accomplishments we've made for Virginians. 2021 posed a litany of challenges, from navigating the evolving pandemic to defending against attempted attacks on our democracy. Through it all, **we 've proven we can deliver results for Virginia with a commitment to progress and dedication to service.**

I hope as you reflect on just a few of our accomplishments in 2021 that you're as energized for the coming year as I am. Now that January is drawing to a close, **take a look at some of last year 's highlights by the numbers:**
* **$6 million+** returned to Virginians
* **2,300+** constituent cases closed
* **81,000+** emails, calls, and letters responded to
* **26** bills introduced in Congress, 96% of which were bipartisan
* **369** measures co-sponsored, 82% of which were bipartisan
* Ranked the **#4** most bipartisan Democrat in the House and **#1** in Virginia

I'm honored to serve Virginia's 7th District, and I know that - even in a swing district that voted for our Republican Governor by 5.5 points - we'll hold this seat and hold the House. As we begin working towards another successful year improving life for Virginians and ramping up our preparations for Election Day, I need your support. [_**Will you invest in our campaign so we can continue stepping up for Virginians through 2022 and beyond?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Tt922Mnfewlq7FPQ7-qwV4yMTXzuJYiAIy8fFPpuW4c=/yvyYrzb_C3BZrSGvy2ZTb4p9gAGfgUfwix3DfKN4oys=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220130-1-EM&amount=25)

With gratitude,
Abigail

Hello,
My mother worked alongside my dad in Lebanon Farm Shop well into their 70s. They refused assistance from their many children even after they lost their life savings in the Savings and Loan debacle of the 1980s. My mom in coveralls, petite as she was, handing tools to my dad is an indelible image I carry with me to this day.
My dad built a business repairing farm implements. In a way, I think he hoped that I’d stick around and take it over, but that wasn’t to be. I joined the Navy after getting a scholarship and my life as a machinist and welder came to a close.
Dad said very little about his service in the Second World War. He had the burns and shrapnel of his first ship sinking, and would provide some quips about surviving a night amongst the flotsam and death off Guadalcanal, but he didn’t dissuade me from enlisting. My mom had the bravery in saying quite simply, “The healthy bird flees the nest.” She wiped her eyes on her apron as I drove up the hill on my way to ‘boot camp.’ It took me some time to understand why.
You could say my mom and dad embodied rural Iowa values in their unique ways: Family, hard work, sacrifice, education, and honesty. And I think of them every day on the campaign trail, because it’s those values that drove me to run for political office.
**After nearly 4 decades serving in the United States Navy, I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because it’s time politicians in Washington fight for everyday people like my folks.**
The early polls all show this will be a close race, so of course, I’m facing down millions of dollars in Super PAC attacks. I don’t come from some political dynasty, and I’m not taking corporate PAC money. Instead, I’m relying entirely on the donations of generous grassroots donors like you.
**There’s just 36 hours until our first end-of-month deadline of 2022, and right now we’re still short of our $250,000 goal and what we need to defeat Chuck Grassley and win. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, may I count on you to make a donation to my campaign today – before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tomorrow? Every dollar you can give today will help me build a campaign to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41241251/327937843/-42398318?refcode=em20220130mid-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2E3OGFkNC1mZTgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Gt7eoB6Qd8ccz2-f1-f75u1iEzIB6JI1chD8_ir_wBw=)

subject: Well, would you look at that 👀
body:
we noticed something interesting this morning. | _We are alerting Democrats about Marisa Wood -- a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy. To support Marisa Wood's campaign, [chip in here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41242273/327942073/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzYzZjY2MS0wMDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BQb5PdCddo_hws6NY47JUb7PYmZTZEJj5MLhyN46to=) We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/60c19857-0082-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/3c63f661-0082-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzYzZjY2MS0wMDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BQb5PdCddo_hws6NY47JUb7PYmZTZEJj5MLhyN46to=&id=124172018)._ Friend, we noticed something interesting this morning. 👀 [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41242274/327942074/-217444029?refcode=em-1.30.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzYzZjY2MS0wMDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3BQb5PdCddo_hws6NY47JUb7PYmZTZEJj5MLhyN46to=) We're not sure if this is a sign, but it's definitely an opportunity to thank you for your part in our effort to defeat Kevin McCarthy and keep him from taking the gavel.

McCarthy is raising millions of dollars from corporate PACs and the Trump-aligned mega donors who want to see him become speaker.

**On the other hand, Marisa's campaign is supported by lots of donors from across the country. Some consider this a disadvantage, but we actually think this is the very best way to beat McCarthy. When you chip in $20.22, and someone else from your area does too — it adds up, quickly.**

name: Team Tom
subject: Thanks to supporters like you
body:
You’ve marched with us in parades, you’ve knocked on doors with us, and you’ve celebrated with us. We were lucky enough to even spend some time with one of our most loyal supporters, Prancer (who we think looks FANTASTIC in his Team Tom merch!)
#

Team,

We're looking ahead at the next five months leading into the primary, and we wanted to take a moment to thank you for all that you've helped us accomplish so far.

You've marched with us in parades, you've knocked on doors with us, and you've celebrated with us. We were lucky enough to even spend some time with one of our most loyal supporters, Prancer (who we think looks **FANTASTIC** in his Team Tom merch!)

But this race is forecasted to be one of the **most expensive in Maryland history.** And Tom's been in public service his whole career – he doesn't have a massive war-chest, he has grassroots supporters like you.

The math is simple: **Either we have the resources to run the campaign we need to win, or we don't. **Your $1 could make the difference between flipping Maryland from red to blue and putting Tom to work to deliver for Maryland families, or coming up short.

Peter, this campaign isn’t about begging for donations, name dropping Marjorie, or using scare tactics like “the world is ending” when we ask for your support. **You’re as much a part of this team as the staff here at headquarters.** The work we are doing together to turn GA-14 blue is historic.

This grassroots team is made up of staff members, generous grassroots donors, and loyal supporters and we’re all here for the same reasons:
* We believe that every child should have a fighting chance, no matter where they grow up.
* We believe that our rural communities should not suffer when it comes to infrastructure, broadband, and childcare.
* We believe that our veterans deserve so much more than they are getting.
* We believe that our workers, the ones who are providing goods for families across the country, should not have to live paycheck to paycheck while fearing they’re going to get laid off.
* **And we know that Holly’s dedication to putting her neighbors and community above partisanship is what’s going to take down Marjorie Taylor Greene. **

Peter, this campaign is about building up our rural communities, and giving them a voice. We don’t need to use scare tactics when the reality of Marjorie Taylor Greene’s anti-democratic behavior is still a recent memory.

Your support today helps fund our historic registration efforts, hire and train staff, ensure we talk to every voter, and so much more.

**Please pitch in $10 — or whatever works for your budget — before Monday's end-of-month deadline to help elect Holly and help us fight for our rural communities. Because we both know, Marjorie Taylor Greene won’t be helping us anytime soon.**

clean_body: | | Peter, this campaign isn’t about begging for donations, name dropping Marjorie, or using scare tactics like “the world is ending” when we ask for your support. You’re as much a part of this team as the staff here at headquarters. The work we are doing together to turn GA-14 blue is historic. This grassroots team is made up of staff members, generous grassroots donors, and loyal supporters and we’re all here for the same reasons: We believe that every child should have a fighting chance, no matter where they grow up. We believe that our rural communities should not suffer when it comes to infrastructure, broadband, and childcare. We believe that our veterans deserve so much more than they are getting. We believe that our workers, the ones who are providing goods for families across the country, should not have to live paycheck to paycheck while fearing they’re going to get laid off. And we know that Holly’s dedication to putting her neighbors and community above partisanship is what’s going to take down Marjorie Taylor Greene. Peter, this campaign is about building up our rural communities, and giving them a voice. We don’t need to use scare tactics when the reality of Marjorie Taylor Greene’s anti-democratic behavior is still a recent memory. Your support today helps fund our historic registration efforts, hire and train staff, ensure we talk to every voter, and so much more. Please pitch in $10 — or whatever works for your budget — before Monday's end-of-month deadline to help elect Holly and help us fight for our rural communities. Because we both know, Marjorie Taylor Greene won’t be helping us anytime soon. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = Georgians deserve a representative who cares about their neighbors and their community, and who lives their struggles. Not someone who recklessly abuses their power. We deserve a representative fighting for our needs by sitting on committees, not one that spends all of her time spewing conspiracies. =** Let’s win this race, Team Holly. | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Holly for Congress Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: We beat the odds yet again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Friends,
I’m going to be completely honest with you — I know there are a lot of naysayers out there who think that a gay Black man can’t win this race.
I even had folks tell me that I wouldn't make it to the second round of voting when the Pennsylvania Democrats took their endorsement vote yesterday.
But if I spent all my time letting people tell me what I can’t do, nothing would ever change for working families in Pennsylvania.
So yesterday, I went into the vote with my head held high, knowing that I have you and our big coalition behind me.
And guess what! We beat the odds yet again.
Not only did we make it to the second round, but also we showed all of the pundits counting us out that our movement has what it takes to compete in this race and win.
_HuffPost_ even said that we “impressed poll watchers with the endorsements [we’ve] racked up from fellow elected officials and labor unions, including SEIU’s Pennsylvania state council.”
**If one thing is clear, it’s that this race will be decided by the people! And we will go everywhere — and talk to everyone — to earn their votes.**
[Can you pitch in $3 to help expand our grassroots coalition across Pennsylvania? We’ve got 24 hours left before our January deadline, and we need all hands on deck to crush our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41242556/327943466/-358086307?refcode2=d72864fe-0382-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220130-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzI4NjRmZS0wMzgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGhSmTu9WcAyProEmydxrLM2V3oAt1twQNoprm_Rls8=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41242557/327943467/-358086307?refcode2=d72864fe-0382-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&refcode=em220130-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzI4NjRmZS0wMzgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OGhSmTu9WcAyProEmydxrLM2V3oAt1twQNoprm_Rls8=)**
If you’ve ever been counted out — this is your campaign. Thanks in advance for pitching in, if you can, to help us build a better future for working families.
Best,
MK

* * *

Philadelphia, PA 19110

_**This first deadline sets the tone for the election year, and we need to show strength.**_

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Our Lawsuit Deadline is Coming Up
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

Peter,

We’re getting down to the wire. Tomorrow night at midnight is the deadline to fully fund our lawsuit against Tennessee Republicans for gerrymandering our state. Suing them is our only recourse — it’s the ONLY way to fight back against their rigged maps and to try and keep our communities whole.

We set an ambitious goal of raising $30,000 for the month of January to fund our lawsuit against TNGOP, and we are incredibly close to meeting it — we only need $6,980 to close the gap.

Can I count on you to chip in now to help us get over the finish line so we can successfully sue TNGOP for rigging the game in their favor? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

You deserve equal representation — all Tennesseans do. We are not going to rest until we ensure that happens. Our democracy is sacred, and we will fight tooth and nail to ensure it is preserved and expanded upon.

Will you help us finish out the month strong so we can sue Republicans to save democracy in Tennessee? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

We can’t do this without you,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/redistrictingfund]

That makes it more likely that Democrats will lose this year's midterm election.
* **Mark Kelly is one of the most endangered Democrats on the ballot this year.** According to the Cook Political Report, Kelly is one of three Democratic senators who are a "toss-up". Losing even one of these seats would give Republicans control of the Senate.
* **With the Senate split 50-50, we need to re-elect every single Democratic senator on the ballot this year.** This is critical if we're going to make any progress on key issues like climate change, voting rights, or abortion.

Peter, we need all hands on deck. ### New York Senate Republicans: NO MORE VICTIMS
---
NY Republican Leaders Ortt & Borelli Stand Up to Combat Violent Crime Crisis Creating More Victims - as a Result of Democrat One-Party Rule Soft-On-Crime Policies
---
---
On Thursday, Leader Rob Ortt, NYC Council Minority Leader Joe Borelli, and Members of the NYC Council Minority Conference held a press conference blasting Democrats for ignoring victims of crimes, called for the repeal of Democrat "bail reform," and urged for the restoration of judicial discretion to help combat the out-of-control crime crisis plaguing our streets statewide.
"[Yao Pan Ma. Krystal Bayron-Nieves](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dlPVKMu6WCS_rRrEEzHRYaF81JIQry2huo9fOPSGUx9cBXqnKpaPSyuLpLen5UbBVxVuh48n6spWCljtZAPGJS67aL5nU7MwunR-7asqW-LA72MkNe-y5j8LJUHuWX4nCMDcqegmDbQvQexbow4MDL4wOgujdRo1nA6xZe9aKm8NFVxGBnaq5X6aAnz5gYwY4cC2vklBQE4SV80R-GKmzBxSjpKyUThWYJE4DUEghk9Wovkxw_TiCm_E-dznfwiZevcfqJf9C5k=&c=TwX08-g7TtlBFN4tD8659pClhJ8A87fAByNKm3OXZb4KW7sWUie9JA==&ch=3Yahp6dnuqLahr5CMXlMRiAGTgI3EdvDz6Pr4uFjxzm_8ds_JZ7xxw==). [Michelle Alyssa Go](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dlPVKMu6WCS_rRrEEzHRYaF81JIQry2huo9fOPSGUx9cBXqnKpaPSyuLpLen5UbBI0cW4FfcHqCucJ5wRCSRGVPURYYaFJ1DFY163v6jwm2kyyX1D7KC1QHFPG12SCd6TzFTKwhgYLsPNKKkL4spwGds8-rzRDANrBBqS7TWrLfw_o8AKTzWRMGO7uPSyxVhOXfk0T7HTZLQAO4dj3MhT9a7fVKanyKty22o1pWjhm1DCDeabHV6hE2rD6aPBpx0L8CKqJ_K_u8=&c=TwX08-g7TtlBFN4tD8659pClhJ8A87fAByNKm3OXZb4KW7sWUie9JA==&ch=3Yahp6dnuqLahr5CMXlMRiAGTgI3EdvDz6Pr4uFjxzm_8ds_JZ7xxw==). An [11-month old baby](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dlPVKMu6WCS_rRrEEzHRYaF81JIQry2huo9fOPSGUx9cBXqnKpaPSyuLpLen5UbBxsZMjl8y-tPLP142ZAlFPIR_NqaF1j6LVZT7fDaiketF-H5I-o_qm944BNViKVzKpFaCA5wjV_ExhN3njWV3BeHs3dLqw6W3VubYy9cRdI0DGs4pOS9D49Qdm8FZBsx9cUFqsG5PrUEVSzWo2EIdTT951MpyDIj_GbxtrIRpWrN7-I_Z8bOA0A==&c=TwX08-g7TtlBFN4tD8659pClhJ8A87fAByNKm3OXZb4KW7sWUie9JA==&ch=3Yahp6dnuqLahr5CMXlMRiAGTgI3EdvDz6Pr4uFjxzm_8ds_JZ7xxw==) in the Bronx. Five NYPD officers shot this year, and [two - Officers Jason Rivera and Wilbert Mora - killed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dlPVKMu6WCS_rRrEEzHRYaF81JIQry2huo9fOPSGUx9cBXqnKpaPSyuLpLen5UbBddC4_iuoAwzPv1o3kZQxoY_zz4se_6kWNPWGgWh8FhOEHrvfoL4oenA34Yslmqoov5HwaWlxrkPDrY61QKEQtXLfq4YAXXZVKQXaUgTGAQidf_CcvAevOrigkwhHFTPfKzInHSz98DM_tXTgxxBVrav4rgDyVYg2hJZgNXrgxTYUQ15LOn1O52WYq-l4BYdz-abfpgZ7tVoHXrd7acijs1QORQS2zBSN&c=TwX08-g7TtlBFN4tD8659pClhJ8A87fAByNKm3OXZb4KW7sWUie9JA==&ch=3Yahp6dnuqLahr5CMXlMRiAGTgI3EdvDz6Pr4uFjxzm_8ds_JZ7xxw==) in the line of duty. All New Yorkers and all victims of the violent crime crisis plaguing our streets want to know: when will enough be enough for the public officials pushing radical 'decarceration' efforts in our city and state? I am proud to stand on the right side of history with my fellow Republicans and New Yorkers today, with one simple message for city and state leaders: NO MORE VICTIMS," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt.

### "Republicans join hands with Asian Community, request cancelling of Bail Reform"
---
---
"This is the definition of a dysfunctional city: where good citizens are imprisoned in their homes because of criminals, and criminals are free in the streets to attack good citizens. This is not what New York was, this is not what New York can remain. How many more cops and citizens, young or old, do we need attacked or killed before victims matter? When they truly matter, getting real solutions, and not just some condolences? Hochul should listen to our New Yorkers, beginning with Mayor Adams, asking to wind back the policies hurting our citizens. To free and protect our good citizens, we need not just words, we need action now," said community advocate Wai Wah Chin.
---

### Senate Republicans Unveil 'End the Exodus' Economic Plan - Under 'Take Back NY' 2022 Agenda
---
As Inflation Hits 40 Year Highs & Thousands Leave NY, Republicans' Plan Would Make our State More Affordable & Expand Economic Opportunity
On Monday, The NYS Senate Republicans held a press conference in Albany to reveal their plan that would reverse these destructive trends by increasing affordability and expanding economic opportunity in New York.
"New York leads the nation in outmigration. Our greatest asset - our people - are leaving by the hundreds of thousands thanks to sky-high taxes, burdensome regulations, and an overall economic climate that ranks last in the nation for freedom. My colleagues across the aisle have offered nothing but financial hardship for hardworking New Yorkers and small businesses since they took the Majority. Enough. We need to make our state more affordable, expand economic opportunity, and enact Senate Republicans' economic plan if we want to End the Exodus," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt.
New York faces extreme short- and long-term economic challenges, including:

* Inflation
* High gas prices
* High home heating costs
* Declining consumer sentiment
* Overall tax burden
* Low economic freedom

Senate Republicans' End The Exodus plan includes:

* Cutting New York's highest-in-the-nation taxes
* Reducing the cost of living
* Improving the state business climate

## STATEMENTS FROM SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT
---
| | STATEMENT ON THE DISASTROUS DECISION BY THE FARM LABOR WAGE BOARD FRIDAY, JANUARY 28
The decision by the Farm Laborers Wage Board is the latest disastrous policy under Democrat One-Party rule that is killing our state. By lowering the overtime threshold from 60 hours to 40, unelected bureaucrats - empowered by Albany Democrats - are jeopardizing the future of New York's agriculture industry.
This decision is the result of the 2019 passage of the so-called Farm Labor Act, sponsored by a New York City Senate Democrat who doesn't have a single farm in her district.
Everyone agrees that family farmers and farmworkers deserve to be treated fairly. With this new burdensome mandate, they will be added to the exodus of people leaving our state. Today will be remembered as the day that family farming died a slow death in our state - and it was radical, out-of-touch Senate Democrats who killed it.
###

clean_body: Sunday, January 30th Edition | | | | == | Weekly Newsletter | January 30, 2022 | Issue V | | | | New York Senate Republicans: NO MORE VICTIMS NY Republican Leaders Ortt & Borelli Stand Up to Combat Violent Crime Crisis Creating More Victims - as a Result of Democrat One-Party Rule Soft-On-Crime Policies On Thursday, Leader Rob Ortt, NYC Council Minority Leader Joe Borelli, and Members of the NYC Council Minority Conference held a press conference blasting Democrats for ignoring victims of crimes, called for the repeal of Democrat "bail reform," and urged for the restoration of judicial discretion to help combat the out-of-control crime crisis plaguing our streets statewide. "==. ==. An == in the Bronx. Five NYPD officers shot this year, and == in the line of duty. All New Yorkers and all victims of the violent crime crisis plaguing our streets want to know: when will enough be enough for the public officials pushing radical 'decarceration' efforts in our city and state? I am proud to stand on the right side of history with my fellow Republicans and New Yorkers today, with one simple message for city and state leaders: NO MORE VICTIMS," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt. | == | "Republicans join hands with Asian Community, request cancelling of Bail Reform" "This is the definition of a dysfunctional city: where good citizens are imprisoned in their homes because of criminals, and criminals are free in the streets to attack good citizens. This is not what New York was, this is not what New York can remain. How many more cops and citizens, young or old, do we need attacked or killed before victims matter? When they truly matter, getting real solutions, and not just some condolences? Hochul should listen to our New Yorkers, beginning with Mayor Adams, asking to wind back the policies hurting our citizens. To free and protect our good citizens, we need not just words, we need action now," said community advocate Wai Wah Chin. | Senate Republicans Unveil 'End the Exodus' Economic Plan - Under 'Take Back NY' 2022 Agenda As Inflation Hits 40 Year Highs & Thousands Leave NY, Republicans' Plan Would Make our State More Affordable & Expand Economic Opportunity On Monday, The NYS Senate Republicans held a press conference in Albany to reveal their plan that would reverse these destructive trends by increasing affordability and expanding economic opportunity in New York. "New York leads the nation in outmigration. Our greatest asset - our people - are leaving by the hundreds of thousands thanks to sky-high taxes, burdensome regulations, and an overall economic climate that ranks last in the nation for freedom. My colleagues across the aisle have offered nothing but financial hardship for hardworking New Yorkers and small businesses since they took the Majority. Enough. We need to make our state more affordable, expand economic opportunity, and enact Senate Republicans' economic plan if we want to End the Exodus," said Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt. New York faces extreme short- and long-term economic challenges, including: Inflation High gas prices High home heating costs Declining consumer sentiment Overall tax burden Low economic freedom Senate Republicans' End The Exodus plan includes: Cutting New York's highest-in-the-nation taxes Reducing the cost of living * Improving the state business climate | == | | | STATEMENTS FROM SENATE REPUBLICAN LEADER ROB ORTT | | STATEMENT ON THE DISASTROUS DECISION BY THE FARM LABOR WAGE BOARD FRIDAY, JANUARY 28 The decision by the Farm Laborers Wage Board is the latest disastrous policy under Democrat One-Party rule that is killing our state. By lowering the overtime threshold from 60 hours to 40, unelected bureaucrats - empowered by Albany Democrats - are jeopardizing the future of New York's agriculture industry. This decision is the result of the 2019 passage of the so-called Farm Labor Act, sponsored by a New York City Senate Democrat who doesn't have a single farm in her district. Everyone agrees that family farmers and farmworkers deserve to be treated fairly. With this new burdensome mandate, they will be added to the exodus of people leaving our state. Today will be remembered as the day that family farming died a slow death in our state - and it was radical, out-of-touch Senate Democrats who killed it. | == | == | == | | | | Follow Rob Ortt on Social Media: == == == | | == | | | PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE | | | | | | | Ortt for State Senate | PO Box 1279, North Tonawanda, NY 14120 | | Sent by mailto:rob@robortt.com in collaboration with |

name: Team Warner
subject: We’re not done on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark is still working hard with his colleagues on a path forward on federal legislation to protect and defend our right to vote.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41242783/327945548/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTE5ZTdjNi0wNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyitzU3IUcNVZi6F_ZiqZG6YpiKDm73F2JUEe5dqRKE=&emci=635510a5-0482-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=1919e7c6-0682-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, We told Mark we were getting ready to email you about our upcoming end-of-month deadline, and asked him what he thought we should talk about. He said “tell them we’re not done on voting rights.” Mark is still working hard with his colleagues on a path forward on federal legislation to protect and defend our right to vote. **But this fight is a reminder of why it is so important to maintain control of the Senate in 2022.** [_**We’re coming up to our end-of-month deadline. Can you chip in $5 today to protect the Senate majority so Mark and team blue can continue fighting for voting rights?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41242784/327945549/-2131461607?refcode=mw_em_220130_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTE5ZTdjNi0wNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyitzU3IUcNVZi6F_ZiqZG6YpiKDm73F2JUEe5dqRKE=) Strengthening and expanding voting rights is just one of the issues Mark is working hard on in the Senate right now. But we may not be able to do everything in these next ten months, and you and I both know where these issues will go if we have a Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell after the November elections. subject: We tried to warn you but you kept ignoring us

body:
You are letting your fellow Republicans and our country down with each passing day.
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3eao5--fgxr-4qqlpo2&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

We tried to warn you but you kept ignoring us.

Now, you are letting your fellow Republicans and our country down with each passing day.

**[This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eao5-1vp90-4qqlpo2/ "This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eao5-1vp91-4qqlpo3/)
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eao5-1vp92-4qqlpo4/ "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

You can be the patriot who finally helps FIRE Nancy Pelosi and stop the Democrats’ radical agenda in Congress.

Or you can ignore this message, do nothing, and watch Democrats destroy this country.

All we’re asking is that you **[RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eao5-1vp93-4qqlpo5/ "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")** to help Republicans beat the Democrats. We’ll even send you your very own ID card as a thank you!

There isn’t much time left, Fellow Conservative. Please make the right choice.

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eao5-1vp94-4qqlpo6/ "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

Thank you,

House Republicans

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eao5-1vp95-4qqlpo7/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3eao5-1vp96-4qqlpo8/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

subject: I mean every word
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
I’m in utter disbelief.

I just watched Republicans’ Senate lead completely PLUMMET.

-- We’re now LEADING in Pennsylvania
-- We’re LEADING in New Hampshire
-- And we’re LEADING in Missouri

I need you to read this very closely:

This election just turned into our once-in-a-lifetime chance to flip every last Republican seat, build the BIGGEST Democratic Majorities in history, and stop McConnell from EVER regaining power again – but ONLY if we can compete with Republicans’ massive piles of cash. I need 4,973 Democratic Memberships before midnight to close our budget gap, jump on this historic opportunity, and WIN. But I noticed you still haven’t renewed your Membership. I can’t tell you how much it would mean to me >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/npem2022?refcode=20220130_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30&amount=15}

I mean every word I’m about to say.

We can never – NEVER – allow the likes of Mitch McConnell to control the reins in Congress again.

This election is our chance to build the BIGGEST House and Senate Majorities in history and END Mitch McConnell’s career forever.

But I need 4,973 Democratic Memberships before midnight to spring into action and rush resources to take advantage of this critical swing in Democrats’ direction. It would mean so much if I could count on your $15 before midnight. >>

Peter – right now, the Senate is split 50-50, meaning Mitch McConnell and his allies only have to flip ONE seat to take back control. **I can stop them right here in Iowa, but the GOP is sitting on $32 MILLION to defeat challengers like me and flip the Senate red.**
After polling revealed that 64% of likely Iowa voters do NOT want to reelect Sen. Grassley (R-IA) to an eighth term, he's now facing record-low approval ratings! **Sen. Grassley has never been this vulnerable.**

name: Ann Coulter
subject: College campuses have gone insane
body:
A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-call
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv9l11qo5ioqhlv9o1jaspr7qdra6kcugf66kmpo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ulr6bclkc5pm9climtjjbdli6dhrdcb1ccqjcd3gcko6fc71cpj62olnc9p70tpnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchjcoor5ddhcurm4phh62p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cpimeoj0s9hm49fg)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlj6uhdtc2objgpu39bu6p6l5tqoa8vtgdff4vj0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cljm4o72cdh2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4ufobfv2j94n6es8s36ptask3ill1na2vilsk68_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cljm4o72cdh2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhhgbijajmjngvvqlasapk3kd793lhe8ovjm6iig_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cljm4o72cdh2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za7c4ffe7jti4arco8j56rlhq50r2lr1897avqd8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cljm4o72cdh2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze6cml83b5fofb2pve2m7lhh1177qtd365d571ho_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cljm4o72cdh2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zofcbudkal66hdc75ida29l1413um1ej52d07jv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cljm4o72cdh2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd9j7soudtn77cf0ffj2j8369ikpls54b37d2ab8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cljm4o72cdh2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8m31ggofastno4qhr20knkk3trlor5jv1g3j29g_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cljm4o72cdh2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjbnotkobi1dqvkvbeo1cjjaf84is9s0u9oe2ijg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6cljm4o72cdh2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d “lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution. Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and threatened to rape pro-life students. (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got results. In these cases and many others, Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors. I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help. Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,Resistance is Futile. It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because if we lose the kids, we lose this country. Thank you.** | | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
