I’ve spent my career fighting for working families, small businesses, survivors of domestic abuse, and the environment while serving in the Maryland General Assembly. It would be an honor and privilege to fight for each and every one of you in Annapolis as your next Lieutenant Governor.
And Wes? He defied the odds to become a Rhodes Scholar, Army officer who served in combat in Afghanistan, and the CEO of one of the nation’s largest nonprofits dedicated to lifting people out of poverty. I simply can’t think of a better leader to become our next governor.
**But with a multitude of candidates vying for the Democratic nomination to get on the general election ballot, we can’t waste a single moment between now and the June primary.**
[**So, if you can, pitch in a donation to support Wes and I today so we can fight for work, wages, and wealth for every Marylander as your next Governor and Lieutenant Governor.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-email-jan2022??refcode=fl_email_fr_20220130eom5_am_60da_xx_l2)
We appreciate anything you can contribute to our people-powered movement.

Aruna

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.

Friend, I have officially been on Team Bridie for a month now, and every day I hear from voters in the North Country: Elise has changed. When she ran for Congress, she sold us a bill of goods. Elise promised to be a moderate, bipartisan leader. And for a while, she was. But then, she realized that if she took out Liz Cheney, she’d be her heir to the throne. Now, she’s hosting rallies with hate group leaders, has been endorsed by Trump for a 2028 presidential run, and is chasing internet clout instead of brokering deals. **Elise is _literally_ leading the movement to create “Trump’s Majority” in Congress.** See for yourself: | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41243454/327950743/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220130eom2_cs_full_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGI4YjI0Ny0wYTgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FQKUEt6gbfwn-oNGLQVsUxCjtFjhI1unYirJOBy_usc=)
---
The bright side? The North Country will not be fooled. Bridie and I have been welcomed into homes, general stores, restaurants, and ski shops. We’ve been given high fives and had hard conversations about what the North Country needs — a leader who listens.
We need a representative who fights for jobs, childcare, healthcare, broadband, and all the basic necessities the North Country deserves. And that’s Bridie Farrell.
[**Elise needs to be held accountable for lying to North Country voters. Help us replace her with REAL North Country native Bridie Farrell →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41243455/327950745/-870670775?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220130eom2_cs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTU5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMGI4YjI0Ny0wYTgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FQKUEt6gbfwn-oNGLQVsUxCjtFjhI1unYirJOBy_usc=)

clean_body: | | | | It’ll take one second. | Peter, This is our first deadline of 2022 and we need at least 210 patriots to step up before tomorrow night. Thanks, Team Tshibaka \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Kelly Tshibaka - Endorsed by President Trump Subject: Our first MAJOR deadline To: Peter, From now until election day we have TEN financial deadlines. Each one of these goals is to make sure we stay ahead of Liberal Lisa Murkowski and her Washington, D.C. elitist donors. Did you know only 3% of her donors in 2021 were from Alaska? Even worse, Murkowski has broken from the Senate Republicans to confirm over 90% of Joe Biden’s radical nominees. There’s no mystery why the Alaska Republican Party has censured her, prohibiting her from identifying as a Republican. She has abandoned Alaska values to represent Biden and enable his radical agenda. I have been endorsed by the Alaska GOP and by President Trump. When I’m your U.S. senator, I will represent the people of Alaska and the United States — not Biden and the Washington, D.C., insiders. Thank you, Kelly Tshibaka Candidate for United States Senate FROM ALASKA. FOR ALASKA. ⭐️CONSERVATIVE⭐️PRO-LIFE⭐️PRO-2ND AMENDMENT | | | | ==

name: Bill Pascrell
subject: Since 1969...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pascrell for Congress, Inc
body:
| | | Team, **Stephen Breyer's retirement is a pivotal moment in the life of our country. Now, we have a unique opportunity to bring a fresh perspective to the Supreme Court.** Breyer's replacement must be a vigorous, forward-thinking jurist who will defend our democracy and individual rights. In just a year, President Biden has balanced our federal courts with the most diverse and progressive slate of judicial appointments in history. It's vital that work continues with this appointment. Our judiciary stands at a dangerous moment. Through decades of court-packing by Republicans, our federal courts are now stacked with hyper-partisan judges who are complicit in the Republican agenda to dismantle our democracy. **Despite Democrats winning seven of the last eight national elections, Democratic-appointed Justices have not held a Supreme Court majority since 1969.** America’s courts are not unelected legislatures but neutral forums to preserve the rule of law - at all costs. The next Supreme Court justice must be willing to accept that responsibility and balance the right-wing Roberts Court for the battles that lay ahead. The very sanctity of our democracy is at stake. Thank you, friend, \- Bill Pascrell

P.S. **[We're just _TWO DAYS_ away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we need your help to meet our January goal. Can I count on you to chip in now and stand with me in the fight to protect our democratic values?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wos-ETV5y8B9xcMRNPKmdIaQUBQyzcWKaKQHA-LByzNkdNlYNXsC_CrcSw1zQFF2QeLVk2g7vscRMBNGVue1_Q8KGUwM8T-BTppQWSTj1YixpbqgBqdRAGc8OwgZhTtTRgb_jZTkeiiLdwkwvpS6mYRaw_IYKIBMM_DH0ZcrSU0ZIl2gaS6o4p1y0CWfeoFVMisZJx_mYVzjp-55l4AYgFAIibeqhC2e1q3F1to_AtFq3oEB5lUml2a3vlsNFfFnOU4rDIBno3DHzG_0j891LiEAiGxDdA4twujhkMyh3g1kY4tJoQfgetmU4qgHiJ0sXYnI3kCK3zpCFgIOPI0ch4/3j5/PGP0Bfy2RYCcDJ0zegnlZQ/h0/D__GARUeQYDWNQXHSSgOb913nBEVDwOapVaU4gOTF3Y)** **[CHIP IN](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wos-ETV5y8B9xcMRNPKmdIXgKBDwWt-oY0BP_Y8mPI3Ab5e_ryvx4SjiBPtTr6sZ13j_onfn8K7uxeQOBTTu5LFpPWW1tM3i2-1_uvzZdvUrlq0UbpJAWV5_tZp-UgrDmt0IAess7HwKlZbEfzIkkhvEdA5Y7I1W2iv0KfJfiQJQg9Nb9zKEOoLcOjT73roxYeMt51sqKmk9JWBf0iTJJPQuvMZDhSN_ava1nj55lek1wkNpypMzZhZAkcgIaB-03Yr1FyziZabJw3i1gb9ytT9XC850CnrxrGIJlw5Z59ZgA_WzZqUj1Bygjx9lrrydIqoZAL-vlLzm7YwoIJsum0/3j5/PGP0Bfy2RYCcDJ0zegnlZQ/h1/io0Yhytc2UTD52kfmpE1f3p5Mk0OzN7iwazoQbf4a9g)**

clean_body: | | | Team, Stephen Breyer's retirement is a pivotal moment in the life of our country. Now, we have a unique opportunity to bring a fresh perspective to the Supreme Court. Breyer's replacement must be a vigorous, forward-thinking jurist who will defend our democracy and individual rights. In just a year, President Biden has balanced our federal courts with the most diverse and progressive slate of judicial appointments in history. It's vital that work continues with this appointment. Our judiciary stands at a dangerous moment. Through decades of court-packing by Republicans, our federal courts are now stacked with hyper-partisan judges who are complicit in the Republican agenda to dismantle our democracy. Despite Democrats winning seven of the last eight national elections, Democratic-appointed Justices have not held a Supreme Court majority since 1969. America’s courts are not unelected legislatures but neutral forums to preserve the rule of law - at all costs. The next Supreme Court justice must be willing to accept that responsibility and balance the right-wing Roberts Court for the battles that lay ahead. The very sanctity of our democracy is at stake. Thank you, friend, \- Bill Pascrell P.S. The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families. Thanks for having Bill's back! Prefer to donate by mail? Make checks payable to Pascrell for Congress P.O. Box 100 Teaneck, NJ 07666

| | | [**Quickly: Stacey Abrams just delivered a POWERFUL call to action. Republicans only need to flip FIVE seats to take back the House - and they just raked in a whopping $17M in a single night to destroy us. We're calling for 10,000 Democrats to confirm their 2022 Democratic Membership before our End of Month deadline in 24 hours to close the budget gap, PROTECT our House Majority, and show Republicans we will NEVER let them waltz back into power. Will you rush in $3 to make Stacey proud? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.)

We need to move quickly.

**FIRST:**

Republicans rushed over 400 voter suppression bills across the country to ensure Democrats never win another election.

**BUT THEN:**

Stacey Abrams JUMPED into action - and called on every Democrat to fight back.

name: Aiken, Clay
subject: just wanna make sure you got this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
I wanna make sure you got this message from Rep. Mark Takano, the co-chair of Equality PAC...
I’m proud to have his support in this race. But we need your help to keep adding voices to the chorus.
Can you join Equality PAC in supporting our campaign by chipping in $15 before our first fundraising deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01302022_EOMFR_3&amount=15]
donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01302022_EOMFR_3&amount=15]
Read more from Mark below!
Clay
----Original Message----
From: Congressman Mark Takano
To: Supporters
Date: Jan 28th, 2022
Subject: why Clay
Clay is a lot of things: a father, an activist, a singer, and a good neighbor. But none of those reasons are why we at Equality PAC chose to endorse Clay Aiken for North Carolina’s 6th Congressional District.
We chose Clay because of his compassion and commitment to service. Can you rush $5 to Clay’s campaign today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01302022_EOMFR_3&amount=5]
contribute [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01302022_EOMFR_3&amount=5]
Clay and I both started off as teachers before moving into politics. Having spent more than twenty years in the classroom and as a member of the teachers' union, I know that educators bring a needed perspective and experience to Congress.
It is a perspective driven by a passion for improving the lives and opportunities of all, not by special interests. Clay’s background in special education and disability advocacy makes him uniquely qualified to fight for American families in Congress.
Clay’s historic campaign tells kids across North Carolina that they are welcome and safe, and shows the LGBTQ community in every corner of our country that loud, hateful rhetoric isn’t who we are as Americans.
Clay’s first end-of-month fundraising deadline is on Monday at midnight. I’m personally asking you to support and donate to Clay’s campaign right now. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01302022_EOMFR_3&amount=5] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01282022_EOMFR_1&amount=5]
give now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_eom?refcode=01302022_EOMFR_3&amount=5]
In 2012 I made history by becoming the first openly gay person of color elected to the United States Congress. It’s time to make history again by electing Clay as the first openly gay congressmember from the South.
Thank you,
Mark Takano, co-chair of Equality PAC
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 6th. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
Clay Aiken for North Carolina
PO Box 13274
Durham, NC 27709
United States
If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/facf4162-d27f-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/10bcf77d-0d82-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk2NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGJjZjc3ZC0wZDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vQPPXDkuCYno3smxfTwZ6Ak_0Vi71mb6K_swMH5s6u4=&id=112382424 .

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We won’t let up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Here’s the deal: our fundraising this month has really slowed down. While
we were able to raise big for Jessica Cisneros and our other primary
candidates, we’re $13,348 behind what we need to raise by tomorrow at
midnight in order to reach our goal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91517?refcode=em20220130-21740&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=21740%2E1203867%2E13gsK8 ]Will you chip in $3 to help us meet our end of month
fundraising goal and fully fund our work to elect a slate of diverse,
working-class champions to Congress? This is the first end-of-month
deadline of the year, and our last big fundraising milestone before early
voting starts in our Texas primaries.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91517?refcode=em20220130-21740&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=21740%2E1203867%2E13gsK8 ]Contribute $3

Justice Democrats have already changed the conversation on so many issues,
from health care to the climate crisis, and have faced many tough fights
in Congress. We won’t let up until we win a Green New Deal, Medicare for
All, cancel student loan debt, and secure other victories for working
people.

We’re up against corporate PACs, the Democratic and Republican
establishment, and billionaires who want to continue to profit off our
broken systems. They will all spend big this year to halt progress. But,
with your support, we can win this fight to transform the Democratic Party
and elect fierce champions of working-class values who will join the Squad
in Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/91517?refcode=em20220130-21740&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=21740%2E1203867%2E13gsK8 ]Will you make a contribution today to help us reach our end of month
goal? Anything that you can afford to donate today will make a huge
difference in powering this movement during this critical election year.

Thank you for your support,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=21740%2E1203867%2E13gsK8 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=21740%2E1203867%2E13gsK8 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220130-21740-footer&t=1025&refcode2=21740_1203867_13gsK8&akid=21740%2E1203867%2E13gsK8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=21740%2E1203867%2E13gsK8

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

subject: It’s Hannah’s birthday!

body:
We have exciting news!
| Team,

We have exciting news!

Today is Hannah’s birthday! We’re excited to have her on our team and know that with her, our campaign is going to be able to beat Stefanik in November.

Will you help us not only wish her a happy birthday, but welcome her to the team by helping us reach our fundraising goal? What better way is there to celebrate than by reaching ambitious goals!

body:

| | 🚨 BREAKING JAN.6TH UPDATE 🚨 **Donald Trump calls off Jan. 6 anniversary speech in Mar-a-Lago after Sean Hannity texts revealed**
---
Sean Hannity is just the _latest_ MAGA crony implicated in Trump’s plan to OVERTHROW the 2020 election.

If we ever want to find out the full truth of this tragic day, the January 6th Commission MUST subpoena Donald Trump and make him TESTIFY! **[We need A TIDAL WAVE of grassroots support to pressure the commission and SUBPOENA Donald Trump. Sign on NOW! ↓↓](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Jan6_Comm_Subpoena_Trump/?refcode=VPP_20220130_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=1196%2E878179%2EOtpYLq)** | [_30,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED:_ TELL THE JAN. 6 COMMISSION TO SUBPOENA DONALD TRUMP! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Jan6_Comm_Subpoena_Trump/?refcode=VPP_20220130_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=1196%2E878179%2EOtpYLq)
---
**FIRST:** Donald Trump lost the 2020 Presidential Election fair and square.

**THEN:** He incited a **DEADLY** insurrection at the U.S. Capitol in the hopes of overturning the election and staying in power – _what a treasonous LOSER!_

**NOW:** We’re more than 1 year away from that tragic day, and we STILL haven’t gotten to the bottom of this attempt to overthrow our Democracy.

So it’s crystal-clear: If we want to hold the right people accountable, Donald Trump MUST testify in front of the January 6th Commission.
[MAGA Republicans aren’t going to like this, so we need YOUR help today. Add your name to convince the January 6th Commission to subpoena Donald Trump! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Jan6_Comm_Subpoena_Trump/?refcode=VPP_20220130_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=1196%2E878179%2EOtpYLq)

body:

body:

|

| | This is tough to write: I’m falling seriously short of my End-of-Month Goal. If I can’t raise $8,023 in 24 hours, I’ll have to make huge budget cuts to my campaign. [**_Having to make cuts at this point in the race will be the difference between winning or losing. So I’m asking: will you chip in $15 so I can flip this critical seat blue? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41244592/327955523/1129282168?refcode=20220130_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmZGNhZS0xMTgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJxbkKfpzOL-r7UF1ff3B4lfJdCpSRr7lf-NVZmsYho=)

I’m running in one of the most important races in the country. Let me explain: First, Joe Biden flipped this district by over 6 points. Then, National Republican groups saw I have a real shot at winning this swing district. Now, they’re rushing money to my opponent so he can defend his seat and stop me. Look, I know it’s going to be a battle of inches for me to get over the finish line and win. [**But I know it’s possible if grassroots supporters like you have my back.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41244593/327955524/1129282168?refcode=20220130_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmZGNhZS0xMTgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJxbkKfpzOL-r7UF1ff3B4lfJdCpSRr7lf-NVZmsYho=) [**_To win this race I have to reach voters, hire campaign staff, and run ads in every corner of this district --_and I have to get started now.__**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41244594/327955525/1129282168?refcode=20220130_em_fr_b1_tony_30_rs&amount=15&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDdmZGNhZS0xMTgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gJxbkKfpzOL-r7UF1ff3B4lfJdCpSRr7lf-NVZmsYho=) These tools are all funded by my campaign budget. But they’ll be impossible to pay for if I miss my $8,023 goal and have to make drastic cuts. [**_So I’m humbly asking: will you chip in $15 now? name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: A personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
Dear friend, we’re quickly running out of time and I need you to act by donating to House Majority PAC before all hope is lost.

House Majority PAC fell short of their digital fundraising goal three months in a row while Republicans were breaking fundraising records. Now, Republicans are using their massive warchests to attack vulnerable Democrats -- if those vulnerable Democrats lose, we lose the House.

HMP is projecting another budget shortfall if donations don’t pick up. That’s why they asked me to send you a quick note. HMP’s critical end of month deadline is just around the corner and right now, they’re behind. So I need you to rush a donation to House Majority PAC-- here’s a personalized link that you can donate through so your donation is counted immediately: www.housemajoritypac.com/dpwillis67@gmail.com.

HMP has never needed your support more.

>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-pelosishortnote?refcode=20220130_em_f_1DR_nd&amount=10&amounts=15,35,50,100,250,500,1000

Thanks for all you do for the Democratic Party,

Nancy Pelosi

Speaker Pelosi is only asking for donations to House Majority PAC's contribution account, in amounts up to $5,000 from individuals, political committees, and other permissible sources under the Federal Election Campaign Act. She is not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, national banks, or corporations chartered by Congress.
Your contribution will be deposited in House Majority PAC's Contribution Account and is subject to the limitations and prohibitions of the Federal Election Campaign Act. Individuals and Federal PACs may contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account. Corporations, labor organizations, and other federally prohibited sources may not contribute to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account.
Contributions or gifts to House Majority PAC are not tax-deductible.
Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www.thehousemajoritypac.com/ Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Thank you for being a committed supporter of House Majority PAC. We're working every day to protect our Democratic Majority.
Because President Obama said it best:

Donate $5 to Protect Our House Majority >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-footer?refcode=2021_footer&amount=5&amounts=15,35,50,100,250,500,1000]
President Obama is right, friends. We can’t sit back and let Republicans ruin our democracy.

That’s why we send you so many emails. We rely on grassroots supporters like you to fuel our efforts to take Republicans down. Our average online donation is $12.56. And we put every cent to good use to make sure our Democratic Majority has the resources they need to win.

If you’d like to unsubscribe from our emails altogether, you can click here [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/834e6d0e-4a80-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442/15d49aa3-1382-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNWQ0OWFhMy0xMzgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_YKRx2e4ucVlSm4dBMZjZWFHStnAHAYMTpjdljvoaI=&id=118567146] . If you’d like to chip in and invest in our Democrats, you can click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-footer?refcode=2021_footer&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000] .

name: Lisa Murkowski
subject: Please read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Murkowski for US Senate
body:
I'm running for U.S. Senate because I love Alaska and I believe in Alaskans. As a young girl, I grew up in the southeast community of Ketchikan...

[Unsubscribe](http://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_s=5f37eb25f30d4847bc8f6e17ddc7a510&_t=AUm-VnXRRm7-nd-H8dLmhnOXqbe6VNCLbStCiVQ5791KXC2cLD0ZK0Bj-OqMe7i-VrVfw6LCpEC8y31QvLcfbeB9mvEla-gusXampcAXadeUXBmtxwdNrEZKbxi5hslG1HM75b6KnO82PfKbN1kZCTtwBwMFglLB4CSOkMX_95Vpv-WrpBosdza05dqh8Ii6nlddNRFxtswZXzsd9g2G6k1t9U8qSAWuNH8JK5o--s4%3D)

Hi, Peter, it's Lisa. I'm running for U.S. Senate because I love Alaska and I believe in Alaskans. As a young girl, I grew up in the southeast community of Ketchikan as a third generation Alaskan. Proudly, I am the very first Alaskan-born US senator. I served as PTA President while my two sons were in school and was even appointed by the Anchorage mayor's office to create an initiative to serve the homeless population in our city. I'm saying this so you know that I love helping people and making a difference in my community.
Already, I have received so much support and encouragement from Americans like yourself, but right now I'm asking you to join me in protecting Alaska's natural beauty, our economy, our livelihoods, and our Constitutional freedoms. Team Lisa is surely growing and Peter, I want you to be on it. Will you join my team today, and become one of our first 1,000 members? That would mean so much to me. Join me at this link: [**https://secure.winred.com/lisa-murkowski/join-team-lisa-today**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=7a1877a48f604bca84f156f0b5513982&_m=5f37eb25f30d4847bc8f6e17ddc7a510&_e=fyVRSRyyaYBQU1cedP4Jo62JtQ-f_-iRTjdN5Nlx-5TR2b5UkG9KLmv5ZvJuHfGVqZs-ghcXn5ARcEmqgZYeJYg7o3d6Q1RVWo5dwFh_3G9994IQHVlFol_sTRLlIa8uzqxLKw7QlSDSBMLhA473xH7UQ_VaqcRnNdnwlPxTtnjcz6FbrPcy9xCQZO3KmVQ2Ghl7uOKylMY8oIHVFXQ_bF-IsOGAuU0gY802-NNUKnMi1N9JpxvCtq6G5ikfMDqF-V7W4RqKCC5iqj6_Lte9Vk9XcPV1IiNiAf2QXSVmcx9iqzyCoEWUlxRkNt75gNNZLYsd5E5z07wJ-VG9xR_AjwTwrz89tpE5DsF_ykYU-0omRmVauJzCV8Th0rb1v5_3tb_P_52sG4rgTJxFfvr7HOBAmlt7WSiOuYCeXqex3Nfw001gyTiV1F3uIotavMzPsdKZo8u7pnOqixAk9F4_V0lzmCtZkxRb9rS2FGp3MpwRiOQhdXscLZzGt0QMXTfoUMRzl1l3WjwMXcR7JV1i1hMlV53Plcmr4dgoXQ5IEvw%3D)
Thank you for your time.
Alaska in my heart,
Lisa

clean_body: I'm running for U.S. Senate because I love Alaska and I believe in Alaskans. As a young girl, I grew up in the southeast community of Ketchikan... Hi, Peter, it's Lisa. I'm running for U.S. Senate because I love Alaska and I believe in Alaskans. As a young girl, I grew up in the southeast community of Ketchikan as a third generation Alaskan. Proudly, I am the very first Alaskan-born US senator. I served as PTA President while my two sons were in school and was even appointed by the Anchorage mayor's office to create an initiative to serve the homeless population in our city. I'm saying this so you know that I love helping people and making a difference in my community. Already, I have received so much support and encouragement from Americans like yourself, but right now I'm asking you to join me in protecting Alaska's natural beauty, our economy, our livelihoods, and our Constitutional freedoms. Team Lisa is surely growing and Peter, I want you to be on it. Will you join my team today, and become one of our first 1,000 members? That would mean so much to me. Join me at this link: Thank you for your time. Alaska in my heart, Lisa * A quick note from Lisa: I just wanted to thank you for all that you do for me and my team. My ability to do this job is only possible because of fantastic supporters like you. Asking for money is one of my least favorite things to do but without the resources to fight back, we will lose the Senate to more extreme partisans. This race will be my most expensive race yet so So from the bottom of my heart, THANK YOU! Thank you for standing with us in this big moment,

Sean Patrick Maloney
Chairman, DCCC

name: Juan Rodriguez
subject: Good and bad news
body:
Hey Peter, this is Juan. In case we haven’t formally met, I’m John’s campaign manager. I wanted to give you a snapshot into our fundraising this month:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90482/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-01-27%20at%202.44.28%20PM.png]
As you can see, we’ve seen a pretty steep decline in our fundraising so far this month. It’s not something I want to see — but I’m here to tell you we have time to turn this around and make this our best month yet.
We are trying to raise $9,837 before January 31st at midnight to make sure we can carry out all of our grassroots outreach plans next month ahead of the primary — but to hit that we need to pick up the pace. Can you make a donation right now so we can begin to chip away at our goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220130?refcode=em20220130]
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220130?refcode=em20220130]We knew from the beginning that running a grassroots campaign would pose challenges — especially in the fundraising department.
But, since we started this campaign we have grown and are so confident that we have the people-power to not only hit our goal but completely change what that snapshot shows.
So, it’s time to ramp it up and turn this thing around — together. We are counting on you. Make a contribution right now towards our End of Month goal to power our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220130?refcode=em20220130]
Let’s get to work,
Juan Rodriguez
Donate » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lira-em-20220130?refcode=em20220130]https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress [https://www.facebook.com/LiraforCongress] https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress [https://twitter.com/LiraforCongress]

#8096
San Antonio, TX 78220
United States

body:

We are finally at the end of January, and I need your help to make sure we close out on top. But in order to achieve this goal, I have to start early.
Many of you have received my phone calls and messages over the last few weeks [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=eomjan1] , and I hope that shows you how much I’m taking fundraising seriously.
But the next 24 hours are crucial to show strength for the First Quarter. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=eomjan1]
When I reach my fundraising goals, that means, we can jump start a field program with consistent phone bankers and canvassers to increase my name recognition and put up more online ads to reach everyone in the district..
But we can’t do this without your help! Will you make a small contribution before midnight tomorrow? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/victoria-for-congress?refcode=eomjan1]

Victoria

Victoria Virasingh is the daughter of immigrants. She grew up housing insecure and watched her working parents struggle to pull their family out of poverty. But today, even those opportunities to work hard and live the American dream are becoming less and less attainable.
That's why Victoria is running for Congress in Virginia's 8th District -- to create equitable opportunities for those who have been left behind, to expand access for the store owner to the refugee, to support our struggling elders and students, and to lift up working families.
Victoria is a fearless progressive champion who will fight for bold policies to improve the daily lives of Virginians, and she's bringing the fresh new leadership that we need to move our state forward.
Pitch in to help elect Victoria Virasingh as the next voice of VA-08 >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-mnc-email?refcode=220105_FR_newyearnewemail_BIO]

We’re facing an uphill battle in this campaign to make her the first woman Senator from our state. _But we can’t get there without all hands on deck at the start of this election year._

Madison listens to everyday Oklahomans, because she is one of them! She grew up on a small farm, attended school on a Cherokee reservation, and worked four jobs in college. She knows Oklahoma. We’re facing an uphill battle in this campaign to make her the first woman Senator from our state. But we can’t get there without all hands on deck at the start of this election year. = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly | | = | = | = | = | = Our country is facing major challenges that demand action from servant leaders to work together to build on America’s legacy. Madison is running for Senate to work towards the promise of the American dream and represent Oklahomans who have been left behind by self-serving politicians. Together, united by a common set of values, we can work to fight inequities, secure and defend our country, and build a better future. Help support her campaign by = Paid for by Oklahomans for Madison Oklahomans for Madison PO Box 2601 Oklahoma City, OK 73101 United States **

name: WelchForVermont.com
subject: Our first 2022 deadline is tomorrow.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Tomorrow night’s deadline is very important because early support is critical to win.
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=92%2E61531%2ETzqrGO)
Hi There,
We’re coming up on our campaign’s first critical milestone of 2022.
We’ve had a lot of momentum on our side, but tomorrow night’s deadline is very important because early support is critical to win.
Our campaign is not taking any corporate PAC money. Instead, grassroots supporters like you power the team we’re building — our most frequent contribution is just $5. If we’re going to run a winning campaign and continue to deliver progress for working families, we need this team to join together. That’s why we’re asking:
[**Will you chip in $15 right now to help us close the gap ahead of our critical end-of-month deadline?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1321?t=3&akid=92%2E61531%2ETzqrGO)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1321?t=14&amount=3&akid=92%2E61531%2ETzqrGO)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1321?t=16&amount=15&akid=92%2E61531%2ETzqrGO)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1321?t=18&amount=28&akid=92%2E61531%2ETzqrGO)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1321?t=20&amount=50&akid=92%2E61531%2ETzqrGO)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1321?t=10&amount=100&akid=92%2E61531%2ETzqrGO)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1321?t=12&akid=92%2E61531%2ETzqrGO)
---

---
Peter is committed to delivering progress for Vermont, and for communities all across the country. Peter’s vision is one where we take action to fight climate change with a Green New Deal and provide affordable child care for working families. His vision is for Medicare for All and a world where people don’t have to choose between paying for prescription drugs or heating their homes. Peter’s vision is both hopeful and practical because it puts people first.
But to get this done, we need more progressive voices in Washington. It has never been more important to elect a progressive like Peter to the Senate.
[**Before tomorrow night’s midnight deadline, will you pitch in $15 to help make sure we send Peter to the Senate?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1321?t=7&akid=92%2E61531%2ETzqrGO)
We know that working people in Vermont and across the country share Peter’s positive vision for our future. Now is the time to show just how strong our team is and your support right now goes such a long way.
Thanks so much. We’re so grateful you’re on our team.
Team Welch

---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Folks, Republicans called me the “accidental Senator”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41245009/327957593/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IyY2ZlZS0xNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Dn2F-VbAC0yBv-f_IK7EL_STHHzZFxlLBUDj4bLEqM=)
Can I explain something, folks? [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41245010/327957594/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_IN120_20220130_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IyY2ZlZS0xNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Dn2F-VbAC0yBv-f_IK7EL_STHHzZFxlLBUDj4bLEqM=) In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41245011/327957595/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_IN120_20220130_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IyY2ZlZS0xNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Dn2F-VbAC0yBv-f_IK7EL_STHHzZFxlLBUDj4bLEqM=) And it’s true, I had never run for office before. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41245012/327957596/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_IN120_20220130_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IyY2ZlZS0xNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Dn2F-VbAC0yBv-f_IK7EL_STHHzZFxlLBUDj4bLEqM=)
_Source: The New York Times_ But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41245013/327957597/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_IN120_20220130_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IyY2ZlZS0xNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Dn2F-VbAC0yBv-f_IK7EL_STHHzZFxlLBUDj4bLEqM=)
_Source: The Denver Post_ So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41245014/327957598/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_IN120_20220130_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IyY2ZlZS0xNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Dn2F-VbAC0yBv-f_IK7EL_STHHzZFxlLBUDj4bLEqM=) I was ready to fight for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41245015/327957599/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_IN120_20220130_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IyY2ZlZS0xNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Dn2F-VbAC0yBv-f_IK7EL_STHHzZFxlLBUDj4bLEqM=)And thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.[****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41245016/327957600/-20397165?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_EOM_IN120_20220130_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlM2IyY2ZlZS0xNjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Dn2F-VbAC0yBv-f_IK7EL_STHHzZFxlLBUDj4bLEqM=) But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. clean_body: | = Can I explain something, folks? = In 2009, I was appointed to fill a vacancy in the U.S. Senate for Colorado. Polls pegged my name recognition at a whopping 3%. Republicans called me the “accidental Senator.” Even a national political website greeted my new position with the headline: “WTF?!!.” To say the least, I was not an obvious choice. = And it’s true, I had never run for office before. = Source: The New York Times But during my time in education, I worked with incredible people from all over and saw America for what it was — its strengths, weaknesses, where we could do better, what our neighbors needed help with. = Source: The Denver Post So I knew — with the right team — we could do some good in the Senate. = I was ready to fight for the state we loved and the country that welcomed my and many others’ immigrant families. thanks to folks like you, we’ve been here ever since working to expand opportunity for all.= But now we’re up for re-election and Mitch McConnell has already made me a top target. All Republicans have to do is flip one seat to retake the Senate majority, and it’s clear he has his sights set on Colorado. = To make matters worse, we’re behind our fundraising goal for the month. We cannot afford to lose the Senate majority. Can I personally count on you to donate $10 or more to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal so we can have the resources to fight back and protect this seat? you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= I’m refusing to accept a single cent of corporate PAC or lobbyist money, so I mean it when I say I’m counting on your grassroots donation (and videos with Hick and his banjo) to fuel our campaign. = Thanks, Michael = Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

Friend, A lot can change in just a few weeks. Since Congressman McClintock ran off to redder pastures (i.e. a safer seat), two new GOP frontrunners have emerged. The first is Assemblyman Kevin Kiley, who ran against Governor Newsom in the recall election and _brags about leading the opposition to mask mandates._ The second is Sheriff Scott Jones, often called **the “Mini Trump” of Sacramento** , who _refused to enforce county and statewide COVID-19 directives._ _To top it off, both Kiley and Scott are known to partner with insurrectionists and QAnon supporters._ No matter which one of these extremists gets through the Primary, one thing is for sure: _**we can’t let them win in November.**_ [Can you donate any amount before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41245170/327958501/218260425?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220130eom1_TK_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjAxNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWFlNTNmOC0xNzgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XZpCK7n2yLsRCUclsGnvAE_3x9esdOQSpIMOqvHzVTY=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

---

The truth? Doug wants to get kids back in classrooms, in a way that supports and protects families and teachers -- with mandatory vaccinations. Republicans may be fine with disregarding teachers and safety protocols, Doug is not. He firmly stands with the students, parents, and educators. Republicans are on the attack early because they know Doug is the only Democratic candidate who will block their path to another four years in the Governor's office. A party willing to lie to parents about an issue of such importance to their kids' health and education, a party willing to lie to the teachers who educate our kids for far too little pay has no business in being in charge of Maryland. A party willing to lie to parents about an issue of such importance to their kids' health and education, a party willing to lie to the teachers who educate our kids for far too little pay has no business in being in charge of Maryland. Thank you, Team Gansler By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. | **WHY THEY ATTACK MIKE FLYNN** **[](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=1&link=f7d9ad3f73244277a6dbbb81acfea661)****The most recent attack by a pathetic U.S. Senate candidate in Pennsylvania, Everett Stern, on General Michael Flynn is as ludicrous as it is outrageous. Using sensationalized words like "treasonous," "domestic terrorism," and "extortion" in a complete distortion of "events" that may not have even happened.** Needless to say, the jackals in the corporately-owned fake news media like the Guardian jumped on this false narrative like flies on sh*t in yet another effort to smear General Michael Flynn who is, in fact, a great American hero on the battlefield and in the struggle against the socialist junta now running the country into the ground. Any effort by Flynn or anyone else to identify those Republican elected officials who refused to examine the anomalies and irregularities in the 2020 election, and educate the voters regarding this dereliction of duty constituted neither "treason" nor "extortion." In fact, such actions (if they even really happened) would be perfectly legal political activity specifically protected by the First Amendment of the US Constitution. [READ MORE](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=2&link=fcf8b456ad034172b6e296d732663dca). [https://www.stonecoldtruth.com/why-they-attack-mike-flynn/](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=3&link=714130f817584848b4cfd423dbc41e40) **Three Years Ago Today Roger Stone Was Arrested for a Fake Made-Up Crime by Twenty-Some FBI Agents at Gun Point** **[](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=4&link=3a3f3ee7b4ee42c986e7072d96908e12)****This was one of the most disgusting events in US law enforcement history - Roger Stone was arrested in the early morning of January 25, 2019, after being ambushed at 6 am at his house in Florida by twenty-some FBI agents and CNN. His crimes, related to Russian collusion which didn't exist (and the investigators and prosecutors knew it), were made up.** This occurred in America to an innocent civilian - Roger Stone. This is Obama/Biden's America! Roger Stone provided the Gateway Pundit exclusive pictures from his arrest at his home in Florida which were published on June 11, 2020. Stone has been under attack ever since. [READ MORE](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=5&link=4be54a2bf51548cdbe7c80d9c13d9419). Ron DeSantis (R-FL), on Tuesday. The Trump confidante declared that the former president would handily defeat the governor in a presidential primary.** Trump recently made headlines when he appeared to take a veiled shot at DeSantis during an interview on One America news. "I've had the booster," Trump said. "I watched a couple of politicians be interviewed and one of the questions was, 'Did you get the booster?' Because they had the vaccine and they're answering like - in other words - the answer is, 'Yes' but they don't want to say it. Because they're gutless." [READ MORE](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=8&link=be5c6b297e7b4f35bce24b2cb1b6cd03). [https://www.stonecoldtruth.com/roger-stone-says-trump-would-crush-ron-desantis-in-a-primary-slams-governor-as-lackluster-and-disingenuous/](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=9&link=07c5380207224a1fbd8fcb5aa5adf7d2) [](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=10&link=4045bc54cb204204824a2b9da4856b1d) **Roger Stone** is a political strategist and pundit and a long-time political advisor and friend of President Donald Trump. Stone was a [victim](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=11&link=08c499cd896641878a97700d1bde0218) of the Mueller witch-hunt and was charged with lying to Congress in order to pressure him into testifying against the President. Stone refused. After Stone's trial was corrupted by a biased Judge, a corrupt Jury Forewoman and a stacked jury and prosecutors sought to incarcerate Stone in a Covid 19 infested prison in violation of all current legal precedents, DOJ policy, and without regard to Stone's health or age, President Donald Trump pardoned Roger Stone on December 23, 2020. On November 3, 2020, at midnight, the US Justice Department by court order released the long-hidden sections of the Mueller Report in which the Special Counsel admitted that his office with its unlimited legal authority and unlimited budget had found "no factual evidence" to tie Roger Stone to Russian Collusion, Wikileaks collaboration or the alleged theft of John Podesta's e-mail. Stone is a New York Times Bestselling author and has returned to political commentary at [StoneColdTruth.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0p2orxmaok2o2wkpm&linkid=12&link=7fd1426349f846c7bc7dee20b52a97c1). Friend,

I have something for you.

I've been thinking back on the day I was sworn in to become the 45th President of the United States, and I came across some photos. One, in particular, is my absolute favorite and when I saw it, _I immediately knew that I wanted YOU to have a copy of it._

_This photo is of yours truly walking out of the United States Capitol, right before I was Inaugurated - right before America changed for the better._

But, I didn't want to send you JUST any photograph of me - _I wanted to make it special._ I asked my team to put together a list of my _most LOYAL supporters so that I could give them a personalized, signed photo._

**[Of course, YOU were at the VERY TOP of that list, Friend.](http://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJx1kVtvnDAQhX8N-waC4eLsAw9NySrKqhe1D436gpyxFxz5gozdFfn1HaNN25dKFhLfHB-fmRE94B0gHlQPJUBZ1WXFoGqhaBo8Vu3liIw1Eo6YNeVV2UI4y7V4DT6apUBnDnMv8Qj40qCQHcMX1gLwEloBsqnIi7OD7ucQljWrP2RworNKjF4WZOelSCaJ8V8y50Z6hTx_dcqG_BKt8Fytyk45iYwKQcokVZOVIleWxyl6HpSz-TK74HLWZvWJGxdtyOqB_qDz6S1PFgQoNN3vjLNyGxctxST_0hjMaKRQ0RCThis9zpcbX130mLQGR8vp3Dhys3BKQ5X36Y3_T6d5tDiP_05wTG3fun73dDbIPT9hkuOy-XW0qAFYTZrRaiWo-vD96-PPO9t8Ou1wVoIGPDyV120evjy9HXwvlqvSWq0do91NqaN9YZRZq8vWZ-w-A9jvAey7gXNz__y5O_84D7mZvr3lQ9c211SFj_QN2yL_SG8uxT6pRNnwGzigwqI)**

clean_body: Do you want it? Friend, I have something for you. I've been thinking back on the day I was sworn in to become the 45th President of the United States, and I came across some photos. One, in particular, is my absolute favorite and when I saw it, I immediately knew that I wanted YOU to have a copy of it. This photo is of yours truly walking out of the United States Capitol, right before I was Inaugurated - right before America changed for the better. But, I didn't want to send you JUST any photograph of me - I wanted to make it special. I asked my team to put together a list of my most LOYAL supporters so that I could give them a personalized, signed photo. I only have a limited amount of signed photos and I really want YOU to have one. Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Donaldjtrump.com Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219 |

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: is there ANYTHING we can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
What if we told you we’re already facing millions of dollars in attack ads with more on the way?
#

Friends —
Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make your first contribution before Mark Kelly’s first fundraising deadline of the election year ends tomorrow at midnight?
What if we told you we’re already facing millions of dollars in attack ads with more on the way — especially after Mark’s decision to change Senate rules to pass voting rights legislation?
What if we told you CNN says this is one of the most likely seats to flip this year, and if we lose, Mitch McConnell will almost surely be Majority Leader?
And what if we told you we’re pacing to fall short of our goal before this deadline — a goal we can’t afford to miss.
So, please. If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make your first donation to Mark’s re-election, today is the day.
[**Can you please make your first $5 contribution to Mark’s re-election campaign today? We cannot afford to miss this deadline and play catch-up the rest of the campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220130-1-15&t=1&refcode2=2029_6688874_HSDj4h&akid=2029%2E6688874%2EHSDj4h)

subject: What’s at stake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
We really need to flip this seat.

---
| | Team,

**We _really_ need to flip this seat.** Our voting rights, reproductive rights, health, democracy, economy and climate are all on the ballot this November — and a Republican-led Senate would be catastrophic.

If anyone can flip the seat, it’s Tom. He won SIX TIMES in a red county.

**But here’s the thing:** Tom can’t do it alone. He isn’t backed by dark money groups, Big Pharma, Wall Street, or Big Oil. He can’t write himself a check or rely on his billionaire daddy. He depends on the contributions of folks like us and is extremely proud to run a people-powered campaign.

[Can you chip in $10 to support our people-powered, grassroots campaign? clean_body: We really need to flip this seat. | | Team, We really need to flip this seat. Our voting rights, reproductive rights, health, democracy, economy and climate are all on the ballot this November — and a Republican-led Senate would be catastrophic. If anyone can flip the seat, it’s Tom. He won SIX TIMES in a red county. But here’s the thing: Tom can’t do it alone. He isn’t backed by dark money groups, Big Pharma, Wall Street, or Big Oil. He can’t write himself a check or rely on his billionaire daddy. He depends on the contributions of folks like us and is extremely proud to run a people-powered campaign. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Everything is riding on the midterm elections. name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I’m embarrassed to ask.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zrd87ebdg0g1pl6lhc96t4c1gc6bof0nr4almn68_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbp33d32mqrmbdb364qe9d326tjrco30slrmccj764rm4s72mqq72cr56mom2cj0cv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti6dj33dpl63jreo3665ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5j6ao74c3g6eoh5u)
You’ve already done so much.

| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztgkmun946oe4opsi9o7g63jjv5kt059srgmobpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clge8o70cth2bs)
---

Folks,

I’m a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2021 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left’s agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn’t do it without you. That’s why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2021, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my 2021 fundraising goals, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They’ve not only taken notice, but they’re taking action. They’ve called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat me in 2022 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can’t happen.

**I NEED YOUR HELP. I’M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we’re going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left’s Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We’ve got to start 2022 off right, and I’m hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

| [**RUSH $25**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfpbmtnuqn1qb0bei37vjh2i4192uo6a52j2ke2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clge8o70cth2bs)
---
[**RUSH $50**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdeqc25bbov81foo7amhfjanto12mlr3ckggvpq8_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clge8o70cth2bs)
---
[**RUSH $100**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zm76c89c7uunlafva7pi5qvl3g8gckmm4160bleo_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clge8o70cth2bs)
---
[**RUSH $250**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2znn8arfmt7qocu6u5b28lhe49ucbf7225jttc4jg_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clge8o70cth2bs)
---
[**RUSH $500**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvcrgrn3uhv2v2600pmha4p97a4gi5s8l54otc2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clge8o70cth2bs)
---

I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you’ll help me catch up.

Thank you,

[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zou9u0dj9e4sbdpsijoecgacjled38tqi9e3s0go_rp22sh2s8i66ob6clge8o70cth2bs)

Senator John Kennedy

### **Huge news: the New York state legislature just filed their map for redistricting – our 1st District is changing.**
National political experts are reviewing the data and boundaries to determine the electoral implications of a change in our district lines but one thing is certain: **this district will be one of the best opportunities in the country to flip a battleground seat from red to blue.**

**Listen, if you've been waiting to become a founding donor of our campaign, now's a critical moment to get involved.

**[With less than 48 hours to raise $5,616 and meet our fundraising goal, we need folks to step up and chip in whatever they can to become 2022 founding donors. clean_body: | = Huge news: the New York state legislature just filed their map for redistricting – our 1st District is changing. National political experts are reviewing the data and boundaries to determine the electoral implications of a change in our district lines but one thing is certain: this district will be one of the best opportunities in the country to flip a battleground seat from red to blue. Listen, if you've been waiting to become a founding donor of our campaign, now's a critical moment to get involved. = | = ** = If you've heard from Kara and Kelley already, you know our race is heating up fast. The filing of a new district map only makes our fundraising goal all the more pressing. We've got to sprint to hire a field director AND rent office space for Hahn HQ. There isn't much time left in January, so we need to act quickly. Here's the good news: We're a grassroots-powered movement, and if everyone reading this email chips in just $5, we can make the mark in no time, team. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you and take care. Zach Finance Director Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a must win for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress! = =

| | Hi Peter, It’s Nicole, Andy’s campaign manager here. No matter how you slice it, we have a tough race ahead of us this year. With redistricting in play and a tighter House majority than ever, it’s imperative to build momentum early so we are in a strong position come November. [_**Peter, will you chip in whatever you can today before our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2022? Your support will fuel our grassroots movement to keep progressive voices like Andy’s in Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41239016/327927454/882283677?refcode=em_20220130_f_n_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGVlYjhmNi1mNDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sEbhdbV6_F5xhyTZRk0mxyOwzLveXxugcMr15NqulQ=) I know there’s no one better fit to represent Michigan’s new Eleventh District. As we hit the campaign trail, voters in our new areas are connecting with Andy’s message, like calling on the President to cancel student loan debt and Congress to provide restaurant owners with more pandemic relief. They know Andy is listening and Andy is fighting for them. [_**Please consider giving whatever you can today — before our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year — to help finish what we’ve started and deliver for the new Eleventh District, the state of Michigan, and the country. The most common contribution to our campaign is $10.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41239017/327927455/882283677?refcode=em_20220130_f_n_eom3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGVlYjhmNi1mNDgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5sEbhdbV6_F5xhyTZRk0mxyOwzLveXxugcMr15NqulQ=) Andy’s a strong voice for our progressive agenda and I know there’s a lot more he wants to accomplish. And if he’s going to do it, he needs this team behind him. Together, we’ll get it done. As Andy likes to say, let’s go! Thank you, Nicole Bedi
Campaign Manager
Andy Levin for Congress

| | Good morning folks, I’m up with a cup of coffee looking over our fundraising numbers ahead of tomorrow’s deadline. With one day to go, we still have $4,198 to raise. This is our first end-of-month deadline of 2022, and it’s crucial that we hit this goal: whatever we’re able to do now lays the groundwork for this campaign in the months ahead. That said, I’m personally asking **if you can chip in $5 this morning and help us close the gap.** Here’s a secure link you can use: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sisolak_januarydeadline](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zlDPxDHCSe8GlVxjXZtZRtWVosFDOdxjTsPapgXgvbnOu7c3wE40YMUzYUkJMd8pZsghfjeU8RKswiPQl82uPjcPM3kX6zlBPNr9wDTJgt7GDRzyZrgMycvYYIJVka2wQxfQC1B4pEq4TOUSAw8Td2cOQIDMJxub9dnFeFpXhYn4-K-MKMzQNJY-edK2S9Qwzeg6GlAp4hNcKEYTwXfxK2unSkNxeL973sG8WbECqqePqcgYyuvTwW8QzRZrLpjTJXzdC4CvMIPV6SjuLOZUXIp9HWK8F8c7fJwPwi5tHg5qHvuxnLtPWMo8k-270OpIKK_-VU9SW7eXtn7qxJXuLabiOU2Vw4a8VFPhT0eIU3ECfLcvZImDFh0qXu--fwWb15niuaua4Bd6QqaMSnWuE6fvDLwIm--ctCZQ44o1eMjIgOSfTcH3APuMJBanxQJ3e6GQNqlpN-d1-3OFbosGHFu9WGG2WRjctQC2LjsJYHzxzFP4KqwmG7L37p2N6Dyy_UxNR3MMaNh5_NtTGr9_zbcAeFfyBCyIqgcavKbV3ad14qw5ns0NPE0pK36074IonkwY64QpfRs-KU2rTUMCEQnNLaNTUv5qmMb7xdAClvXyN2y61J3WSq_RUyMlkVYs4/3j5/xrsCpQERQRaV2rlZ-IRWZw/h1/Spzw4bpBd9dgrhPJ6pFpB2JnLwYuCDRK6ySe50rGaQQ)** I’m going to level with you: I’m facing 9 GOP opponents, and they’ve already opened their warchest and spent $2 million against me. They attacked me relentlessly in 2018, and I know they’re going to give it all they’ve got this time around. Well, folks, so are we. We’re building up our resources so we can go toe to toe with the attack ads, misinformation, and anything else they throw our way – and hitting our January fundraising goal is a huge part of that. I’m proud to have a campaign that is truly a people-powered movement, and I’m going to rely on this team more than ever in the coming months. clean_body: | | | | | Good morning folks, I’m up with a cup of coffee looking over our fundraising numbers ahead of tomorrow’s deadline. With one day to go, we still have $4,198 to raise. This is our first end-of-month deadline of 2022, and it’s crucial that we hit this goal: whatever we’re able to do now lays the groundwork for this campaign in the months ahead. That said, I’m personally asking if you can chip in $5 this morning and help us close the gap. Here’s a secure link you can use: I’m going to level with you: I’m facing 9 GOP opponents, and they’ve already opened their warchest and spent $2 million against me. They attacked me relentlessly in 2018, and I know they’re going to give it all they’ve got this time around. Well, folks, so are we. We’re building up our resources so we can go toe to toe with the attack ads, misinformation, and anything else they throw our way – and hitting our January fundraising goal is a huge part of that. I’m proud to have a campaign that is truly a people-powered movement, and I’m going to rely on this team more than ever in the coming months. I’ve got to get going soon, but I have to ask again: will you chip in $5 this morning? ** Thanks for reading, Steve Sent from my iPhone | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor** P.O. Box 850 Las Vegas, NV 89125 mailto:info@stevesisolak.com | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Sisolak for Nevada, please .

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: An important message from Cheri:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Do this for Cheri, for our Senate majority, and for the bright, prosperous future we can build together when we win:

#
**An important message from Cheri for you:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220130-1-ma&refcode2=327.357359.9Yp4WX&t=2&akid=327%2E357359%2E9Yp4WX)
[**Can Cheri count on you to make a $3 donation before tomorrow’s deadline to help us flip this seat? Like Cheri said, every donation puts us one step closer to making history.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22/?refcode=em220130-1-ma&refcode2=327.357359.9Yp4WX&t=3&akid=327%2E357359%2E9Yp4WX)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220130-1-ma&refcode2=327.357359.9Yp4WX&t=4&akid=327%2E357359%2E9Yp4WX)**
Tomorrow’s deadline is important.
It’s the first monthly deadline of 2022, and we cannot afford to fall short and risk handing this seat to Republicans.
We must reach our goal to demonstrate that our people-powered movement has what it takes to flip this seat.
So no amount is too small. It may not seem like $3 is enough to compete with the dark money in this race. But when everyone chips in what they can, it all adds up.
So please, do this for Cheri, for our Senate majority, and for the bright, prosperous future we can build together when we win:
[**Contribute $3 — or whatever you can afford — to Cheri Beasley’s campaign for U.S. Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22/?refcode=em220130-1-ma&refcode2=327.357359.9Yp4WX&t=5&akid=327%2E357359%2E9Yp4WX)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-jan22?refcode=em220130-1-ma&refcode2=327.357359.9Yp4WX&t=6&akid=327%2E357359%2E9Yp4WX)**
Thanks in advance for chipping in!
\- Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=7&akid=327%2E357359%2E9Yp4WX). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=327%2E357359%2E9Yp4WX). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=327_357359_9Yp4WX&akid=327%2E357359%2E9Yp4WX) today to help us make history.

Infrastructure that has to be prepared months in advance, infrastructure we need in order to win.** [**We need 68 people to chip in $15 before midnight tomorrow in order to hit our goal. Can you help us get there?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxESFgAaJ4OKOun5Smn6xf2JVyhrLs8S7PLWKrEJlop2TJyKr2W39Sg1Tz6SF8qXkju0j0MFCa8l48qVG3FbnT5gOd4S3qXndJDAg8XcVhn-e8nKHf55ugCPoMPAyMW0VCoy0ODxQEF-xalxbYUSHnZ7sNGoMqtLKe7Fx4tk-i301YCVzmqO3MPPh0zLbwr3PdEhSHKJV0ElDUVtLKMIyO_nTEyt_tzQVNb3wJkpz-czIgTl9ds-wmWfaKpBqD5VQFohqy9in0MvMA0SlCmzHANm921Oyx7NFN0VlJoQ1xVIGac/3j5/UKZ3Eo4OQW-6gjxHc58HWQ/h1/Lq9_EHKcjaDg_V9h07oPdsUdOxJk7u_RRKk1hU31Y0w) [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wNcOc6YQXgT3QRvIzDhxEShu6Xk24CEYpktAHyuEjXNtnLwoLKhCCWuZMnxZNtFHWmyf3KQoFoUm1Qc0cSk-8B5izGP0v0njdS_Xj8o3h5cRzXWsywgJeSvKu_0-rbGZDHoVRmrWuQvRk1qtWVyw50iKnWHt7bQYzmvZtRWvI1wDacJHy96dXul0xb7NNyhZ6PrBrHbSOCrbZCqlYu4ZUvSKj3uI1RClTiJoQn57c_ajavY-bxdxgf7s_u5huSVI1oaMYMwsrLKUjTmKj9J3lX-_CaQY83Pr0EY6WOY59dzfhzTEyLMvocx_Vyvy-AgjM/3j5/UKZ3Eo4OQW-6gjxHc58HWQ/h2/THOT4JN4SwNlcYjwK-b30R69JVKpaIZ69U50I_OjNt4) Corporate-funded candidate’s don’t need to worry about raising early. clean_body: We have to build a plan based on what we have now | | | Dear Team, Our June primary may seem far away, but the truth is, this period, right now, is when many of the most important decisions will be made.For so many progressive challengers, attention only arrives in the weeks before the primary, and the truth is, that’s just too late. The Chicago machine has infrastructure, ready and waiting, to crush anything in their way, and we can only count on the money we raise now, as we plan our pathway to victory. Every dollar raised in January pays for additional campaign infrastructure in June. Infrastructure that has to be prepared months in advance, infrastructure we need in order to win. Corporate-funded candidate’s don’t need to worry about raising early. The Corporate PACs that fund 73% of Danny Davis’s campaign—the third highest percentage of any Democrat in Congress—are there whenever he needs them. For us, it’s now or never. Thank you, Team Kina | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Can Michelle count on your support?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
I am the most principled, prepared, and electable candidate for Governor and am ready to serve on Day 1. | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=9a99e1078b&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | Dear Fellow Republicans,

On Tuesday, February 1, Republicans across the state will gather for precinct caucuses - the kick-off to our grassroots way of endorsing a candidate for Governor.

It’s clear to me: Republicans are ready for a more prosperous Minnesota.
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=c025485227&e=9d6926af69)
I am the most principled, prepared, and electable candidate for Governor and am ready to serve on Day 1.

**I’m asking for your support and vote to make Minnesota safer and stronger.

I also need your help on Tuesday sharing our message across the great state of Minnesota. **Print out my caucus letter and read it to your fellow caucus attendees. ** ****[ Click here to download and print Michelle's precinct caucus letter to read at your local caucus, urge others to support her, and be elected as a delegate to your next BPOU convention.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=057c0e161c&e=9d6926af69)**

Growing up in Murdock, MN I was taught that when you see a problem you know how to fix, you roll up your sleeves and get to work, and you stay until the job is done. In 2010, my Republican state senator had drifted from our values, so I challenged her and won the endorsement - and then the election.

I have championed our conservative principles at the Capitol ever since by fighting infringements of our freedom, protecting life, defending our constitution, and relentlessly battling against liberal, out-of-touch politicians who want to destroy our values.

My adherence to our principles has resulted in the most conservative lifetime voting record in the Senate by the American Conservative Union. I have utilized my experience as a Certified Public Accountant - along with the common sense of a suburban mom - to deliver meaningful results.

**We are building a campaign for a safer and stronger Minnesota that will re-invest in public safety, rebuild our post pandemic economy, put parents back in charge of our schools to get Minnesota back on track.**

Let's get to work letting our fellow Minnesotans know that our future is as bright as their dreams of it are. I ask for your support and vote at your local caucus.

Sincerely,
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=bc0e76e2a2&e=9d6926af69)
Michelle Benson

We’ll get right to the point, Peter. Our first fundraising deadline of 2022 is in TOMORROW, and we are still $1,822 short of our $9,042 goal.

While Biden, Pelosi, and the rest of the radical socialists -with Liz Cheney’s help- have spent the last year destroying everything President Trump worked to accomplish, I am fighting for you!
