clean_body: | | | | Every Patriot must step up. | We’ll get right to the point, Peter. Our first fundraising deadline of 2022 is in TOMORROW, and we are still $1,822 short of our $9,042 goal. While Biden, Pelosi, and the rest of the radical socialists -with Liz Cheney’s help- have spent the last year destroying everything President Trump worked to accomplish, I am fighting for you! We need to take back our Nation and stop the democrats! This is our FIRST fundraising deadline of 2022 and we cannot come up short. Email: info@hagemanforwyoming.com Country: United States of America January End-of-Month Donation Status:MISSING We are in a fight for the future of our nation, Peter. We can’t afford to let radical Democrats and their SOCIALIST agenda prevail. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

name: 2022 Membership Services
subject: We need you to STAY on our team. Renew your 2022 Membership today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 2 year membership streak is at risk. Renew now >>>
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3ebqr--fgxr-4qqlpo6&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 2 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpmr-4qqlpo4/ "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections is the toughest battle we’ve seen yet. This sets the stage for what’s to come for Republicans in 2024. If we fail to win back a Republican Majority in Congress, we will never take back the White House.

Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team, **[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpms-4qqlpo5/ "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2022 Republican Membership.")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpmt-4qqlpo6/ "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

You’ve fought with us for two consecutive years, and we need you to stick back our side as we go into battle this year.

We can’t win this fight without you. **[Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpmu-4qqlpo7/ "Renew your membership before it’s too late >>>")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpmv-4qqlpo8/ "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2022 Membership Services
Date: Wed, Jan 14, 2022 at 11:32 AM
Subject: **We hate to see you go.**
**[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpmw-4qqlpo9/ "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
**ATTN: Your Republican Membership has EXPIRED**
For the last **2 years** , you have consistently stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen, **but we have bad news for you.**

**It pains me to have to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though. I spoke with leadership about this special circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **[11:59 PM TONIGHT](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpmx-4qqlpo0/ "11:59 PM TONIGHT")**.

**[Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpmy-4qqlpo1/ "Are you going to renew your 2022 Membership and become a sustain Republican Member for 2 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left and you are going to let your streak fade away?")**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpmz-4qqlpo2/ "RENEW MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpn0-4qqlpo9/)
---

We’re approaching the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections will be the toughest election we’ve seen yet, and we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

**The Democrats raised over $130 MILLION last year alone.** We’re already behind, but with your help, we can close the gap, and take back the Conservative Majority in Congress.

You only have until **[11:59 PM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpn1-4qqlpo0/ "11:59 PM")** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpn2-4qqlpo1/ "Renew before it’s too late >>>")**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

---
| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpn3-4qqlpo2/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpn4-4qqlpo3/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpn5-4qqlpo4/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpn6-4qqlpo5/)
---
| Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. [NRCC.org](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3ebqr-1vpn7-4qqlpo6/)
---

320 First St SE
Washington, DC 20003

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246022/327962621/2058529741?refcode=AU_DVA_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTMzMTg1YS0yMDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DewgVCoaKmVYmCLMiyI3le9VtY0MWQP86YNZdA65cxQ=&emci=24f9c5db-8380-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=a133185a-2082-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=5086640)

subject: Need 10 more donors from 18326
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Running a grassroots campaign has always been crucial to Derek because he works for the people, not special interests. Small-dollar donations show that when we come together, we can build an economy that works for everyone and make our government work for the people again.

There's no better way to show the grassroots strength of our campaign than to keep growing our grassroots team with more donors in more places. That's why we're reaching out to folks ahead of the first end-of-month deadline of the election year to keep growing our small-dollar fueled campaign.

[**We need just 14 more donors from 18326 today to help reach our end-of-month donor goal of 400. Will you chip in $10 or more to help us reelect Derek and defend the House majority this year?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/eZYMxUf5W1Ft3wpDFsIsV662N65XK1tHorgT2bLmcRI=/-fyOcL6o4-B-fT0rEboEg9PCJNZymiP_GerwpVhkXhA=?refcode=em22_220128_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220128_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

There's so much at stake this election year. If we lose the House majority, we risk losing the progress we've made together on voting rights, environmental protections, COVID-19 relief, infrastructure, and more.

We have to keep up the momentum if we're going to win this year, and it starts with reaching our donor goal before the deadline.

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you, so anything you can contribute is a huge help. [**Chip in what you can before our end-of-month deadline on Monday to help us start the year strong.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/eZYMxUf5W1Ft3wpDFsIsV662N65XK1tHorgT2bLmcRI=/-fyOcL6o4-B-fT0rEboEg9PCJNZymiP_GerwpVhkXhA=?refcode=em22_220128_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220128_EOM2_fnd_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

name: Finance Team | Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: Will you give us a chance to explain?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Tomorrow at midnight is our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2022. We wanted to take a moment to explain why reaching our goal is so important and to ask for your support. Peter,

Tomorrow at midnight is our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2022. We wanted to take a moment to explain why reaching our goal is so important and to ask for your support.

As governor, Andy has been working hard to build a Commonwealth where everyone can live and thrive. He's already enacted infrastructure reform, public education improvements, voting rights expansions, and led Kentucky's economy through its best year on record. But there's still work to be done, and keeping Andy in the governor's office fighting for progress won't be easy.

Republicans have their sights set on taking back this governor's seat in 2023, and they're ready to do whatever it takes to win. Two Republican opponents have already announced their campaigns against Andy, and a wealthy, self-funded challenger may jump in the race soon.

It's only a matter of time before the attacks and outside money flood our state again to try and defeat Andy and undo the progress we've made. That's why we're counting on your support to help us hit our first end-of-month fundraising goal of 2022 so we can be prepared for the tough fight ahead.

**[Will you chip in $5 or more before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight? With your support, we can help Andy continue making progress for Kentuckians.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246168/327962912/-758409691?refcode=em22_220130_eom3_fnd_gq_act___ft_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220130_eom3_fnd_gq_act___ft_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTMzMTg1YS0yMDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TqK8XyCGH5UeqhOA7vFyhzlT6H6FNeatuGyLfG8aPMU=)**

clean_body: Tomorrow at midnight is our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2022. We wanted to take a moment to explain why reaching our goal is so important and to ask for your support. Peter, Tomorrow at midnight is our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2022. We wanted to take a moment to explain why reaching our goal is so important and to ask for your support. As governor, Andy has been working hard to build a Commonwealth where everyone can live and thrive. He's already enacted infrastructure reform, public education improvements, voting rights expansions, and led Kentucky's economy through its best year on record. But there's still work to be done, and keeping Andy in the governor's office fighting for progress won't be easy. Republicans have their sights set on taking back this governor's seat in 2023, and they're ready to do whatever it takes to win. Two Republican opponents have already announced their campaigns against Andy, and a wealthy, self-funded challenger may jump in the race soon. It's only a matter of time before the attacks and outside money flood our state again to try and defeat Andy and undo the progress we've made. That's why we're counting on your support to help us hit our first end-of-month fundraising goal of 2022 so we can be prepared for the tough fight ahead. = Thanks, Team Beshear | | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign. = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

clean_body: They just sent Kamala to Wisconsin... | Friend, Right as we were beginning to pull away from Tony Evers in this toss-up governor’s race, Kamala Harris just came to Wisconsin to try and save his failing campaign. The Democrats know that Evers’ entire campaign strategy is simply to BUY his reelection... It’s why the DGA has built a war chest of more than $54 million to prop up his campaign, and that’s on top of the $10.5 million in cash on hand Evers already has at his disposal. Needless to say, Monday’s end-of-month deadline – our FIRST of the election year – will be the ultimate test for our campaign. But with just 48 hours to go until the deadline, we’re still $16,818 behind. Friend, if we fall short come Monday night, Evers and his allies will take it as a sign of weakness and swiftly spend their millions to double down on their lying attacks against me. Evers already DOUBLED our recent ad buy this month to drown out our new ad that exposes how his school closures are harming our children. We cannot allow him to continue this trend of owning the ad market. But to marshal the resources we need to fight back, we MUST hit our goal for the first end-of-month deadline. And we can’t get the job done without YOUR sustained support. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. | | Peter, This is an incredibly challenging time for working parents and these are challenges that Meghann and I are feeling too. [**More on that in a second, but first, our end-of-month deadline ends tomorrow at midnight. Will you chip in $25 or more towards my campaign to bring real leadership to Western NC?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246201/327962950/857792826?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220130_FR_EOM5CovidEdu_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTMzMTg1YS0yMDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QHwJPuB-5NIcleOvVNav38pkDxrR362TAu_5dLicrME=) | | | [Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246202/327962951/857792826?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220130_FR_EOM5CovidEdu_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTMzMTg1YS0yMDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QHwJPuB-5NIcleOvVNav38pkDxrR362TAu_5dLicrME=)
---
| | [Other Amount ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246203/327962952/857792826?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_220130_FR_EOM5CovidEdu_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTMzMTg1YS0yMDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QHwJPuB-5NIcleOvVNav38pkDxrR362TAu_5dLicrME=)
---
In the past few weeks, we’ve seen both our twins’ daycare and our older son’s elementary school have to close or go virtual because of COVID-19. These were tough decisions for school leaders and you can see the strain on teachers’ faces.
For working families, this sets into motion a ripple effect of hard choices and pressure points. Most parents I know are exhausted right now and for many that is compounded by other issues – the expiration of the Child Tax Credit, which was providing critical support for groceries and diapers; staffing shortages at their jobs which means everyone is working more and harder; scrambling to find COVID-19 tests and then holding your crying child as they get tested; the tough realities of inflation and how that impacts your grocery bill and filling up the gas tank.
This all hits home for me as a mom. And it motivates me as a candidate – we need someone representing WNC who gets these issues, prioritizes them, and will fight for the policies that help working families.
As a mom, my number one priority for my children is to protect their health and safety. And as a county commissioner and candidate for Congress, my number one priority is to help my constituents and meet voters where they are.
As COVID-19 cases continue to rise in Western North Carolina, we decided to postpone all of our in-person events. I’m proud of our team’s decision, but this means we’ll really have to dig deep right now to build the right foundation for the rest of the year.
It’s even more urgent now that the North Carolina Supreme Court has agreed to hear an appeal to overrule Republicans’ gerrymandered maps and decide when filing opens as well as when the primary will take place.
We have to be nimble and prepared for a range of scenarios. In order to reach our end-of-month goal, we’ll need folks like you to step up and chip in to this email. So, I have to humbly ask:

clean_body: | = | | Peter, This is an incredibly challenging time for working parents and these are challenges that Meghann and I are feeling too. = | | | = | | = In the past few weeks, we’ve seen both our twins’ daycare and our older son’s elementary school have to close or go virtual because of COVID-19. These were tough decisions for school leaders and you can see the strain on teachers’ faces. For working families, this sets into motion a ripple effect of hard choices and pressure points. Most parents I know are exhausted right now and for many that is compounded by other issues – the expiration of the Child Tax Credit, which was providing critical support for groceries and diapers; staffing shortages at their jobs which means everyone is working more and harder; scrambling to find COVID-19 tests and then holding your crying child as they get tested; the tough realities of inflation and how that impacts your grocery bill and filling up the gas tank. This all hits home for me as a mom. And it motivates me as a candidate – we need someone representing WNC who gets these issues, prioritizes them, and will fight for the policies that help working families. As a mom, my number one priority for my children is to protect their health and safety. And as a county commissioner and candidate for Congress, my number one priority is to help my constituents and meet voters where they are. As COVID-19 cases continue to rise in Western North Carolina, we decided to postpone all of our in-person events. I’m proud of our team’s decision, but this means we’ll really have to dig deep right now to build the right foundation for the rest of the year. It’s even more urgent now that the North Carolina Supreme Court has agreed to hear an appeal to overrule Republicans’ gerrymandered maps and decide when filing opens as well as when the primary will take place. We have to be nimble and prepared for a range of scenarios. In order to reach our end-of-month goal, we’ll need folks like you to step up and chip in to this email. So, I have to humbly ask: = As a valued member of this team, we will always be transparent with you about our fundraising and where we stand. Hey there, friend.

Fun fact, Montana’s 1st Congressional District covers about 48,000 square miles in Western Montana. As you can imagine, running a campaign in a district as large as ours – against a former Trump Administration official no less – can get very expensive very _quickly_.

**That’s why we want to be transparent about what we do with your donations. The money you donate goes directly to:**
* Filling the gas tank for when Cora’s on the road meeting with voters
* Creating digital ads to engage voters we can't reach face-to-face
* Sending educational mailers to voters in our district
* Producing literature to hand out to voters at events and meet-and-greets
* Launching our get-out-vote program to get folks to the polls
* And much, much more...

We think it’s important to communicate that these monthly goals aren’t arbitrary, they’re the _minimum_ amount we need to educate and engage voters and build momentum to beat Ryan Zinke.

[**So if you haven't yet, could you rush a donation now to elect Cora Neumann to Congress in Montana? I'm proud to share that I've joined Max's team doing constituent outreach here in the North State. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41240050/327931791/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWM0ZTE4NS1mNzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNNOpuTP-8-vjC3TjL52s5xEG8n8Fqge7KSL4yi2Bek=)
Hey there, friend.

My name is Greg, and I'm proud to share that I've joined Max's team doing constituent outreach here in the North State.

Like Max, I served in the Army. After serving in uniform abroad and here at home in law enforcement, I learned the importance of listening and working together to find real solutions. **Max has shown me that these traits are important to him, too. ** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41240051/327931792/360059203?refcode=em-1.30.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OWM0ZTE4NS1mNzgxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sNNOpuTP-8-vjC3TjL52s5xEG8n8Fqge7KSL4yi2Bek=) I love this community, and one thing I know for sure is that Doug LaMalfa does not represent his constituents well. Rather than deal with real issues, he played politics and voted to uphold the "Big Lie." I prefer honorable leaders aligned with truth and grounded in reality.

[**I look forward to hitting the ground running to spread the word about Max across our community. But first, we have a big fundraising deadline at the end of this month, and we're still coming up short. Your support helps us get on the road, recruit more supporters, print literature, and even throw up some billboards across the North State. Every bit helps, and every dollar will go a long way in spreading the word.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’m ready to move forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — my first end-of-month deadline of the year is 24 hours away and I cannot express how important it is that we hit our goal so we’re prepared for the months ahead. The GOP is still carrying out their voter disenfranchisement crusade. Fighting to pass suppression and subversion bills in nearly every state across our nation. They’re gerrymandering districts to dilute the voice of the American people. And they’re raising millions of dollars from corporations and special interest groups to boost Republican campaigns, run attack ads, and spread their dangerous rhetoric and misinformation. If we can keep our slim House Majority and add one or two Senate seats, we’ll have the votes to bypass the filibuster and protect voting rights, pass House legislation to raise the minimum wage, protect our climate, enshrine _Roe v. Wade_ as law, pass immigration reform, and more. **That’s what the American people voted for, and it’s what we need to deliver over the next three years.** But Derek, first we need to win the midterms. None of this is possible if Republicans take back either chamber of Congress. If we lose the House or the Senate, Republicans will grind everything in Congress to a halt and create years of partisan gridlock heading into the 2024 election. And it’s not enough to maintain our current majority. We need to strengthen our majorities in the Senate or we risk setting our country back decades. I’m ready to move forward and pass comprehensive reform that benefits all Americans. **If you’re with me, can you chip in $10 right now to help us reach our end-of-month goal before tomorrow’s deadline? Every dollar makes a difference when our work is this important.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246417/327963840/1138271422?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDMzMTg1YS0yMDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4wXwE555q1pj_qXvXu6oUwiWtZ_tL6oCNkAQtXSE1e8=)

Americans deserve the right to vote and to choose elected leaders. This struggle for fair and free elections has gone on for far too long. Extremists are openly attempting to roll back the progress that’s been made in the hopes of gerrymandering their way to victory.
**[We are going to organize ourselves so well, that Republican attempts to cheat and destroy democracy will fail. Join me in this fight and donate whatever you can!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246540/327964269/-308349234?refcode=220129-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjEzODEyOC0yMjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8sWIPTJVdIA7w3j5dA7l72cAxs3Kv3GGIgzqQ2R2TE=)**
Together, we are going to build a movement and win this race.
In solidarity,
Ben Samuels
Candidate for Congress

body:
Republicans have raked in millions to take back the Senate majority. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246567/327964488/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIyYzE3Yi0yMjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEcIXvX3IRjeIZdmxxQ6mmzgMjC-EBatxIqXf62SHi4=&emci=1593cd73-2282-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=3eb2c17b-2282-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, when **[we ask you to chip in to our campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246568/327964489/1676867678?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIyYzE3Yi0yMjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEcIXvX3IRjeIZdmxxQ6mmzgMjC-EBatxIqXf62SHi4=)** , we’re not only asking you to help re-elect Martin — though that’s an important part of it. We’re also inviting you to help us invest in electing strong Democrats up and down the ballot — which couldn’t be more important at a time when voting and reproductive rights are under attack. That means supporting local and state parties in New Mexico, and making sure Democrats like Raphael Warnock in Georgia and Mark Kelly in Arizona can keep their seats and protect the Democratic majority. **But we can’t continue our work at the pace needed if we don’t meet our January fundraising goal — and right now, we’re falling short. That’s why we’re coming to you to ask if you’ll chip in $3 (yes, really, just $3!) ahead of our end-of-month deadline to support Martin and Democrats at every level of government. Your $3 and the $3 of the next person who donates — and the next — will add up and make a powerful difference.** [DONATE $3 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246569/327964490/1676867678?amount=3&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20220130_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWIyYzE3Yi0yMjgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xEcIXvX3IRjeIZdmxxQ6mmzgMjC-EBatxIqXf62SHi4=) Thanks for your support. It means a lot to Martin and our team. Team Heinrich
---
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
---
Senator Martin Heinrich is committed to helping New Mexico become a leader in defense, tech, and energy with opportunities in every corner. name: Team Fetterman
subject: re: This point last month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The truth is...
#
Derek,
This isn’t the email we want to be sending with 1 1⁄2 days left before our end-of-month deadline — our FIRST critical deadline of 2022.
It’s a downer, but it’s important that we are as transparent as possible. Truthfully, despite a ton of effort, it looks like we’re falling behind on our goal.
**In fact, we’re a little more than $121,000 behind what we raised via email**by this point last month.****
A slowdown after a big end-of-year push is pretty normal for campaigns, but with the primary just over four months away, we don’t have the room to slow down.
**[Derek, do you think you could chip in for the first time before our big deadline? Any amount would help us close this shortfall — whether you can afford $5, $25, or more.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42262?refcode=ema20220130-4392&t=1&akid=4392%2E434096%2EvH6eHr)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42262?refcode=em20220130-4392&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4392%2E434096%2EvH6eHr)**
The GOP would *love* to see us fall short. They know John is the ONLY candidate who can flip this seat and beat a Republican in the general election, according to the latest public polling
**That was the bad news, but here's the good news:** We’ve still got a day and a half left to turn this around. We *might* still be able to make up all this ground. Let’s leave it all on the field and see if we can close up as much of the gap as possible.
**[Add your very first contribution right now to help us boost our numbers. We've got a really good feeling that we can turn this around if we see more folks from 18326 chip in even a modest amount.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42262?refcode=ema20220130-4392&t=21&akid=4392%2E434096%2EvH6eHr)**
No matter what happens when the clock strikes midnight on Monday, we should be proud of what we’ve accomplished so far. We’re running a competitive campaign — the kind that can WIN — and doing it with grassroots funding instead of the old school way of taking corporate PAC money and relying on big donors.
Thank you, truly, for being part of this momentous effort.
— Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220130-4392-footer&t=22&refcode2=4392_434096_vH6eHr&akid=4392%2E434096%2EvH6eHr)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=23&akid=4392%2E434096%2EvH6eHr)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=4392%2E434096%2EvH6eHr)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Dr. Raul Ruiz (personal)
subject: I’ll make this quick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE
body:
sorry to be so direct | | |

clean_body: sorry to be so direct | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Hey, sorry to email so late but this is really important. I know your inbox is probably full of fundraising emails, but I hope you can see that this one is different. I don’t rely on corporate donors or dark money groups like my opponents do. | | | | | | | Thanks for everything, Congressman Dr. Raul Ruiz P.S. - I'm attaching my message from yesterday in case you missed it! \--- Original Message -- TO:dpwillis67@gmail.com FROM: Dr. Raul Ruiz (personal) SUBJECT: I’ll make this quick | | | I’m emailing you to ask for $5. Far-right Republicans are targeting me, and experts say that I’m running in a vastly different district. But it’s not all doom and gloom -- I just talked to my Finance Director and she said if we raise $2,500 today, we’ll get back on track! | | | | | | National Republicans are committed to stealing this seat. They defeated four California Democrats in 2020. | | | | | | I can’t do this without you, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress , please .

Peter,

Since we announced my race for Governor last year, a lot has happened.

* We’ve traveled across Arkansas meeting thousands of supporters.
* We’ve crushed fundraising records at every turn!
* And we’ve got the Radical Left running scared.

But Peter - we are just getting started!

Now that the election year has officially begun, we’re ramping up our efforts to share our message of defending our right to be free of socialism and tyranny, preserving our Second Amendment rights, and protecting our freedom of speech and religious liberty.

**_And we need you on our side to start this year off as strong as we ended the last. Will you chip in now to make our FIRST fundraising deadline of the year a HUGE success?_****_
_**

[**_YES: CHIP IN NOW >>_**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=cf0a7426b6424a37be394ec762125e27&_e=qkZPqA_q7-xHve0CERXSdTKLWTtozxz0uzFeP9weBR_TBn8mEYV3u1aBz9IoCOL_RsGUZtWUop_XWjBIpGKAIXzu7F1e4lRHXn_SPBUfQHmJT4KA-85sIE6gKgtSGrq5JYb4KhdU55vRK_QYkmGhN-StQcGXkBsOrSaFazjuDlvE9ToqVUI50TYPOcKv_8wMhF88ZTgrtxOfEf5lOyD0lPZElrlG2jNnKiNTf1wMO-6anK0j5VwSOft-I1d1Fy-SwwIng-vQ6Q7MdLNuRCrEnIVhN3phhv7TQtw8_eAVacbIETKu9rKUZZYU4cF_JiLMt5rC65POSF8V4smvJjNPWQS0UcY72qfOLDTZdqLIx_qP1q9N6E61Edt7SqSuw4v6ED7KoG3eXDx0jeuQl-BysEac3492wrxZojNtZtam_V-w_dfk3uVsYBDmwT5z7g7i)**__**** **

**That’s because the American people know the truth: the Biden presidency is a disaster and we are on the front lines fighting back.**

That's made our campaign a top target for the far-left.

But I will not be intimidated. I will only fight harder to defend the freedoms of the hard-working men and women who make this country great.

clean_body: Now that the election year has officially begun, we’re ramping up our efforts to share our message of defending our right to be free of socialism and | | ALERT: OUR FIRST FUNDRAISING DEADLINE OF THE YEAR IS TOMORROW. Peter, Since we announced my race for Governor last year, a lot has happened. We’ve traveled across Arkansas meeting thousands of supporters. We’ve crushed fundraising records at every turn! And we’ve got the Radical Left running scared. But Peter - we are just getting started! Now that the election year has officially begun, we’re ramping up our efforts to share our message of defending our right to be free of socialism and tyranny, preserving our Second Amendment rights, and protecting our freedom of speech and religious liberty. And we need you on our side to start this year off as strong as we ended the last. Will you chip in now to make our FIRST fundraising deadline of the year a HUGE success?** We know we’ve got momentum on our side. That’s because the American people know the truth: the Biden presidency is a disaster and we are on the front lines fighting back. That's made our campaign a top target for the far-left. But I will not be intimidated. I will only fight harder to defend the freedoms of the hard-working men and women who make this country great. Please, use these links to make an immediate donation. By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution If you've saved payment information with Revv, your donation will go through automatically. | Thank you, Sarah Huckabee Sanders | | | | | | | Paid for by Sarah for Governor | | PO Box 26340, Little Rock, AR 72221 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Ron Johnson is a superspreader of vaccine and election misinformation. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246746/327965335/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYmIzYTc4My0yNTgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DRH9PtF0Nmz17byHlaCiMorAOvNdpLULtJp46XU_ZWA=&emci=a6557054-8d80-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=fbb3a783-2582-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=25515813) | Team, This month, Ron Johnson took his COVID misinformation campaign to new levels. name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Nearly 50% of Idahoans think Brad Little is a good governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Hey Peter,I noticed that you are not donating monthly to my campaign yet. My goal is to get thousands of people donating a little bit so that a few people do not have to give a lot. _Nearly 50% of Idahoans think that Brad Little is a great governor._ THEY DON'T KNOW IDAHO WAS THE FIRST STATE TO ARREST PEOPLE FOR GOING TO CHURCH or the first state to arrest a mother for taking her children to the park. They don't know that Governor Little has increased food stamps and government housing programs more than any other state, attracting those that don't want to work to Idaho. They don't know that Governor Brad Little has taken over $18,000,000,000 from the federal government in COVID funds and is spending it without any legislative oversight _or that he took this money and agreed to force federal COVID mandates down upon the People of Idaho._ They don't know these things, SO WE ARE INFORMING THEM! Every time we hold a Townhall meeting people can't believe what I show them. They are upset with Idaho leadership and want to correct the issues. WE JUST NEED TO REACH MORE PEOPLE BEFORE THE ELECTION! _We need you to donate monthly so we can reach them!_ Making good videos takes money, sending out social media ads takes money, mailers take money, traveling the state takes money, radio ads take money, TV ads take money. I _have some of the most capable people in Idaho on my team but we are constantly held back because we do not have enough funds!_ We are grateful when people donate hundreds or thousands of dollars all at once but WE NEED YOU TO DONATE MONTHLY! $20 a month is a good start. If you can do more then that is even better. We are correcting the narrative across Idaho but we need you to donate monthly so we can increase the pace before the elections! _Governor Brad Little and his buddies are taking Idaho down the same path that Oregon went down, WE CAN STOP THIS!_ We need your help to Keep Idaho IDAHO! **PLEASE DONATE MONTHLY TODAY!**

[](https://www.votebundy.com/donate/)
Thank you!Ammon Bundy
P.S. On January 7, 2022 (this month) Governor Little issued a proclamation informing Idahoans that they are still under his Emergency Power [(see proclamation)](https://team.votebundy.com/asset/news/d8a8570b-a155-4b94-b88b-dd584e62a308/january-7-2022-idaho-still-in-emergenc-status.pdf).

* * *

You received this email because your email address was submitted to us through [our website](https://www.votebundy.com). If you did not authorize use of this email address, or no longer wish to receive such messages, please simply [unsubscribe](https://team.votebundy.com/unsubscribe?id=8d545fe0-6532-4b1e-8220-7189428a1194) to immediately have your address removed from our mailing list.

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: this race could decide Senate control (via NBC)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Cheri Beasley would make history in November as North Carolina’s first Black senator.
| | |
---
Friend, there are currently no Black women serving in the U.S. Senate – and that needs to change. That’s why I’m _all in_ to elect Cheri Beasley in North Carolina, where she would make history as the state’s first Black senator.
During her long career in public service, Cheri has seen firsthand how the laws made in Washington too often fail working people – first as a judge, then as the first Black woman to serve as chief justice of the North Carolina Supreme Court. Now, she’s running to fight tirelessly in the Senate for all those who have been left out and left behind. And she’s got a real chance to win.
**CNN ranks North Carolina as one of the most likely Senate seats to flip blue in November – but that’s exactly why the GOP is already pouring MILLIONS into this race to defeat her. I promised Cheri that this team could raise $15,000 by midnight tonight to help her fight back, so I’m asking you directly:**
**[Will you split a donation of $5 or more now between Cheri Beasley’s campaign and mine so we can flip North Carolina blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246817/327965821/2054470355?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1620-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGRiMjQ1Ni0yNzgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBlI3b9HWf83B4q4sj_IsvJ2j5O1j5N_jRo9ip1UDJE=)**
With experts at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight saying that Republicans are _favored_ to take back the Senate, we need to compete everywhere we possibly can to prevent a Mitch McConnell-controlled majority – and **NBC reports that Cheri’s race in North Carolina could very well determine Senate control.**
In a battleground race this close, it’s all going to come down to resources. But with time running out before Monday’s critical midnight deadline, Cheri is way behind her end-of-month fundraising goal. **The only way she’s going to be able to go up against the GOP’s super PACs – and protect and _expand_ the Senate for Democrats – is if grassroots supporters like you give now to help her close this gap.**
**[Please, friend, rush $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before the crucial end-of-month deadline – to help Cheri Beasley win her historic Senate race in North Carolina and defend our razor-thin Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246818/327965822/2054470355?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1620-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGRiMjQ1Ni0yNzgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBlI3b9HWf83B4q4sj_IsvJ2j5O1j5N_jRo9ip1UDJE=)**

Thank you,

Jacky
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41246819/327965823/2054470355?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1620-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMGRiMjQ1Ni0yNzgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GBlI3b9HWf83B4q4sj_IsvJ2j5O1j5N_jRo9ip1UDJE=)

Our end-of-January deadline is tomorrow and we need your support. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQlgsG2vIuVirkYNn0JGTOr1NuUSOlwGUycU7dsRTolrRUwBbC7X-crr9XAwUDGHVKBJdqow8d6THRSLPQV4sutVZiYTZ1zlOdgKgvJc3eyPgnkR_h6XP1EL8l7Cq97f4SLSpeu_hJ5_HatAO8rXoJAX2ZFIv4NRF9w-DOWet-5PO22VDpDLdeQ_840p88AOVHq0ksKOOqLg1Em_jHobFM7QxoAY-B4kOIwcv78mSqPW6OSLBP4odbFXqREBVv3mWb8TI_JnkuxDTzk4w-_aejBF/3j5/BIw2twpBQEmCk8BFDGItfg/h0/C2K-NqrVljffjum0CR3qIVlPpYPkj8vAY3j7mzar9vA) Peter, did you get our last email? If not, we’ll give you a quick update: We’re just $3,874 away from meeting our $18,000 end-of-January goal. Hitting this goal is critical since we’re now just 15 days away from early voting. **The amount of money we raise now between Feb. 14th is so critical. The more money we get, the more we can fund our resources to inform voters why Jessica Cisneros is the better candidate for TX-28 rather than Henry Cuellar, who’s currently under investigation by the FBI.** [**_We have until tomorrow to close the gap. We’re not taking a single cent from corporate PACs or special interests. We’re relying on support from grassroots activists like you. Can you give $5 to help us hit our goal and unseat Henry Cuellar?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCgUwqXZN74hKQiH4JsSlmcIQFkWOiO9JZaPDRTUmvWH0GmLLLiSmTxNC_Gi3ogzT858FLr39Ucb6IdFHj-801nztGyI3M4SxXJRNbpdi16y7i0gJEyycC8DaGlu6IFM00M4Ib6p8IrsCT8Csm8caLMA3fvVweiqh2dTJm0_GwPrmkfeJ0torJqGFkTReI93SyzePL9p4ik_Lm3UJYr58srqvi4QrW7q-7Oofjvyem351CBD_gG5WwtLP_spjx46dSf55OUdVBiuYxObYYJ_M1HyYCJL7H3fe3hOIMdEIDvZlLDq-s8hxi-Pfc2PHjEBvd7BgUvnpa07GL-8gAyE5LaQ/3j5/BIw2twpBQEmCk8BFDGItfg/h1/wr5CqrPQPy-SEpk0-FCWbFz04jr2V76SnThG11nNcgs) [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCgUwqXZN74hKQiH4JsSlmcIQFkWOiO9JZaPDRTUmvWH0dUPcw8xFoJQBjZh_IprgKVYyLls-yIpgYk_8uUkV7_vyw0t36zdA9J0iT7CRhICKiPb1Zs_MK6KC6u4ZSDfhTaFOS4cj2WM3RsrrUkbcIAgxvG6tqol6vUIcwEEykvpgo_BairLmi2Fg5zwso7rIN5UbUgtRZKtOD-PoOv57LLiUxRTJoKyNFGGHb6cAl34vl5z0Kx3Aqp-JF54A9v4EYfj57ocd8QAVuyimr-ke5ghXaF2JZjSu0b6Bn1l1bWGVjGFTaBoM5rI_zlVrXJCdgzUyDn2lrRlFnh69s1aQ_iQ/3j5/BIw2twpBQEmCk8BFDGItfg/h2/gxx7vP-_E83jSi_bEMlhH4jXSukRtirEzYKsCBhEfy8) Thank you, Regina M.

Sender: Team Cisneros
Date: Sunday, January 30, 2022
Subject: Good news and bad news

Peter, we have some good news and bad news. **First, here’s the good news:** Our campaign to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress has gained a ton of traction. Voters are now realizing it’s too risky to re-elect Henry Cuellar at a time when he’s being investigated by the FBI. _They are hungry for a representative who is transparent and honest._ **Now, here’s the bad news:** Despite all the attention that our campaign has received, we’re still $6,776 short of hitting our $18,000 end-of-January goal and Cuellar’s corporate donors are spending _millions_ to re-elect him. [**_But we have a chance to turn this around. If just [5] supporters in 34223 chips in anything to this email, we can grow our movement even further to unseat far-right Democrat Henry Cuellar. So if you’re ready to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress, will you chip in $5 now?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCgUwqXZN74hKQiH4JsSlmcIQFkWOiO9JZaPDRTUmvWH2uGhVmzY9Fg80iJ7KdN8AqAIeMGMcX5zZEavirQOzVyk65H18qAzB-wfHfzOne3xLBFNxKIHw2x8ILMo2VWJeI3IMtCDD7TZYvQFQPQOggrSqfXvIe-5y5kS0Al9w4B7fnR25dfKsTF-Ljsnp5AOWPt9QLR-1LIN9S8NkEhzfxn2MllWsBWUwWObMwfJOlSAUHKTpiXM7Y44QyErVE6vRUx69qGzHHBGs8fcQiXA_FpFG0VHgMU1ta1uTM76cwoyoWxijg_rWzuOVnBl27MCzjgdeDovPmTkpVdyFOr7VeMQ/3j5/BIw2twpBQEmCk8BFDGItfg/h3/HdINDDPH3dCaADtGEm6lYo-ds7N9r214gkJXLe8Mu1w) [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCgUwqXZN74hKQiH4JsSlmcIQFkWOiO9JZaPDRTUmvWH32yov2_1as_KcqysS72cQ_1fu-hBmZ0b9kPN4UMZ0EiNou3wlS8buYd9H1vPwURbWvY6cXcVQJnCM1P3wEAIA1hsqz5_w8y5WV0JJGekpp8BxwxqKzqPgew8HVNoH_AICiV_pWYKd4jf_cGzE9gcn_L5lm2qwFEVS7gBQelS9qJ4AI6MiKmOC3E8XBPKaAumegW5Ix47uvN_2IF-cZG8k_MPXUcXMcsYPnHmGbzqb_W2bLWSZSpeCU4F42q61nlcVh9hcQpeku8dJogfPacJPxoW_1zJdRmcYzNjruzUzC5g/3j5/BIw2twpBQEmCk8BFDGItfg/h4/M9Ghc6k4d26DY4OJgm0zaD5zxDa_KTCEi5Fkx-4dTWM)Although we don’t know much beyond what was reported in the news, it’s safe to bet that voters in Texas’ 28th District will think twice about casting a ballot for Cuellar after hearing about the investigation. Just recently, Henry Cuellar put out a statement saying that despite his involvement in an ongoing FBI investigation, he “intends to win” this election. But the fact of the matter is, Peter, that he can’t hide his record:
* Cuellar has received campaign money from the for-profit detention centers that rip our families apart, and thousands of dollars from the NRA.

* He consistently votes with Republicans — as a matter of fact, he’s voted more than 70% of the time with Donald Trump under his presidency.

* He’s a staunch anti-choice Democrat who voted against codifying Roe v. Wade into federal law.

This goes to show that South Texans — and our country as a whole — deserve far better than what Henry Cuellar is offering. And we have a real chance to replace him with a true Progressive like Jessica Cisneros who will fight for all Americans and their best interests. **Not corporations or special interest groups.** [**_But for her to win, she needs a strong base of grassroots supporters by her side to help steer her campaign towards victory. Can we rely on your support to help us close out January strong and elect Jessica to Congress on March 1st?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCgUwqXZN74hKQiH4JsSlmcIQFkWOiO9JZaPDRTUmvWH0kDKwK5YOodvYwKXUB4czrirJXhqglAMJeQA_G-NvOFil_WeahSxojhbkgXFeJok_pZ2wArQtjnO3nsumxGiIgBzaDTJ82T94vkV_jI3jAdtD25bjENOWPb9yqG4ho32LSddAj-HBTTbyTMicv597WVfTE7lHI46NC1mc5kSvp0PA9mhi4aHJTCWjj5s1sGMa0ZUlmGSCoYaIUCisv4Azfw6NWlgXMMMF4BVQ-bIxe70q_DPptzmBCODuWWjz134vuy6JX_1wZBMBp2kAs-5O_knZrHx7I8cm-FgdVsV_sxA/3j5/BIw2twpBQEmCk8BFDGItfg/h5/Q2brvGXwtnD5E1NWCaREaYY8vsF0Dv-x3umOgKpCkDE) [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zAq9BM_Xlfm-G9JMYK5BQCgUwqXZN74hKQiH4JsSlmcIQFkWOiO9JZaPDRTUmvWH1360baD71G39CLBLLz5baUnqGDjARazjsN9IQdgPqIqAsQSc9CkhTZBgNnUViz__kKYefkpuHhj8NsIG7_IlH95kw11K11Ir98oAs7h5dXpJEL4klZok0Iuk-ckkKmZxlA93Dd0mJv4KK8Vo6paFibAYeoymvkspJiHsuZfcNeDjYOiwH_oWe_9ArJdTi66BacvBnSoURvNia42QB9yDeI5V9Jfhc1ADx9GQ0GIddkEkS0TOCjQ0SZTo28NMOT-xU-lLPY-O4R3PSTntuNd-Z0CSW0Vl0itpoN4SxDlcAbAg/3j5/BIw2twpBQEmCk8BFDGItfg/h6/3O2ezfAxokahs_A8lF0gvrkn0jTms1QqvYuY8ASSTNk)Although we don’t know much beyond what was reported in the news, it’s safe to bet that voters in Texas’ 28th District will think twice about casting a ballot for Cuellar after hearing about the investigation. clean_body: Our end-of-January deadline is tomorrow and we need your support. | | | Peter, did you get our last email? If not, we’ll give you a quick update: We’re just $3,874 away from meeting our $18,000 end-of-January goal. Hitting this goal is critical since we’re now just 15 days away from early voting. The amount of money we raise now between Feb. 14th is so critical. The more money we get, the more we can fund our resources to inform voters why Jessica Cisneros is the better candidate for TX-28 rather than Henry Cuellar, who’s currently under investigation by the FBI. Thank you, Regina M. Campaign Manager, Team Cisneros \--------Forwarded message-------- Sender: Team Cisneros Date: Sunday, January 30, 2022 Subject: Good news and bad news Peter, we have some good news and bad news. First, here’s the good news: Our campaign to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress has gained a ton of traction. Voters are now realizing it’s too risky to re-elect Henry Cuellar at a time when he’s being investigated by the FBI. They are hungry for a representative who is transparent and honest. Now, here’s the bad news: Despite all the attention that our campaign has received, we’re still $6,776 short of hitting our $18,000 end-of-January goal and Cuellar’s corporate donors are spending millions to re-elect him. [But we have a chance to turn this around. If just [5] supporters in 34223 chips in anything to this email, we can grow our movement even further to unseat far-right Democrat Henry Cuellar. So if you’re ready to send Jessica Cisneros to Congress, will you chip in $5 now?]() we don’t know much beyond what was reported in the news, it’s safe to bet that voters in Texas’ 28th District will think twice about casting a ballot for Cuellar after hearing about the investigation. Just recently, Henry Cuellar put out a statement saying that despite his involvement in an ongoing FBI investigation, he “intends to win” this election. But the fact of the matter is, Peter, that he can’t hide his record: Cuellar has received campaign money from the for-profit detention centers that rip our families apart, and thousands of dollars from the NRA. He consistently votes with Republicans — as a matter of fact, he’s voted more than 70% of the time with Donald Trump under his presidency. He’s a staunch anti-choice Democrat who voted against codifying Roe v. Wade into federal law. This goes to show that South Texans — and our country as a whole — deserve far better than what Henry Cuellar is offering. And we have a real chance to replace him with a true Progressive like Jessica Cisneros who will fight for all Americans and their best interests. Not corporations or special interest groups.** we don’t know much beyond what was reported in the news, it’s safe to bet that voters in Texas’ 28th District will think twice about casting a ballot for Cuellar after hearing about the investigation. We’ve already shown our opponent and the establishment once before that our movement is strong enough to withstand this fight, now let’s show them just how strong we really are. Thank you, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Emily @ Team Benson
subject: Let’s talk campaign fundraising… honestly
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
Hey friend,

My name is Emily Mellits. I’m a proud mom of two wonderful kids, Carter and Ellie, and a German Shepherd named Piper. I also help manage the finances for Jocelyn’s campaign and that’s why I’m reaching out to talk about our fundraising progress this month.

Now, I’m not going to mislead you with some ‘all caps' headline about needing to donate in the next 10 minutes or the sky will fall rhetoric. That’s not how I roll and that’s not what this campaign is about.

I’m reaching out because, yes, we have a monthly fundraising goal to hit but also to give you an honest and clear understanding about why we are asking you to pitch in with a contribution today.

We have just over nine months left in this campaign. On the finance side, that means we are crunching numbers and planning exactly how much money we need to raise today, in January, and every month until Election Day so we can finish as strong as possible. That means organizing our budget to see how many TV ads we can afford, how much travel we can plan, and what our voter contact is going to look like. That means making sure supporters like you, friend, know about the need to start our fundraising off on a high note to make sure we give Jocelyn all the resources possible to reach voters and get re-elected in November.

Now, we still have about $4,000 to go to hit our goal this month. I’m not saying the world is going to end if we don’t hit it, but we’ve got a budget to plan and every bit counts, especially when our opponents can deposit a check signed “DeVos” any time they need one. Friend , will you make your first contribution to support this campaign today?

Donate today>> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=013022nondonor

We really appreciate your support. I know Monday at midnight is coming up quickly – on Tuesday, I’ll send everyone a note with how we ended up for the month and if we hit our monthly goal. You are the reason we’re in such good shape so far, and I want to keep you up to date on our progress. (Besides, hitting a goal feels good, right?)

- Emily

clean_body: Hey friend, My name is Emily Mellits. I’m a proud mom of two wonderful kids, Carter and Ellie, and a German Shepherd named Piper. I also help manage the finances for Jocelyn’s campaign and that’s why I’m reaching out to talk about our fundraising progress this month. Now, I’m not going to mislead you with some ‘all caps' headline about needing to donate in the next 10 minutes or the sky will fall rhetoric. That’s not how I roll and that’s not what this campaign is about. I’m reaching out because, yes, we have a monthly fundraising goal to hit but also to give you an honest and clear understanding about why we are asking you to pitch in with a contribution today. We have just over nine months left in this campaign. On the finance side, that means we are crunching numbers and planning exactly how much money we need to raise today, in January, and every month until Election Day so we can finish as strong as possible. That means organizing our budget to see how many TV ads we can afford, how much travel we can plan, and what our voter contact is going to look like. That means making sure supporters like you, friend, know about the need to start our fundraising off on a high note to make sure we give Jocelyn all the resources possible to reach voters and get re-elected in November. Now, we still have about $4,000 to go to hit our goal this month. I’m not saying the world is going to end if we don’t hit it, but we’ve got a budget to plan and every bit counts, especially when our opponents can deposit a check signed “DeVos” any time they need one. Friend , will you make your first contribution to support this campaign today? Donate today>> secure.actblue.com/donate/benson-landing1?refcode=013022nondonor We really appreciate your support. I know Monday at midnight is coming up quickly – on Tuesday, I’ll send everyone a note with how we ended up for the month and if we hit our monthly goal. You are the reason we’re in such good shape so far, and I want to keep you up to date on our progress. (Besides, hitting a goal feels good, right?) - Emily To unsubscribe, please click here: unsubscribe: Paid for by Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State PO Box 21368 Detroit, MI 48221 United States

name: Charles Booker
subject: What can I say, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

What if I told you that we have a rare opportunity this year to unseat
Rand Paul?

Political pundits have named us a top race to watch and we’re proud of the
historic grassroots movement we’re already built to Kentucky blue.

What if I told you that an infamous conservative billionaire is funding a
Super PAC to flood this race with dark money and attack our rising
movement? This is just a sneak peek of the dark money and big corporate
donors that Rand Paul plans on leveraging to protect his seat — that’s why
we need to start our fundraising strong this year.

What if I told you that reaching our goal tonight will give us the
fundraising power we need to scale our voter outreach efforts and replace
Rand Paul? Right now, we’re just 12% short from reaching our goal and
every dollar you give enables us to contact 20 voters.

So please,
Peter: [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220130?refcode=em20220130-1517&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=1517_346206_gzIdIj&akid=1517%2E346206%2EgzIdIj ]I hope you can chip
in $5 or whatever you can afford to support our campaign
before our first big fundraising deadline of 2022 tomorrow. Every dollar
we raise is evidence of the people-powered movement we’re building.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220130?refcode=em20220130-1517&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=1517_346206_gzIdIj&akid=1517%2E346206%2EgzIdIj ]Contribute $5

In case that still didn’t convince you,
Peter...

What if I told you that if we want real, meaningful political change in
our politics – we need to elect more leaders who understand the struggles
of everyday people in our country?

I’ve lived in poverty. I’ve been unhoused. I’ve lost family members to gun
violence. I am still paying off my student loans. I know what it’s like to
run out of insulin then find out your medicine isn’t covered anymore. And
I know I’m not alone in these struggles.

My story is the story of millions of Kentuckians who are sick and tired of
politicians who continue to ignore us. That’s why I’m running to replace
Rand Paul to make sure we finally send someone to the Senate who will
fight for the change my family and all of our families need.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220130?refcode=em20220130-1517&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&refcode2=1517_346206_gzIdIj&akid=1517%2E346206%2EgzIdIj ]But if we want to make this a winning movement we need to start this
election year strong and hit our first 2022 fundraising goal: We’re only
12% short from reaching our January fundraising goal — please chip in
whatever you can before our midnight deadline tomorrow.

Let’s do this,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220130-1517-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1517_346206_gzIdIj&akid=1517%2E346206%2EgzIdIj

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1517%2E346206%2EgzIdIj

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

That means meeting this fundraising goal will set the pace for the rest of the election. Hitting this fundraising goal will allow Liz to spend time throughout the district and learn its needs. It’ll also allow Liz to interact face to face with voters and personally hear what their concerns are. Liz has been working around the clock to speak to voters. Whether it’s hiring team members as our operation grows, or making sure I’m on top of the calls I need to be making daily, Jesse's been hard at work making sure we are running a well-oiled machine at headquarters. I know it’s hard to imagine the impact of just a few dollars donated to our campaign, but I see the impact of your support every day. I am thankful to have a team made up of people from all walks of life who are so dedicated to our communities and our fight to have our values fairly represented in Congress. body:
| | | [](https://links.e.dccc.)
It's Rep. Hakeem Jeffries.

**[As chair of the House Democratic Caucus, I'm rushing to you with an urgent request: House Democrats are just 24 hours away from our critical End of Month Deadline, and I'd be incredibly grateful for your help in meeting our goal before time runs out. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [END OF MONTH DEADLINE: ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/mPmpcqq_)[1/31, MIDNIGHT](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_)
[NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/NaPAfrrxb-)

[_Suggested Support: $3_](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_zQVV~mKT_)
---

I was an impeachment manager during Donald Trump's first trial, so believe me when I say: **We cannot trust this lawless, corrupt, bigoted president with elected office ever again.**

But in the months since he's left the White House, Trump has made it clear he's plotting a return to power for him and his Republicans -- _begi_ __nnin_ g with the destruction of our House Majority._

I don't need to tell you how disastrous a Republican House Majority -- or a second Trump presidency -- would be for our country.

Voting rights, reproductive rights, our very democracy -- they would all be at risk once again if we allow Republicans to defeat us at this pivotal moment.

**I refuse to sit on the sidelines and watch that happen -- but our House Democrats and I can 't hope to win this fight without you.**

[**So please: Before our End of Month Deadline expires in just 24 hours, can I count on your $3 to help save our House Majority and defeat Trump 's House Republicans? >>**](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/~j-)
| _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46323793&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE2MzI4MTM4NgS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

But in the months since he's left the White House, Trump has made it clear he's plotting a return to power for him and his Republicans -- begi nnin g with the destruction of our House Majority. subject: Resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [A Two-Year Train Wreck](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqNa--IKM_Vf_5YmAfOvbVI5wfoKxCwDKZWHeOrawLEHA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan_30a&n=1) Late on Friday, Gavin Newsom's handpicked EDD Director resigned. This comes after I questioned the Director at a recent hearing. Her answers were baffling. She [couldn’t say](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharMTg-p5M21fZzcMIR-5ZAj1S47bX-B5vcjg4XdTcMzF_A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan_30a&n=2) why we have the highest unemployment in America. She [couldn’t say](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharPTJ9xrukeL4lvFVpPN5XTtp7pJ5cqH9pkjWJjffSv21Q&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan_30a&n=3) if a single person was fired over the $31 billion in fraud. Newsom has presided over the EDD train wreck for two years without improvement. Of all his failures, this may be the second biggest. The worst, of course, is schools. On that front, I have some good news. Over 100 school board members have signed the letter opposing Newsom's mask/vaccine mandates and demanding an end to the emergency. [Here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziooCxEhKFjHHFgmfD9FR-hfqHsaXR7E9x1Z-P5vyla7nIIdfFqbiIkiOwHj3fkDzK78&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan_30a&n=4) is the full list of signatories. Finally, I had almost forgotten. I turn 37 today. I’ve been convinced to take a few hours off to watch the 49ers game. But then it will be back to work: we have a colossal battle these next few months, with so much at stake for our state and country. All I’d ask from you today is the support I need to be successful. Perhaps you can help with one of these amounts: [$3.70](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan_30a&n=5) [$37](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G1yUanoUjV1r267qiAKiDkuvJdaY-SIMoPt5er3FY2PkA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan_30a&n=6) [$370](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G1yUanoUjV1r267qiAKiDkuU9lBKzBMapcUw3MdVIus-A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan_30a&n=7) [$3700](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G1yUanoUjV1r267qiAKiDkuTXsdyLlG-UBR5nUGZGUq7A&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan_30a&n=8) I'm making out my campaign budget now and need to know how many signs, mailers, and TV ads I'll be able to afford. To take our fight to Washington, we need to reach over a half million voters. [I’d be truly grateful for your help before tomorrow’s end-of-month deadline.](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_jan_30a&n=9) Kevin Kiley

– 243,482 total contributions from donors across the country

Friend, after Donald Trump started the year by holding a rally in Arizona in a desperate attempt to keep this battleground red, [**we put out an urgent call asking our supporters to chip in so we could fight back, defeat GOP extremism and flip our state blue.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41247929/327980533/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk414-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTQ0NjU5Zi0yZDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnQd1LftSv6EHc3lFQknaafdoZVKzGdSoOq9VKEJSeE=)
**We expected supporters like you to come through with a surge of grassroots support – but the OPPOSITE has happened. With time running out before our first official end-of-month deadline of the election year, ActBlue shows our online fundraising is dramatically slowing _down_ at the worst possible time.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41247930/327980534/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk414-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTQ0NjU5Zi0yZDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnQd1LftSv6EHc3lFQknaafdoZVKzGdSoOq9VKEJSeE=)
We cannot afford to start our election year like this. Experts at The Washington Post have made it clear: The only surefire way to defeat GOP extremism – the kind Trump came here to stoke – is by replacing its proponents with a Democratic governor. **Marco Lopez (D-AZ) is the governor we need. He's an Obama administration alumnus, voting rights champion and small-business owner. And he's ready to flip Arizona's governorship blue and defend our democracy.**
**But unless we turn our fundraising around before this first official deadline of the election year, we won't have the resources we need to fight back against GOP attacks and win this race. POLITICO has called this the _most_ competitive open-seat race of 2022, so we can't afford to fall short.**
**[So please, friend, with our deadline rapidly approaching, will you rush a donation to close our budget gap, flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41247931/327980535/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk414-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTQ0NjU5Zi0yZDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnQd1LftSv6EHc3lFQknaafdoZVKzGdSoOq9VKEJSeE=)**

Thank you for refusing to let this extremism go unanswered.

Team Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41247936/327980567/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk414-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTQ0NjU5Zi0yZDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnQd1LftSv6EHc3lFQknaafdoZVKzGdSoOq9VKEJSeE=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41247937/327980568/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk414-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTQ0NjU5Zi0yZDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MnQd1LftSv6EHc3lFQknaafdoZVKzGdSoOq9VKEJSeE=)

name: Finance Team, Erica Smith for U.S. House
subject: Where we are:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey,

This is Erica Smith 👇

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37467?t=1001&akid=832%2E3698%2ErfvpX2 ][IMG]

She was born and raised on a dirt road. She grew up proudly harvesting
corn and cucumbers on her family’s farm. She understands the dignity of
work and she knows what it means to struggle, and to work all day to put
food on the table for your family.

She believes investing in sustainable climate policy, universal broadband,
and economic justice — and she’s the only pro-choice candidate in this
race for North Carolina’s 2nd Congressional District.

Erica Smith has run in a racially gerrymandered district before, and won,
and she’s going to do it again. She’s represented over half of these
counties in the state senate, and she’s never lost an election here.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37467?t=1002&akid=832%2E3698%2ErfvpX2 ]Can you make a $5 donation to our campaign today? We
depend on grassroots donations and we’re still $3,500 [ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37467?t=1003&akid=832%2E3698%2ErfvpX2 ]away from
reaching our $35,000 online end-of-month goal.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37473?refcode=em20220130-832&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=832%2E3698%2ErfvpX2 ]Donate $5

Now, this is our far-right Republican opponent, Sandy Smith 👇

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37467?t=1005&akid=832%2E3698%2ErfvpX2 ][IMG]

Yep, that’s her at the January 6 insurrection supporting the violence,
chaos, and intimidation.

She’s doing everything that she can to steal the NC-02 House seat and
block progressive policy in North Carolina.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37467?t=1006&akid=832%2E3698%2ErfvpX2 ]Please, make a donation of any amount to our campaign before our
end-of-month fundraising deadline on Monday. We have to maintain
consistent grassroots support in order to have the resources we need to
fight back.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/37473?refcode=em20220130-832&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=832%2E3698%2ErfvpX2 ]Donate $5

Together,

The Finance Team
Erica Smith for Congress

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220130-832-footer&t=1026&refcode2=832_3698_rfvpX2&akid=832%2E3698%2ErfvpX2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=832%2E3698%2ErfvpX2

name: Randolph
subject: Hi Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Dear Peter,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Congress. But first, I want to re-introduce myself.
As a young child in Jacksonville, I grew up going to church with my parents, who founded one of the churches in our neighborhood. It was then that I learned the value of hard work, determination, and serving others.
I took those values to work for years in education–and now, I’m standing up for our community in the State Senate every day.
In the face of radical proposals from Governor DeSantis to restrict abortion rights, silence our voices with voting limits, and erase our history, serving in Tallahassee isn’t easy. But even in the face of great opposition, we deliver for our communities and speak up against injustice.
Right now, I’m fighting like hell to defend our House majority. I know we can do this, but even if Republicans are in charge, I’ll know how to deliver. I’ve been delivering for Orange County as a Democrat in Republican-controlled Tallahassee for my entire career.
That hasn’t been an easy fight, but it’s prepared me to be a voice for our community, our democracy, and our values in Washington.
To win this race and continue the fight, I need your help. We’re facing a BIG fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight. If you believe in our mission, please click here to chip in now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=email1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=email1] Express Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=email1] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email1] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email1] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=email1] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bracy-email?refcode=email1]Throughout my life, I’ve been incredibly blessed to serve our community. I’m ready to take that service to Washington during this pivotal moment in our nation’s history.
Thanks for being with us,
Randolph Bracy
PAID FOR BY BRACY FOR CONGRESS
Randolph Bracy for Congress
P.O. Box 3096
