clean_body: Dear Peter, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for Congress. But first, I want to re-introduce myself. As a young child in Jacksonville, I grew up going to church with my parents, who founded one of the churches in our neighborhood. It was then that I learned the value of hard work, determination, and serving others. I took those values to work for years in education–and now, I’m standing up for our community in the State Senate every day. In the face of radical proposals from Governor DeSantis to restrict abortion rights, silence our voices with voting limits, and erase our history, serving in Tallahassee isn’t easy. But even in the face of great opposition, we deliver for our communities and speak up against injustice. Right now, I’m fighting like hell to defend our House majority. I know we can do this, but even if Republicans are in charge, I’ll know how to deliver. I’ve been delivering for Orange County as a Democrat in Republican-controlled Tallahassee for my entire career. That hasn’t been an easy fight, but it’s prepared me to be a voice for our community, our democracy, and our values in Washington. To win this race and continue the fight, I need your help. We’re facing a BIG fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight. If you believe in our mission, please click here to chip in now. subject: emailing for $20
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
Team,
Did you get Katie Hobbs’ email earlier? She’s asking every donor to chip in $20 and fight back against the far-right’s anti-democracy agenda!
The Republican State Leadership committee has raked in MILLIONS of dollars this year to target and beat our Secretaries! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
DASS needs your help to fight back and protect democracy. Are you with us? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
Our massive end-of-month deadline is tomorrow night and we need your help to hit it. Check out Secretary Hobbs' email below and then chip in $20 to protect our elections from GOP extremists! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
CHIP IN $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
Begin forwarded email:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
Team, this is Katie Hobbs, Secretary of State of Arizona. The Republican State Leadership Committee – like DASS, but for the GOP – raised $10 million last year to win state races and unseat our secretaries.
With our end-of-month deadling tomorrow night, DASS needs your help to come anywhere near their dark money fundraising. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
Can you rush $20 right now to hit this goal and keep us in this fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
If you've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express,
your donation will process immediately:
RUSH $5 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=email_013022_4]
RUSH $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
RUSH $50 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email_013022_4]
RUSH $100 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email_013022_4]
Donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?refcode=email_013022_4&amount=5]
Our democracy has been under attack since Donald Trump realized he was going to lose the election last year. And the far-right won’t give up until they have absolute power over our right to vote.
But I won’t back down or give up this fight. And you shouldn’t either. We have a chance, right now, to stand up to these extremist candidates who want to control your elections. But we need to act fast. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
DASS has a massive end-of-month deadline tomorrow, and we need all hands on deck to hit it. Team: are you with us? Chip in $20 now to join DASS and beat the GOP! >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
CHIP IN $20 >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-jan22?amount=20&refcode=email_013022_4]
Thank you,
Katie Hobbs

Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
Democratic Association of Secretaries of State
600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180
Washington, DC 20003
United States

clean_body: As each month progresses where Susan Wild is our Representative, I am more and more confident that she must go. My campaign and I have been trying.... Peter, As each month progresses where Susan Wild is our Representative, I am more and more confident that she must go. My campaign and I have been trying to express this for some time now, Peter, but Susan Wild doesn’t vote on your behalf. She votes in line with Nancy Pelosi over 90% of the time. Susan Wild doesn’t care about the prosperity of the Lehigh Valley. She cares about advancing her political agenda with the Far-Left party in DC. As our first month of 2022 concludes, I need you to understand the importance of this year. Including this month, we only have 10 more End-of-Month deadlines before election day... Each day as we inch closer to the finish line becomes more and more important and that’s why I need to know if I can immediately count on you to chip in just $22 RIGHT AWAY to help ensure we flip the House this November. What this Administration has to show for thus far is nothing but disastrous.. Here are a few things that immediately come to mind: ❌ Sky high inflation rates and supply chain issues leaving our grocery store shelves EMPTY ❌ A BOTCHED withdrawal from Afghanistan leaving a number of our service men and women dead ❌ Soaring taxes that everyday Americans cannot afford Peter, as time progresses, I’ll be looking to YOU to help make all of the difference over these coming months. I need to know that I can count on YOU when times get tough and that you’ll be there with us as we cross the finish line victorious in November. My team and I are grateful for your continued support, Peter. Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

But we didn’t stop there, friend. name: =?utf-8?Q?Rachel=20Tripp?=
subject: ICYMI- Highlights From The Third GOP Gubernatorial Debate
body:
Bill McSwain’s strong debate performance distinguished him as the best candidate to beat Josh Shapiro. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us5.campaign-archive.com/?e=b1ec95759b&u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=f3b8606df6)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**January 30, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# ICYMI: Bill McSwain is the best candidate to beat Josh Shapiro
_ Highlights from the third GOP Gubernatorial Debate _

**West Chester, Pa.** **\-- ** Bill McSwain, Republican candidate for Governor, on Thursday participated in the third GOP Gubernatorial Debate at the Blair County Convention Center, hosted by the Blair County Republican Committee.

Throughout the course of the debate, McSwain explained why he is the best candidate to defend and protect the liberties of hardworking families, and stressed that his vision for a stronger, safer, more secure Pennsylvania has resulted in vigorous support and strong grassroots fundraising across the Commonwealth.

In his opening remarks, McSwain promised to restore the personal freedoms of all Pennsylvanians as Governor:
---
|
> _**"In a McSwain administration, there will be no lockdowns, there will be no statewide mandates. Schools will be open, and we will have school choice. The size of government will be reduced. Right now, the government is too big and too intrusive. You are overtaxed - I am going to change that. Businesses are over-regulated - I’m going to change that. We are one election away from putting Pennsylvania on the right track, and we will do that together."**_
---
| When asked what sets him apart from other candidates, McSwain emphasized that his professional background, significant campaign funding, and status as a conservative outsider make him the only candidate who can beat Josh Shapiro:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=78925ee1a6&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| McSwain also shared that his history of upholding law and order as U.S. Attorney, dedication to conservative values, and lifelong commitment to public service make him the best candidate to bring much-needed change to all 67 counties:
---
|
> _**"We are going through a crisis of public safety and I am the only candidate who is qualified to tackle those problems. I am the only candidate who is a prosecutor, the only candidate with law enforcement experience, and I will not take any town or county for granted. ****What we need to beat Josh Shapiro is all-out commitment. We need a Marine’s mentality, we need a tough Marine to do a tough job. That's who I am, and that's the kind of commitment I'm going to bring to this race." **_
---
|
---
| **BACKGROUND: **

Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as US Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming an attorney, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=df8e98b049&e=b1ec95759b)
###
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=2c48e65e7c&e=b1ec95759b)
---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---
|

You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=f3b8606df6) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=f3b8606df6).
---

name: Carole King
subject: A message for you -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, it's Carole King. I’m reaching out to you today because I care so deeply about our country.

While our Democratic senators are working night and day to bring positive change to struggling families this year, Mitch McConnell and his do-nothing Republican conference are scheming up new ways to regain control of the Senate.

**We cannot let Republicans regain the majority.**

They’re also using _old_ ways to regain control, raking in huge amounts of money from undisclosed deep-pocketed donors. And they’re OUTRAISING us by a lot!

But we can overcome their dark money. In 2020, we were part of a massive grassroots movement, and we won. If we all stay engaged and pitch in with $5 or whatever we can afford, WE CAN WIN AGAIN!!

**[Can I count on you to stand with me in the fight to meet the DSCC’s critical end-of-month fundraising goal so we can hold and potentially expand our razor-thin Democratic majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2763%2E9716520%2EdFKPc5)**

We’ve seen how a McConnell-controlled Senate spells COMPLETE AND UTTER DISASTER for the American people. While Senate Democrats are working night and day to lift us and our neighbors in the American community, Republicans won’t even lift a finger to help.

Think about what Democrats have accomplished so far:

* Delivered CRITICAL pandemic relief
* Passed a HISTORIC infrastructure bill
* Cut taxes for over 35 MILLION families
* Created millions of good-paying jobs
* Voted to ensure everyone’s sacred right to vote

Every Republican senator voted AGAINST the Freedom to Vote Act.

**What are they afraid of?**

If we lose the Senate... well, you saw the blatant misuse of raw power when Republicans were in charge. We are NOT going there, and I know we can win if we all pitch in.

**Your donation could make the difference between a Democratic Senate majority that’s dedicated to delivering what you and your family need—and Mitch McConnell, who will stop at nothing to become Majority Leader again.**

**[Please join me and other grassroots donors in this fight to make sure that Mitch never has the word “Majority” in his title again without the word “former” in front of it!](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2763%2E9716520%2EdFKPc5)**
We need your help to defend our Senate majority. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=6&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2763%2E9716520%2EdFKPc5)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=7&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2763%2E9716520%2EdFKPc5)
---
| [Donate $25](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=8&amount=25&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2763%2E9716520%2EdFKPc5)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2763%2E9716520%2EdFKPc5)
---
Over the years I’ve spent time with a lot of Democratic senators, and I want to assure you that Democrats really are dedicated to making the world a better place. Your support will mean so much to them and will allow them to keep fighting for you and your family.

Thank you so much for all _you_ do.

\- Carole
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2763%2E9716520%2EdFKPc5)Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award, a Kennedy Center honor, and double-induction into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. Now Carole is using her platform to help elect an expanded Democratic Senate majority. And yes, Carole really did write this email.
| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/5992?amount=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220130-CaroleKing-EOM-Pros-sl1&akid=2763%2E9716520%2EdFKPc5)

name: Warren Democrats
subject: We need to elect at least two more progressive Democratic senators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Can you make one of the donations we need to meet our January fundraising goal and help elect more Warren Democrats in the process? | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41248419/327994539/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3G_EOM_W_20220130_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjlmOTg4ZC0zNDgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w2neZ2ExOQ5cuF1ekn_rlW6I96hN65dgKOho7As11g4=&emci=c9248e86-3482-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&emdi=9f9f988d-3482-ec11-94f6-c896650d4442&ceid=9027908)

We’ve scratched and clawed and fought our way to Democratic majorities in the House and the Senate — and while those majorities have helped us accomplish so much over the past year, we have to go further. name: Team Gallagher
subject: Peace through strength > chaos through weakness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin
body:
The same people that bungled the evacuation in Afghanistan might get to do the same in Ukraine because this situation is about to get much worse. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=372c9939b78b40fca8a9ab210ad6fa97&_e=AXg4Hi0Om_SQvg3jsTPn23WRmVKVE5SW0PGN2-WdY0knAxeqY5B4Y6Xjg7fWbj0AFXDlq2hVHJHRtw-c6LZMWXQC6TtPtPm0D3o50PDgUgKq5XBuyN-3si22Mx6MhRJ3GFJbIKykQaHTzFa5xdPRk95lDJCNc9EhyHxqJXWpGBvN9aySMMQBH57kLfxuD_H82KnuTN82FDA8B__70k25BTPG7erumb2vWiYx2uu9nCW94Kh3dw9rP1uMKuQBLvnnzetF1dehRnAWd2WUhcQgp3P5xCdszjSYVnRons2whObbPorA6Mf4701NXQc1nwVM-QHbCksrMz_5AgbCzKRfKA5L_-cvrIgzx_3rW15FRe_4lAiNbzHvafA-cgOE0F4pwGCq-p328bwgvO_Y490KHVkZGXb5RL-MEYhPOuy9IMHaV_42_vdJSxbJESbtDc_A) Peter, you can literally measure America’s global retreat by the number of embassies we’re evacuating. _The_ _same people that bungled the evacuation in Afghanistan might get to do the same in Ukraine because this situation is about to get much worse._ **But Biden’s foreign policy crises don’t end at the Russia-Ukraine border. ** Xi Jinping knows he can get away with an invasion of Taiwan right now and the worst he’s going to suffer is a mean hashtag from Jen Psaki. [](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=372c9939b78b40fca8a9ab210ad6fa97&_e=AXg4Hi0Om_SQvg3jsTPn23WRmVKVE5SW0PGN2-WdY0knAxeqY5B4Y6Xjg7fWbj0AFXDlq2hVHJHRtw-c6LZMWXQC6TtPtPm0D3o50PDgUgKq5XBuyN-3si22Mx6MhRJ3GFJbIKykQaHTzFa5xdPRk95lDJCNc9EhyHxqJXWpGBvN9aySMMQBH57kLfxuD_H82KnuTN82FDA8B__70k25BTPG7erumb2vWiYx2uu9nCVUIbBf93QZJ8DrtDBIEDFDAtAsB57JWZaZEQmdZzJt1qs-Ta5cTnnM-OZos9syXb886wRcNbGAa7B_FQL0B4SgFvxgUr6C_OufjR_xRzWSrlD0StkfEdZ2czeU9J5xALrq0GMeexR6kS6Ih5SuMCFoLpPZAzEi7g-RUd9mCsW6Hp2FEjUYUKIJr1md27gozKxx3zGdBXKPwb-9c8Yl6fMd) **To make matters even worse, a significant portion of Congress isn’t even showing up for work thanks to Pelosi’s proxy voting rules.** It’s unacceptable –– _especially_ at a time when our country is on the brink of conflict. [_**We need a conservative majority that will show up to work and prove to the world that America is not backing down.**_](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=372c9939b78b40fca8a9ab210ad6fa97&_e=AXg4Hi0Om_SQvg3jsTPn23WRmVKVE5SW0PGN2-WdY0knAxeqY5B4Y6Xjg7fWbj0AFXDlq2hVHJHRtw-c6LZMWXQC6TtPtPm0D3o50PDgUgKq5XBuyN-3si22Mx6MhRJ3GFJbIKykQaHTzFa5xdPRk95lDJCNc9EhyHxqJXWpGBvN9aySMMQBH57kLfxuD_H82KnuTN82FDA8B__70k25BTPG7erumb2vWiYx2uu9nCVvSM6nuD1Ic8EzAq31CJwjpvnfrM5Y2jnRon9Bqcfj9rnUxb7G9igIzSB9Yc188WewxOSBPuFxSDGq9tZyhzdrEViB1iY-uPjvKfV1JU_XxRhLOSBjKeWQMsEvCc9PWJFaWfH0NY5j2P-RuQzXPvAxgiz75SHGC1kW0u7Ga8dYE6dtAYlGUz0zwSGQwMoBk0ck2o92RfUXL9uMUl-lTsit) Biden’s lack of leadership has produced nothing but disasters from our southern border to the Ukrainian border.

**[RSVP HERE.](https://www.justin4all.org/r?u=y9psY1xalyN59vILyuY7BKLOuxQ2y1pvCem8JvAGJQ07qlfhluao2_MXFUa9F-Py3fHHVuUwyHw5xTMXTbaAJBaTceOeDCauYk0Xipmrr9hIoB7OTyqqn-6cO3PvIu1xBk8xU2FYS0KoSTvsfEn2_tE67eXURqfIEIuyaZym6ydNwIn8J4v81FnZ-ly7Y953ftd7fuLL3UonDu4XVchiYe1vWB-B6AwF7pgufE1IcFKWm8E8tY7G-DlxDqTlT0PWf5KQbGtlaOk7j162YNtVr8WAmy9JcKj54735eVwYnKsrndfjawvFddjMUH5fuQswsdQetq7bR7Z04Kr_GxdZTmDMs0k-OelxtOdP9mKUL3PvGYtkS7Yk-pFCHomA88a98lPRfIoZeNoLJ97qocZypWFjyRj_g7Iv_uT_2BakZeGxBhF2bxgtQIDo4DYXlrKlHaEKmn8bAbHQEBew2uuWm1E6VvuxwMWArT0b5hRkYP7OPpXI9WbbIVpgzbmj2c2Qf7SN8CrIBK7_jLzUBv9v7qiaOv8OLnqVDuiXFUUGMj5e40Cg8e-3bZA7dUr3pMdN-6Yk3mvdGakEwOOVRoS0moQuQnTaeIv68-HhItnvz2VRQcVgafTaE7Dgp4nGG10onKw-Y8i5Kb35HSiDDJANW_u_FW3Ngpbe1Qhfa6cSMQiU4sVgzzbPdHwQLzvu_tCCKv9dQuQXrKZAl66fb14WI6mZupYHur30yx-zzHSDI09d99M9eZC_AjBuOKU_kkzA&e=c44c600a8b8e6533bc083fbd0d1c486c&utm_source=j4a&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pnhp_panel_on_dces&n=3)**
I believe in taking the profit motive **out** of health insurance. If you haven't heard, **[Medicare is being privatized under our noses](https://www.justin4all.org/r?u=31LENR9BgsePFvyAr7aruLmEHnkBLPWLYigUUVsFUbije0TpMiFhHTfGbU0HPWG-QBqdbPdNB9UrN8lNMgwABPRrOAKOQEohiilTBpkkPXhUzfdpEeH8pD5m_1nnX8it&e=c44c600a8b8e6533bc083fbd0d1c486c&utm_source=j4a&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pnhp_panel_on_dces&n=4), **so that taxpayer dollars can be turned into private company profits.

The new scheme for investors to profit from Medicare recipients goes by the obscure name "Direct Contracting Entities."[ It doesn't even require the Medicare recipient's consent to be enrolled in the new scheme.](https://www.justin4all.org/r?u=31LENR9BgsePFvyAr7aruLmEHnkBLPWLYigUUVsFUbije0TpMiFhHTfGbU0HPWG-QBqdbPdNB9UrN8lNMgwABPRrOAKOQEohiilTBpkkPXhUzfdpEeH8pD5m_1nnX8it&e=c44c600a8b8e6533bc083fbd0d1c486c&utm_source=j4a&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pnhp_panel_on_dces&n=5)
* * *
[](https://www.justin4all.org/r?u=31LENR9BgsePFvyAr7aruLmEHnkBLPWLYigUUVsFUbije0TpMiFhHTfGbU0HPWG-QBqdbPdNB9UrN8lNMgwABPRrOAKOQEohiilTBpkkPXhUzfdpEeH8pD5m_1nnX8it&e=c44c600a8b8e6533bc083fbd0d1c486c&utm_source=j4a&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pnhp_panel_on_dces&n=6)
****

clean_body: Learn how Medicare is being privatized | Peter -- I believe in taking the profit motive out of health insurance. If you haven't heard, , so that taxpayer dollars can be turned into private company profits. The new scheme for investors to profit from Medicare recipients goes by the obscure name "Direct Contracting Entities." Physicians for a National Health Plan (PNHP) is among other concerned healthcare consumer advocacy organizations sounding the alarm on DCEs. If you want to preserve Medicare, we have to STOP DCE's!! attend this event onFeb 8, 7PM, co-hosted by and Featuring a panel of PNHP members, including yours truly. Florida will determine whether Democrats keep our Senate majority – that’s why Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race to crush our movement and keep Florida red permanently. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. Will you donate today to help me flip Florida blue? = If you’d like to purchase merchandise to show your support for this campaign, Thank you for your continued support. Together we’re going to protect voting rights, expand access to affordable health care and fully recover from this pandemic. = If you're reading from your phone, to automatically sign up for my SMS team. By providing your mobile phone number you consent to receive recurring updates from Val Demings for U.S. Senate, including by automated text message. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. body:
We are asking you directly
#

[**$25.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jan22?refcode=em220130-1-30-25&t=1&refcode2=615_159979_11213P&akid=615%2E159979%2E11213P)
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make to Alex Padilla’s U.S. Senate campaign before midnight tomorrow.
Here’s why:
Tomorrow night at midnight, our campaign will close the books on our January fundraising deadline.
This is our first deadline of 2022, so everyone — from our opponents to the media — will be looking to see if our campaign has the kind of energy and momentum it’s going to take to win in November.
So we can’t afford to come up short. We need to bring in a MASSIVE number of contributions to show everyone watching that we're fired up and ready to hold this seat, and Democrats’ majority in the Senate.
**So we are asking you directly:**
[**Can you add your first $25 contribution to Alex Padilla’s campaign today? It’s SO important that we start 2022 strong and ensure we have the resources to organize across California and hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-jan22?refcode=em220130-1-30-25&t=2&refcode2=615_159979_11213P&akid=615%2E159979%2E11213P)
As long as we continue to stand together, we are going to build the largest grassroots movement California has ever seen, and we are going to win this race.
Thank you!
Team Padilla

| | Events galore! Mark your calendars!
---
| | Donald Norcross held a virtual town hall last week where he was asked about healthcare. He said he believes that healthcare is a right and that he 'signed on' toMedicare for All. He lied. In fact, Norcross is the only leadership member on the CPC not supporting H.R. 1976 Medicare for All. The truth is Norcross voted for Chapter 78 as a state senator, which made health insurance premiums unreasonably high and was responsible for winning the Norcross insurance brokerage an $84 million tax credit - the brokerage that was recently found to have overcharged Pennsauken schools by $1.6 million for health insurance premiums. Why won't our representative support policy supported by 69% of Americans? Universal healthcare would render the Norcross insurance brokerage obsolete. Help us expose the truth and guarantee the same right every other developed country accomplished decades ago! Check out the events tab on our [website](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/adNwiq6TV/c?w=49otNQf9H_E6ornKRkIp0Iqv4uc_pB-cbY6_SXaNqGU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9EZVNhbnRpc0ZvckNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbSIsInIiOiIzYTQ2NGE5Yi0zMTZjLTQ4N2ItODg4My0zNzIwNmVmNDMyMWEiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI0Y2QzMjFiYS05ZDBmLTRhNGEtYTUxOC04N2NiNjk0NzZkMGQifQ) and join the fun! name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Your Donations Scare Them
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
This is OUR campaign |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1b103d4f4d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
First and foremost, I wanted to thank you for your support and for reading my emails and updates from the campaign trail. It means a lot and it is getting national attention.
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0f3ba1570d&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **The reality is that we are absolutely CRUSHING the Democrats in fundraising, and this is almost entirely from grassroots small-dollar donations, not huge cash windfalls stemming from corruption.**

_Politico_ reports:

_Donald Trump’s pick to become Arizona’s top elections official raised more campaign cash in 2021 than his two potential Democratic opponents combined — a sign of MAGA-world’s deep engagement in taking over under-the-radar positions in charge of running battleground state elections._

_State Rep. Mark Finchem, whom Trump endorsed for Arizona secretary of state in September of last year, has made the former president’s lies about the 2020 election results a cornerstone of his campaign. Finchem has said repeatedly, and without providing legitimate evidence, that the election was tainted by fraud, and he was a major backer of the GOP-led review of the vote in Maricopa County, which election experts and the county’s own Republican officials trashed as an unprofessional fishing expedition._

_Drafting off Trump’s endorsement, Finchem brought in more than $660,000 for his campaign in 2021, according to new campaign finance reports. That’s more than the combined fundraising totals of the two leading Democrats, former Maricopa County Recorder Adrian Fontes and state House Minority Leader Reginald Bolding, who respectively raised about $385,000 and $200,000 for the year._

**Do you see that?**

**We have fundraised more than my two biggest Democrat opponents combined! _This is a statement that is shocking the Media and terrifying the Left._**

_Politico_ continues:

_...But the financial haul from Trump’s pick, which included thousands of donations under $100 that poured in from around the country, points to a broader trend across the states._

**This is correct. The bulk of fundraising came from thousands of donations under one hundred dollars. **

**_I have been writing you for almost a year – this is a _grassroots_ campaign at its core. Elections are of the people, by the people, and for the people, and the people have spoken._**

Americans WANT Election Integrity. Americans WANT secure ballots. Americans WANT hand counting.

**The bedrock of my campaign has never been complicated, but it has been essential.**

**_Through simply following common-sense logic and putting in the blood, sweat, and tears to get it done, we CAN have secure elections. We WILL have secure elections._**

And this is why I am writing you today. We have a clear path forward. Right now, I am pushing to have watermarked ballots that I developed pushed in all 50 states. This is requiring a huge amount of marketing, networking, and petitioning.

**And all of this takes money.**

With increased nationwide attention, we are in a unique position to bring Election Integrity to the National State in a big way, and we are pushing for massive petition drives in all 50 states.
---
| [_Help me push toward our critical goal in this Arizona Secretary of State race! We have a BIG deadline January 31st - must have $20,000 raised. We are now at a little over $16,000 left on that goal - so I need your help NOW!_

_Donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500 or more to help us get watermarked ballots in all 50 states and protect our elections!_

_Help me make Arizona the Gold Standard of Election Integrity!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=21708ddc69&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8246ac2427&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2e21e3c789&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. [Please contribute today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=4d9334a146&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of State15508 W Bell Rd.STE 101-423Surprise, AZ 85374
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=92c39e0ccd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=92c39e0ccd).

body:

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=6c71e914646a48928d853270e385bda7&_e=2HLJqPetV03kb38UJd5ZUdK_BnWAki-qfRU9P-ogFKxfFjqaLo2RU-IjSls0lcOojK_IcpAESRjyelNuPQilOfywTVsIHUyWQlZKFj3jeb6MeUVOhwQL0CT23jpTvwFPT39fmVoNIkD7vK3FQzM01WBtXrdmITJYZzVoj_f8EWZa6r7aYFTBlu11gpE7Q2JgTss3nKP7EEZQLy22rz-NekmWcr2_qDlL-bcb5ZrlHMYs7fO3aahlJdxW1TFhIq0hVjDFxg7YsWyN8ARToPvkKqFKo7NABfquuIUbihve7LG8q6UkqVPiR3Mm2_9Lf-eqQmJ6Upw_uS5mcwOvWzjS7on7tdJUzliB9c8t7R4ZPeeouyp_ZnOnOwudYhk7jekvHBfFaB4n38oEHGx3M2H-h52SCT8z9L1fgz9HUDFPY5ESoF7LjGHxTXMp-rmWrspcr1huH2VvPAM5e582U9kPQPP0jhhjIYyTlm41JYiHsEg%3D)

---
_"In a likely general election showdown in what would be**one of the most expensive and consequential Senate races in the country** that could ultimately decide which party controls the chamber's majority, the poll indicates **Walker at 49% and Warnock at 48%** among registered voters."_

-- Fox News 1/26/22

Fellow American,

Numerous news outlets are remarking what we've been saying since Day One: **The victor of this Senate campaign in Georgia will determine which party controls the Senate come January 2023.**

This has been a big news week, to say the least. Not just ONE, but TWO polls were released back-to-back highlighting the importance of our Senate race in Georgia.

Look no further than a few words the media used in their news reports about both polls:

_"ONE OF THE MOST EXPENSIVE AND CONSEQUENTIAL SENATE RACES IN THE COUNTRY..."
"WALKER AT 49% AND WARNOCK AT 48%"
"ONE OF THE MOST CLOSELY WATCHED AND EXPENSIVE CONTESTS IN THE NATION"

Peter, let’s take a look back at Kyrsten Sinema’s month. After ditching Senate negotiations over voting rights for an impromptu holiday vacation to Ecuador, Sinema returned to find her fellow Senate Democrats united and ready to pass critical voting rights legislation. On Wednesday, January 19, it came to a vote: Voting rights + filibuster reform, or protect the broken status quo? We all know what happened. Sinema sided with Joe Manchin, Mitch McConnell, and Republicans and refused to protect our democracy. Here’s the upside this month, Peter: **After Sinema’s betrayal, she faced a huge backlash.** The**** Arizona Democratic Party formally censured her. EMILY’s List and NARAL withdrew their support. And here at the Primary Sinema Project, we’re on track to have the strongest-ever fundraising month, thanks to our fast-growing team of grassroots donors. If one thing is clear as January comes to an end, it’s this: Arizonans deserve better, and they’re ready to fight for it. **That's why so many folks are helping us lay the groundwork now for a primary challenge to Senator Sinema.[If you're with us, will you add a donation right now to make sure we finish January strong?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS48i7UsKPC-_l3GoBwRCP4UGJ76S8fnz5_a89c_mm4jD1B0zwHsTP7LxN9jXQdhyHfJGms8Kx5Whz9sY6rTMtf4xEt2D04qeEa21JNc_8IzIcckGyUO1Y-2inQwFUg85hPrgVmVE-tOHzjqB8gdzxLLnlFjCF46iqq1CJtlwv8EMLK8sXd2Yxpxi4MjnOrBUMsKS9mrOTkqSXDBKLkr_GaojhYqXXhHJF8e2Zb2nfMF-tPq_5FkmGYb3u3TWPkHcEw7U0tepH7oKbQTW7rJwTAXq04zeGS6ZHuYO_PdykAFXPeNGcQ4iJG0KYP85gYVOtSd3zLLyqHAiZTiArml3dxw/3j5/0IBi3QkmRvSM2uizqOkgEA/h1/i5snnA7acaJbjXJldx5qd-9t5AaGciz8okeHXTdoIp0)** **[Contribute $5](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeS48i7UsKPC-_l3GoBwRCP4SMlngMa12VDyzO_zaQc18LL5o7TQcAt-ZDbqsAc86-Aha0udCsqg33V_h3eMtyNx2L48jmqC4KyhjEpBp-YhgodnyMr8Tl_gJNYtaRkoQ-HOlUHmbiwyI-vkDQm1L3w0B16gtuSTBTO0j5PbyL75_y2T85gQDm-yWfZYLXtgs2EsNRVzqxnJcyr_k-oG0bjmEWfd28w0HxvhYU5tpdWhnTRHKcuXDAwyyE2UbArkdQ8AjQh-d26E2TMEgHLFotaHZP0OphZ1HzXZ0q-Z9V0j6mw8jeWfcYSJGyIwM5F45jEMAFpiC5t0CSWwKW3PYZsLg/3j5/0IBi3QkmRvSM2uizqOkgEA/h2/BoegPkTTv0VMF5AC3go5NHBrMi1J3RkyP17AolnUn60)** Sen. subject: Sen. Manchin should be EMBARRASSED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Team: Rachel Maddow just SLAMMED Joe Manchin for protecting the filibuster instead of saving the right to vote: [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5438?t=6&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga) Maddow is ABSOLUTELY right. If Democrat Joe Manchin would’ve stepped up to ABOLISH the filibuster months ago, the Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act would have passed in the Senate!

**Now, voting rights, our Congressional majorities, and Joe Biden’s ENTIRE agenda are on the verge of total collapse.**

[We’re exhausted, and we’re asking for you to STAND with us, and tell Joe Manchin to do what’s right and abolish the filibuster »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5438?t=7&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5438?t=8&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5438?t=9&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga)
---
TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN
FROM: A Proud Democrat
DATE: January 30, 2022

**_Dear Senator Manchin,_**

We need to have a serious talk.

For the last year, in state houses across the country, **Republicans have been doing their best to dismantle voting rights.**

**And now, Senate Republicans have BLOCKED the Freedom to Vote: John Lewis Act, which would protect voting rights at a national level!**

I’m enraged, Senator, so now, I’m personally demanding you step up, meet this moment, and ABOLISH the filibuster to finally SAVE voting rights!

[I’m dead serious – and to prove it, I’m giving a donation of $2 to the Voter Protection Project, an organization founded to protect the right to vote, right now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5438?t=10&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5438?t=11&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
The Republican war on our democracy isn’t over, Senator.

**In addition to trying to suppress voters, the GOP is trying to block every piece of legislation President Biden is trying to pass — putting the midterms at risk!**

The people of your state and our country deserve more. That’s why I’m imploring you to do the right thing and abolish the filibuster!

[So please, STAND UP, defend our right to vote and abolish the filibuster once and for all. I know I am, and I’ll show it with a $2 donation to VPP »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5438?t=12&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga)
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5438?t=13&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Sincerely,

**_x. A Proud Democrat_**
[DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5438?t=14&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=1198%2E878179%2En4LOga)

Friend,

LAST NIGHT WAS INCREDIBLE.

I held my EPIC RALLY in TEXAS and now we have our FIRST major fundraising deadline of the YEAR TOMORROW.

I cannot stress enough how important it is that we CRUSH our goal (it's the ONLY way to Save America), which is why I'm doing something HUGE.

name: Emily
subject: $5 may not sound like a lot…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=2205%2E3611125%2ErsK8qH ][IMG]

Folks,

Let me explain why [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6837?t=1007&akid=2205%2E3611125%2ErsK8qH ]donating $5 to this email is the most important
thing you can do today.

It’s no secret that Tim Ryan is up against millions of dollars from
dark-money groups, national Republicans, and his 6 millionaire opponents.
The GOP will use this money to spread right-wing propaganda and slander
Tim all over Ohio to keep this Senate seat red.

The ONLY way we can compete with this mountain of spending is with a huge
team of grassroots donors—that’s where you come in.

Every email we send gets about 45,000 readers—that means if everyone
reading this email right now chipped in just $5 to elect Tim, we’d raise
$225,000 in a matter of minutes.

And when tens of thousands of hardworking people make their voices heard,
not even a millionaire (or 6!) can drown out that kind of grassroots
fundraising power.

But here’s the thing, Folks: this strategy only works if we’re
all in it together. By the time you’re done reading this sentence, someone
will have chipped in $5. And someone else, and so on.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6837?t=1008&akid=2205%2E3611125%2ErsK8qH ]Democrats all over the country are counting on YOU to chip in your $5
too. So what do you say, will you do your part to defeat right-wing
extremism and defend the Senate today by pitching in toward our
end-of-month goal? We only have two days left to hit it!

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6837?t=1009&akid=2205%2E3611125%2ErsK8qH ]Chip in $5

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6838?t=1010&akid=2205%2E3611125%2ErsK8qH ]Other Amount

Together, we can win this race, expand our Democratic majority, and make
real progress for working families.

We appreciate your support,

Emily

Emily Creighton
Digital Fundraising Director
Tim Ryan for Ohio

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=2205%2E3611125%2ErsK8qH ][IMG]

name: Donald Trump must be stopped
subject: Trump and his team tried to steal the 2020 election..they’ll do it again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
|
---

| | [This is really serious and we want to be really clear with you: **Donald Trump and his team tried to steal the 2020 election.**

We’re not being hyperbolic. And the threat is still very real. The Democratic House Majority stopped their assault on democracy, and the only way we can be sure to stop their attack if it happens again is by protecting the Democratic House Majority.

This is such a threat, that we’ve activated a 7X match on all donations. body:
Here are a few key numbers you need to know today:

Team - here are a few key numbers you need to know today:
**1-2% down.**
That’s the gap in the latest public polling between Cheri and either of our likely Republican opponents. It’s a statistical tie. This race is going to be EXTREMELY close no matter which far-right Republican gets the nomination.
**$37,916.**
This is the amount we need to raise before midnight tomorrow to hit our fundraising goal. This is what it is going to take to make sure we can compete and WIN in North Carolina against the dark money organizations willing to spend limitless sums to defeat Cheri.

body:
Hi there, [**I have 24 hours to reach my end-of-month fundraising minimum! Can you help out with a quick donation now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41249096/327998116/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmZhYTVhNC00NzgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbBkTjFcrSFOmB7CUtUCWsO21SHS2Ra0_JFGBOfV3_Q=) I remember when I first decided to run for Congress, people asked me, “Why don’t you start small?” My answer is that every other issue will become moot if we don’t end the fossil fuel industry and prevent climate collapse. And Congress has the power to direct trillions of dollars to a Green New Deal, creating millions of good-paying jobs and rapidly transitioning our economy to renewable energy. [**I’m the only candidate in this race who supports those policies to avert climate collapse. Can you donate now, so I can meet my end-of-month deadline in the next 24 hours? Your donation will help me hire more team members as election season ramps up. Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41249097/327998117/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmZhYTVhNC00NzgyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi1jODk2NjUwZDQ0NDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VbBkTjFcrSFOmB7CUtUCWsO21SHS2Ra0_JFGBOfV3_Q=) I’m running against a Chevron Democrat who opposes the Green New Deal. clean_body: Hi there, = I remember when I first decided to run for Congress, people asked me, “Why don’t you start small?” My answer is that every other issue will become moot if we don’t end the fossil fuel industry and prevent climate collapse. And Congress has the power to direct trillions of dollars to a Green New Deal, creating millions of good-paying jobs and rapidly transitioning our economy to renewable energy. = I’m running against a Chevron Democrat who opposes the Green New Deal. I’ve been called all kinds of things since I started running, from shrill to strident to “that woman” and more. Corporate partisans would rather keep the status quo than have a woman challenge a powerful man. Oh well! I got 35,000 votes in 2020 and now I’m here to finish the job. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca Parson Candidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to: Rebecca for Washington PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States Paid for by Rebecca for Washington If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update Jan. 30, 2022
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/e4545a2a431d/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8814437?e=698f056321)
Logo

Here is a recap of a few highlights from this week in my role as State Senator from District 52, as well as updates from our Congressional Campaign. Fulfilling my duties as State Senator will be a top priority for me during this campaign. After all, I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.

“On matters of style, swim with the current, on matters of principle, stand like a rock.”

― Thomas Jefferson

** Our Congressional Campaign Raised Over $125,000 in Two Months
------------------------------------------------------------

In the two months between our congressional campaign announcement on Oct. 25, 2021 and the Dec. 31 FEC (Federal Election Commission) reporting cutoff, our campaign has raised over $125,000. FEC reports for all candidates are due by Jan. 31, 2022.

“I strongly support Brice for several reasons, one of which is the need for effectiveness at the federal level, particularly in the areas of national defense and appropriations,” said Jerry St. Pé, former president of Ingalls Shipbuilding in Pascagoula. “I also know him to be a man of honor who will listen, study the issues and work tirelessly to get things done for the people of South Mississippi just like he has shown us in the state senate. We need Brice right now in Congress.”

Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=df07364c48&e=698f056321) to view our full press release.

** Qualifying With The Mississippi GOP
------------------------------------------------------------

I officially qualified with the Mississippi GOP as a candidate to be your Congressman for the 4th Congressional District. I couldn't be more excited to take this next official step toward the primary which will be held on June 7, 2022!

Click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e5a7896069&e=698f056321) to view the Super Talk article about us qualifying for more details.

** Mississippi First Responders Caucus Meeting
------------------------------------------------------------

Unfortunately, people are leaving the law enforcement profession and even choosing not to go into it. No doubt, a direct result of the negative attacks on law enforcement across the country. As Senate Chairman of the First Responders Caucus, my colleagues and I are about doing what we can to encourage good men and women to enter the profession.

Watch our policy video on standing up for our law enforcement by clicking HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=20dacad47c&e=698f056321) .

** “First Responder Appreciation and Recruitment Act” Was Named Bill of The Day by Y’all Politics
------------------------------------------------------------

I have filed Senate Bill 2774 (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=8475f87e5a&e=698f056321) , which decreases the time it will take for first responders to receive retirement benefits. To read the Y’all Politics in which this bill was featured in, click HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=5b51d92197&e=698f056321) .

** Stennis International Airport Ribbon Cutting
------------------------------------------------------------

It was great to attend the ribbon-cutting for the Stennis International Airport’s new state-of-the-art hangar this past Wednesday in Hancock County with Tate Reeves, members of the Hancock County Port and Harbor Commission, and Hancock County members of the Mississippi State Legislature. Keeping BP/GCRF funds where they belong, in the bottom 6 counties, has been a priority and we've succeeded. I’m excited to see these dollars bring new advancements such as this one to Mississippi. As your Congressman, I pledge to continuously fight for economic development opportunities from Hattiesburg and the Pine Belt down to the Coast.

** Moving Forward With Medical Marijuana Bill
------------------------------------------------------------

With the medical marijuana bill in the hands of Governor Tate Reeves, he can now choose to veto the bill, sign the bill, or pass the bill with no signature. The Mississippi legislature is in the majority. Watch my recent television news interviews regarding medical marijuana by clicking the links below.

Interview with WXXV 25 (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=aae1b2bce3&e=698f056321)

Interview with WLOX (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=326e72f2e7&e=698f056321)

** Visit to Southern States Soccer Club
------------------------------------------------------------

I enjoyed our night in Hattiesburg at the Southern States Soccer Club, meeting many of the founders of this amazing facility that is drawing events and teams from all over and is home to the STARS semi-pro team in the National Premier Soccer League.The founders had a vision and it has become reality.

** Visit to Rolls-Royce Naval Marine
------------------------------------------------------------

Manufacturing is alive and well in Jackson County! Did you know Rolls-Royce plc in Pascagoula makes 90% of the propellers for U.S. Navy ships? Securing $1M of GCRF/BP funds in 2020 for expansion meant jobs and development for the Coast. I appreciate Louie Vihtelic, Site Manager, for the wonderful tour.

See our video of my vision for economic development by clicking HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=e661ce9356&e=698f056321) .

** Spoke at the MOMA Conference
------------------------------------------------------------

It was an honor speaking to the students of William Carey University Medical School in Hattiesburg yesterday evening hosted by MOMA - the Mississippi Osteopathic Medical Association. We are thankful for the Dean of William Carey Medical School, Dr. Italo Subbarao, who has led these students to great advancements and opportunities. I talked to the students about Mississippi and being advocates for their profession.

** Leaf River Dixie National Wagon Train Send-Off in Benndale
------------------------------------------------------------

Mississippi folks, Mississippi values! Was honored to wish the wagon train good luck on their ride to Dixie National Rodeo. Mr. Lionel & his wife have been making the trek for almost 30 years! Being in the country in South Mississippi enjoying God's gifts is good for the soul.

** The Week Ahead
------------------------------------------------------------
* Tuesday is a Legislative Deadline for Bills to Move Out of Committee
* Begin Appropriations
* Debating Bills in Full Chamber

Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,

name: Mark Kelly for Senate
subject: we wouldn’t have a chance
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
So, we thought it important to explain just how critical these messages are to our campaign.
#

Friends —
We’ve sent a number of fundraising emails in advance of tomorrow’s fundraising deadline. So, we thought it important to explain just how critical these messages are to our campaign.
As you know, we’ve received a record-setting number of donations on this campaign. But what you might not know is that a lot of those donations come from emails like this one.
So, when you see Mark’s commercials on TV, when you see us rising in the polls, and most importantly, when Mark is re-elected to the Senate — know that it’s emails like this one that make it happen. Without them, we wouldn’t have a chance.
So, with our January deadline just a day away, it’s not only important that we ask, but that you respond if you can:
[**Can Mark count on you to make your first $3 contribution to his campaign before tomorrow’s deadline? This is a big moment for us, our first deadline of the election year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220130-2-7&t=1&refcode2=2032_6688874_8bFAa6&akid=2032%2E6688874%2E8bFAa6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

What we are proving on this campaign is that we can win one of the most important and most expensive elections in the country by running a people-powered campaign. And we couldn’t do it without you.
So THANK YOU for responding today.
Team Kelly
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-jan22?refcode=em220130-2-7&t=26&refcode2=2032_6688874_8bFAa6&akid=2032%2E6688874%2E8bFAa6)**

Help the Obamas protect voting rights!
| | | **ALERT: YOUR SIGNATURE IS REQUESTED!**

Barack and Michelle Obama are asking all Democrats to OPPOSE the GOP's "Jim Crow 2.0" laws! **[Add your name right now to join them in this important fight>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220130-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220130-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2702%2E9716520%2EL0y8Rj)**

Team -- President Obama was crystal clear: "The future of our country is at stake" if we don't protect voting rights.

The pace of the GOP's vicious scheme has escalated RAPIDLY over the last year.

\-- **FIRST:** Trump spread lies about election fraud and REFUSED to concede to President Biden.
\-- **THEN:** A far-right mob stormed the Capitol on January 6 in an attempted insurrection.
\-- **NOW: GOP officials are ATTACKING voting rights across the country to try and seize power by reducing our ability to vote.**

They've introduced over 400 bills to restrict access to the ballot already -- _and they are NOT slowing down!_

That's why Barack and Michelle Obama are leading the fight to protect voting rights and why we've launched a MASSIVE petition to join them -- ****_but our records indicate you may not_****** _have stood with the Obamas yet, and we're still 7.8% short of our 100,000 signature goal!_**

Don't let Barack and Michelle down! **[Click here to add your name and join the Obamas in OPPOSING the GOP's voter suppression>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220130-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220130-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2702%2E9716520%2EL0y8Rj)**

| [I STAND WITH THE OBAMAS](https://go.dscc.org/go/3673?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220130-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220130-ActionNeeded-ObamasVBMRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2702%2E9716520%2EL0y8Rj)

body:
Our team just wanted to reach out real quick and let you know – as one of our most important supporters – about the status of our January goal.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220130-2756-header&t=1&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva)
We hope you had a great weekend. Our team just wanted to reach out real quick and let you – _one of our most important supporters_ – know about the status of our January goal. Take a look here:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220130?refcode=em20220130-2756-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2756_2526796_TlXOva&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva)
[We’re not going to sugarcoat it. Reaching this goal is going to be hard. It’s going to take a whole lot of small dollar donations. If you can afford it, will you rush $3 to help us get there? It’ll go a long way towards preparing for Alexandria’s primary.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220130?refcode=em20220130-2756-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2756_2526796_TlXOva&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220130?refcode=em20220130-2756-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2756_2526796_TlXOva&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva)**
We ask for your support through emails like these and set ambitious fundraising goals because movements should be funded by people, not corporate or special interest funded. For too long, the influence of money has corrupted Washington D.C.
Take our promise right now: That will never happen to this campaign. And it’s all thanks to the hundreds of thousands of people who have stepped up to keep this campaign powerful – all with a $3, $5, or $10 donation. **It adds up, trust us.**
[We didn’t pull this goal out of thin air. Our Republican opponents have unlimited corporate donations and PAC money to launch new attacks. Can you rush a contribution to help us be ready and fight back?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220130?refcode=em20220130-2756-P_FND_EOM_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2756_2526796_TlXOva&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva)
Thanks for all your help. We’ll keep you posted on our progress!!
Sincerely,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220130?refcode=em20220130-2756-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=24&refcode2=2756_2526796_TlXOva&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220130-2756-P_FND_EOM_GOL&t=25&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=2756%2E2526796%2ETlXOva)

Friend,

We have some news. We finally have an opponent, and he was hand-picked by Nancy Pelosi and the Democrat establishment.

Max Rose, Bernie Sanders, and Alexandria Ocasio Cortez want to destroy our personal freedoms and tax us into oblivion to pay for their Socialist wish list.

Don’t believe me he? He said so himself on MSNBC just last week when he advocated for $3.5 TRILLION to be spent on Bernie’s career wishlist.

Would you rather have higher taxes to pay for the Democrat's ridiculous spending proposals? Or would you rather have economic freedom and a lower tax burden?

NYC is one of the HIGHEST taxed places in the world, and my phony opponent, Max Rose thinks it would be a good idea to RAISE TAXES on the hard-working people of this country.

name: Jason Lee, Beto for Texas
subject: We fell short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
What we raise before midnight tomorrow will directly determine the course of this election.
#
Last night, Donald Trump came to Texas to spread his message of division and rally support for his buddy Greg Abbott.
**We set a goal to raise $250,000 before Trump took the stage — and to be honest with you, we fell about $75,000 short.**
We knew it was a stretch goal that we might not be able to reach in time, but we're up against Abbott's $62.6 million cash reserves, so we can't afford to sell ourselves short by aiming low.
Beto and our whole team — including myself — know we can close the gap with a little more time, **so we've decided to extend our deadline for just a bit longer until midnight tomorrow, January 31st.**
**[Can you contribute $3 or more to help hit our $250,000 fundraising goal before the end of the month? Time's running out to close the gap.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52098?refcode=ema20220130-174006&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=174006%2E444211%2Elh_T-w)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52098?refcode=ema20220130-174006&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=174006%2E444211%2Elh_T-w)**
Hitting this goal is critical to showing _everyone_ that we have a people-powered movement that is ready to take on Abbott and Trump's politics of exclusion and their corrupt mega-donors.
While Abbott caters to corporate special interests and lies about the state of the power grid to protect his relationship with gas companies, **we're fighting for a Texas that includes all of us.**
In our vision for Texas, every Texan can afford to see a doctor, has the opportunity to pursue the education and the career of their dreams, and benefits from a government that will never fail its people (like Abbott failed during the winter storm). But to make this vision a reality, we need your help.
**What we raise before midnight tomorrow will directly determine what we can do in this election, so we're pushing hard to hit $250,000 in time.[Please, pitch in your first donation right now and help us reach $250,000 by midnight tomorrow.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52098?refcode=ema20220130-174006&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=174006%2E444211%2Elh_T-w)**
Thank you for chipping in,
Jason Lee
Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220130-174006-footer&t=22&refcode2=174006_444211_lh_T-w&akid=174006%2E444211%2Elh_T-w)**

clean_body: What we raise before midnight tomorrow will directly determine the course of this election. Last night, Donald Trump came to Texas to spread his message of division and rally support for his buddy Greg Abbott. We set a goal to raise $250,000 before Trump took the stage — and to be honest with you, we fell about $75,000 short. We knew it was a stretch goal that we might not be able to reach in time, but we're up against Abbott's $62.6 million cash reserves, so we can't afford to sell ourselves short by aiming low. Beto and our whole team — including myself — know we can close the gap with a little more time, so we've decided to extend our deadline for just a bit longer until midnight tomorrow, January 31st. Hitting this goal is critical to showing everyone that we have a people-powered movement that is ready to take on Abbott and Trump's politics of exclusion and their corrupt mega-donors. While Abbott caters to corporate special interests and lies about the state of the power grid to protect his relationship with gas companies, we're fighting for a Texas that includes all of us. In our vision for Texas, every Texan can afford to see a doctor, has the opportunity to pursue the education and the career of their dreams, and benefits from a government that will never fail its people (like Abbott failed during the winter storm). But to make this vision a reality, we need your help. What we raise before midnight tomorrow will directly determine what we can do in this election, so we're pushing hard to hit $250,000 in time. Thank you for chipping in, Jason Lee Deputy Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas Email us: info@betofortexas.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?Zama=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Zama wins GOP Caucus!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zama for PA
body:
| | |
---
| | **ZAMA WINS REPUBLICAN CAUCUS VOTE**

_**Upset Victory in Western Pennsylvania Caucus Boosts Dr. Zama's Momentum Heading into Republican Party's Winter Meeting**_ CLARION, PA – Republican gubernatorial candidate, Dr. Nche Zama, was the top vote getter in Saturday's PA GOP Northwest Caucus Straw Poll. This victory follows Dr. Zama's strong second place finish in last weekend's PA GOP Northeast Caucus straw poll. After three debates, several regional GOP Caucus meetings, and visiting 67-counties, Dr. Zama's support continues to grow. Next weekend is the Winter Meeting of the Republican Party of Pennsylvania.

_**Governor Scorecard:**_ Out of 14 Republican candidates for Governor, only three have won a regional Republican caucus vote. Dr. Zama won the Northwest caucus vote and finished 2nd in the Northeast.

“Thank you, Western Pennsylvania, for this caucus victory,'' added Dr. Nche Zama, a retired heart surgeon seeking the GOP nomination for Governor. “Everywhere I go, people want a compassionate, critical thinker who is not entrenched in the political landscape of the past. Voters tell me they are tired of career politicians, lawyers and multimillionaires trying to buy seats of power to serve themselves. They want a true public servant leading high performance teams of Pennsylvanians, addressing our problems."

Dr. Zama is a renowned, Harvard-trained cardiothoracic surgeon who retired in late 2020 and announced his candidacy for governor in May 2021. He is the only gubernatorial candidate to have personally visited all 67 counties during the course of this campaign developing a strong grassroots following across the state.

Dr. Zama continued, “Pennsylvanians have endured failed leadership for far too long. Our educational system is ranked among the worst in the nation, we have one of the worst environments for starting and maintaining a business, and our children are suffering from hopelessness and despair. We need disruptive change in Harrisburg and I intend to be the disruptor.

Dr. Zama concluded, “I want to thank the Zama team for their hard work, dedication, and friendship. The surge of support in January has been extraordinary. We’re so thankful for the big increase in $20 for Zama contributions. Together, we’re going to keep working hard, attracting Republican, Democrat, and Independent voters to our team.

_**$20 For Zama campaign:**_ As a teenager, Dr. Zama arrived in America, alone, with $20 in his pocket to go to college. Since then, Dr. Zama excelled in school, became a cardiothoracic surgeon, and performed thousands of heart and lung operations across Pennsylvania, and the world. Recognizing the power of $20; supporters and donors have contributed $20 to help make Dr. Zama our next governor. To learn more about Dr. Zama’s incredible life journey, and join the many hundreds of $20 for Zama supporters, please visit [www.ZamaforPA.com](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=3061ed20cb&e=fe97fe84cf). The Zama campaign has already pledged to fight corruption, conflicts of interest, and pay-to-play politics in Pennsylvania’s state, county and local pensions and governments. To watch the 1st and 3rd Republican Governor's debate click here: [https://pcntv.com/election/](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=622ced1f2d&e=fe97fe84cf) To host a reception or speaking engagement contact Dr. Zama at [DrZama@ZamaForPA.com](mailto:DrZama@ZamaForPA.com)
_As a teenager, Dr. Zama came to the United States on a student visa with just $20 in his pocket. After years of hard work and sacrifice, he became a Harvard-trained cardiothoracic surgeon who is considered among the top heart surgeons in America. In addition to his surgical training at Harvard Medical School and the Cleveland Clinic, Dr. Zama also holds a master’s degree in management from Harvard, a PhD in chemistry, and speaks six languages. His extensive medical and educational missionary work has helped countless people around the world._ [www.ZamaforPA.com](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=e894e62ee8&e=fe97fe84cf)
# # #
---

East Stroudsburg, PA 18301

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Your assignment in Monroe County
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’ve got a plan, and you’re part of it.
#
Derek,
OK, we’ve got *another* update on the GOP spending frenzy in Pennsylvania. And get this — Republicans and their super PACs already poured **over $17 million** into this race.
They’re airing television ads across every inch of our Commonwealth, so we huddled and came up with a plan to fight back in all 67 counties. And you’re part of it, Derek.
**Today, we’re assigning you to Monroe County.** Our latest data shows that Republicans are spending $5,282,926 to reach voters in the Philadelphia media market where Monroe County is located. So we want to raise enough money to directly contact every single registered voter in the county (which will be more effective than any flashy TV ad).
So let’s do a little more math. There are 113,673 registered voters in Monroe, and it costs 50 cents to reach one voter. **That means we need to raise $56,837 total.** It’s an ambitious goal, but we can get it done together.
**[Will you chip in any amount right now to help us reach voters in Monroe County before Republican ads do?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42371?refcode=ema20220130-4394&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&County=Monroe&Voters=113%2C673&t=1&akid=4394%2E434096%2ECcNDib)**
**[⇢](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42371?refcode=ema20220130-4394&County=Monroe&Voters=113%2C673&t=2&akid=4394%2E434096%2ECcNDib)**[Make a $25 donation to reach 50 voters in Monroe County.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42371?refcode=ema20220130-4394&County=Monroe&Voters=113%2C673&t=3&akid=4394%2E434096%2ECcNDib)
[⇢ Make a $50 donation to reach 100 voters in Monroe County.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42371?refcode=ema20220130-4394&County=Monroe&Voters=113%2C673&t=4&akid=4394%2E434096%2ECcNDib)
[⇢ Make a $100 donation to reach 200 voters in Monroe County.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42371?refcode=ema20220130-4394&County=Monroe&Voters=113%2C673&t=5&akid=4394%2E434096%2ECcNDib)
[⇢ Make a $250 donation to reach 500 voters in Monroe County.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42371?refcode=ema20220130-4394&County=Monroe&Voters=113%2C673&t=6&akid=4394%2E434096%2ECcNDib)
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42371?refcode=ema20220130-4394&County=Monroe&Voters=113%2C673&t=7&akid=4394%2E434096%2ECcNDib)
Keeping up with the GOP’s ad spending is critical, because we can’t let the GOP buy Pennsylvania in 2022. Not when CNN ranks PA the #1 Most Likely to Flip State this year.
There’s only one way to make sure we have what it takes to win: We must out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign our GOP competitors with the sheer force of our numbers alone. **That means we need your help today, Derek — because we absolutely *must* reach all 67 Pennsylvania counties.**
Every county. Every vote. There’s just no other way to win PA.
**[Please, Derek, will you chip in as a Monroe County sponsor to help us directly reach every single registered voter?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/42371?refcode=ema20220130-4394&County=Monroe&Voters=113%2C673&t=8&akid=4394%2E434096%2ECcNDib)** _Even $1 will help us reach two voters and put us closer to our $56,837 goal._
Together, we’re going to fight back in all 67 Pennsylvania counties — and win.
Thank you for being with us,
Team Fetterman

clean_body: We’ve got a plan, and you’re part of it. Derek, OK, we’ve got another update on the GOP spending frenzy in Pennsylvania. And get this — Republicans and their super PACs already poured over $17 million into this race. They’re airing television ads across every inch of our Commonwealth, so we huddled and came up with a plan to fight back in all 67 counties. And you’re part of it, Derek. Today, we’re assigning you to Monroe County. Our latest data shows that Republicans are spending $5,282,926 to reach voters in the Philadelphia media market where Monroe County is located. So we want to raise enough money to directly contact every single registered voter in the county (which will be more effective than any flashy TV ad). So let’s do a little more math. There are 113,673 registered voters in Monroe, and it costs 50 cents to reach one voter. That means we need to raise $56,837 total. It’s an ambitious goal, but we can get it done together. Keeping up with the GOP’s ad spending is critical, because we can’t let the GOP buy Pennsylvania in 2022. Not when CNN ranks PA the #1 Most Likely to Flip State this year. There’s only one way to make sure we have what it takes to win: We must out-fundraise, out-organize, and out-campaign our GOP competitors with the sheer force of our numbers alone. That means we need your help today, Derek — because we absolutely must reach all 67 Pennsylvania counties. Every county. Every vote. There’s just no other way to win PA. Even $1 will help us reach two voters and put us closer to our $56,837 goal. Together, we’re going to fight back in all 67 Pennsylvania counties — and win. Thank you for being with us, Team Fetterman | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
